Reading Mode
This page keeps the whole session intact while making long transcripts easier to scan.
  • Messages stay in left/right conversation bubbles.
  • Tool calls and results are folded by default.
  • Reasoning steps remain visible without leaking encrypted content.
  • Context, task state, and token counters stay in the timeline for auditability.
139 dialog 462 tool traffic
Conversation Flow
Use the controls to focus on one slice of the session: human prompts, assistant output, tool traffic, reasoning markers, or system context. The raw structure is preserved without forcing everything into one flat blob.

Expand full message

Implement the following plan:

# Plan: memorytree report ÔÇö Full HTML Memory Website

## Context

The user wants to export the entire MemoryTree workspace (transcripts, goals, knowledge) as a
self-contained multi-page HTML website, generated by the heartbeat daemon. Statistics are computed
purely by code; only per-session summaries call the Claude API (cached by raw_sha256 so tokens are
spent only once per transcript). The output must work from file:// with zero external CDN
dependencies ÔÇö all SVG charts are rendered inline.

---

## Architecture


src/
  types/report.ts           ÔćÉ ReportStats, SummaryCache, LinkGraph, SearchIndexEntry, BuildReportOptions
  report/
    build.ts                ÔćÉ orchestrator, exports buildReport()
    stats.ts                ÔćÉ computeStats(), buildDayBuckets(), extractToolNames()
    summarize.ts            ÔćÉ getSummary() + cache read/write + buildSummaryPrompt()
    render/
      css.ts                ÔćÉ REPORT_CSS string constant (GitHub Dark palette + CSS vars)
      layout.ts             ÔćÉ htmlShell(), renderNav(), escHtml()
      charts.ts             ÔćÉ renderHeatmap(), renderClientDoughnut(), renderWeeklyLine(), renderToolBar()
      dashboard.ts          ÔćÉ renderDashboard(stats, manifests)
      transcript-list.ts    ÔćÉ renderTranscriptList(manifests)
      transcript.ts         ÔćÉ renderTranscript(parsed, manifest, summary, backlinks)
      knowledge.ts          ÔćÉ renderKnowledge(files)
      goals.ts              ÔćÉ renderGoals(files)
      search.ts             ÔćÉ buildSearchIndex() + renderSearchPage()
      links.ts              ÔćÉ buildLinkGraph()
  cli/
    cmd-report.ts           ÔćÉ thin CLI adapter: cmdReportBuild, cmdReportServe

Modified files:
  src/cli/main.ts           ÔćÉ register 'report build' and 'report serve' subcommands
  src/heartbeat/config.ts   ÔćÉ add generate_report: boolean, ai_summary_model: string
  src/heartbeat/heartbeat.tsÔćÉ call buildReport() after gitCommitAndPush if config.generate_report
  package.json              ÔćÉ add @anthropic-ai/sdk dependency

---

## Output Structure


Memory/07_reports/          ÔćÉ .gitignored, never committed
  index.html                ÔćÉ Dashboard
  transcripts/
    index.html              ÔćÉ Session list
    codex/{stem}.html       ÔćÉ Individual Codex sessions
    claude/{stem}.html      ÔćÉ Individual Claude sessions
    gemini/{stem}.html      ÔćÉ Individual Gemini sessions
  goals/index.html
  knowledge/index.html
  search.html               ÔćÉ Full-text search (index embedded as inline JS)
  .cache/{sha256}.json      ÔćÉ AI summary cache files

---

## Pages

### index.html ÔÇö Dashboard
Stats cards (code only):
- Total sessions / messages / tool events / active days
- Date range

SVG charts (all inline, no CDN):
- GitHub-style activity heatmap (last 365 days, 5-level green scale)
- Client distribution doughnut (codex=blue, claude=purple, gemini=green)
- Messages/week line chart (last 52 weeks, filled area)
- Top 10 tools horizontal bar chart

Recent sessions table (last 10, linked).

### transcripts/{client}/{stem}.html ÔÇö Individual Session
- Metadata header (client badge, date, duration, message count)
- AI summary card (2ÔÇô3 sentences, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, cached)
- Backlinks: "Referenced by N sessions"
- Full conversation (user=blue bubble, assistant=gray, code blocks with monospace)

### search.html ÔÇö Full-text Search
- Pre-built JSON index embedded as inline const SEARCH_INDEX = [...]
- Vanilla JS substring search, no external library
- Results link to individual session pages

### goals/ and knowledge/ pages
- Render raw Markdown content as HTML (simple regex-based Markdown Ôćĺ HTML converter,
no external lib needed for the subset used: headers, bold, italic, code, lists)

---

## SVG Charts (self-contained, no Chart.js)

| Chart | Technique |
|-------|-----------|
| Heatmap | 53├Ś7 <rect> grid, 5 color levels, <title> tooltip |
| Doughnut | SVG arc paths, 3 segments, legend below |
| Line | <path> filled area + stroke line |
| Bar | Horizontal <rect> rows, label + count text |

Edge cases: all-zero data renders gracefully (empty ring, flat line, gray cells).

---

## AI Summary


// Only called when: cache miss AND ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set AND noAi=false
const response = await client.messages.create({
  model: options?.model ?? 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
  max_tokens: 200,
  system: 'Summarize in 2-3 sentences. What was accomplished? What problems solved? Be specific. Past tense.',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: buildSummaryPrompt(messages) }],
})
// buildSummaryPrompt: first 30 messages, each truncated to 500 chars
// Cache: Memory/07_reports/.cache/{sha256}.json
// On any error: log warning, return '' (never crash build)
// SDK imported dynamically: await import('@anthropic-ai/sdk')

---

## Config Changes (src/heartbeat/config.ts)


// New fields in Config interface:
readonly generate_report: boolean          // default: false
readonly ai_summary_model: string          // default: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'

Add to defaultConfig(), parseRaw(), and saveConfig().

---

## Heartbeat Integration (src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts)

After gitCommitAndPush() in processProject():


if (config.generate_report) {
  try {
    const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
    await buildReport({
      root: projectPath,
      output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),
      noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],
      pdf: false,
    })
    logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)
  } catch (err) {
    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)
    // Never propagate ÔÇö report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle
  }
}

---

## Key Implementation Notes

1. HTML escaping: All user content interpolated into HTML must go through escHtml() ÔÇö handles & < > " '. Critical for XSS prevention.

2. Path resolution: manifest.repo_clean_path is POSIX-relative, resolve with join(root, path). Fall back to global_clean_path if repo path is empty or missing.

3. --no-ai flag gotcha: Commander's --no-ai sets opts.ai = false. Map to noAi: !opts.ai.

4. Memory efficiency: Process transcripts one at a time in build.ts ÔÇö parse Ôćĺ summarize Ôćĺ render Ôćĺ write Ôćĺ discard. Keep only manifests in memory throughout.

5. Parallel AI calls: Max 5 concurrent summary requests (simple counter semaphore, no extra deps).

6. .gitignore: buildReport() checks if Memory/07_reports/ is in .gitignore and appends it if not.

7. @anthropic-ai/sdk optional: Dynamic import with MODULE_NOT_FOUND catch Ôćĺ returns ''. Build never fails without the package.

8. Serve command: Uses node:http built-in, no extra dep. EADDRINUSE Ôćĺ clear error + exit 1.

---

## New Dependency


"@anthropic-ai/sdk": "^0.39.0"

---

## Tests

| File | Type | Key cases |
|------|------|-----------|
| tests/report/stats.test.ts | Unit | zero state, day/week bucketing, tool name extraction, client counts |
| tests/report/render/charts.test.ts | Unit | empty data, single point, >10 tools, all-zero doughnut |
| tests/report/render/links.test.ts | Unit | [[id]] detection, self-ref ignored, partial bracket no match |
| tests/report/render/search.test.ts | Unit | 50kB truncation, valid JSON embed, correct URL format |
| tests/report/summarize.test.ts | Unit | cache hit, noAi skip, missing API key, 30-msg + 500-char truncation |
| tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts | Unit | new fields read/default/round-trip |
| tests/report/build.test.ts | Integration | scaffold temp Memory/, call buildReport, assert all HTML files exist + contain <svg |

---

## Implementation Order

1. src/types/report.ts
2. src/report/render/css.ts + layout.ts (escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav)
3. src/report/stats.ts + tests
4. src/report/render/charts.ts + tests
5. src/report/render/links.ts + search.ts + tests
6. src/report/render/dashboard.ts, transcript-list.ts, transcript.ts, knowledge.ts, goals.ts
7. src/report/summarize.ts + tests
8. src/report/build.ts + integration test
9. src/cli/cmd-report.ts + register in main.ts
10. Modify config.ts + heartbeat.ts + tests
11. package.json dependency + rebuild

---

## Verification


# 1. Install new dependency
cd C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow && npm install

# 2. Build
npm run build

# 3. Run all tests (must stay 401+ passing, 0 failing)
npm test

# 4. Manual end-to-end
node dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo --no-ai
# Ôćĺ Memory/07_reports/ created, open index.html in browser

# 5. With AI summaries (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-... node dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo
# Ôćĺ .cache/{sha256}.json files created, transcripts show summary card

# 6. Heartbeat integration
# Set generate_report = true in ~/.memorytree/config.toml
node dist/cli.js daemon run-once
# Ôćĺ Report auto-generated after transcript import

 Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ recall.ts\nÔöé   ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ types/\nÔöé   Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ transcript.ts # Type definitions\nÔöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ utils/\nÔöé       ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ exec.ts      # Shell execution\nÔöé Definitions** (`src/types/transcript.ts`)\n\n```typescript\nexport type Client = 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'\n\nexport interface TranscriptMessage {\n  role: string                    // 'user', 'assistant', etc.\n  text: string\n  timestamp: string | null        // ISO 8601 or null\n}\n\nexport interface TranscriptToolEvent {\n  summary: string                 // e.g., \"function_call input=...\"\n  timestamp: string | null\n}\n\nexport interface ParsedTranscript {\n  client: Client\n  session_id: string\n  title: string\n  started_at: string             // ISO 8601\n  cwd: string                    // Current working directory\n  branch: string                 // Git branch name\n  messages: TranscriptMessage[]\n  tool_events: TranscriptToolEvent[]\n  source_path: string            // Original file path\n}\n\nexport interface ManifestEntry {\n  client: string\n  project: string                // Project slug\n  session_id: string\n  raw_sha256: string\n  title: string\n  started_at: string\n  imported_at: string\n  cwd: string\n  branch: string\n  raw_source_path: string\n  raw_upload_permission: string  // 'not-set', 'approved', 'denied'\n  global_raw_path: string        // ~/.memorytree/transcripts/raw/...\n  global_clean_path: string      // ~/.memorytree/transcripts/clean/...\n  global_manifest_path: string   // ~/.memorytree/transcripts/index/manifests/...\n  repo_raw_path: string          // Memory/06_transcripts/raw/...\n  repo_clean_path: string        // Memory/06_transcripts/clean/...\n  repo_manifest_path: string     // Memory/06_transcripts/manifests/...\n  message_count: number\n  tool_event_count: number\n  cleaning_mode: string          // 'deterministic-code'\n  repo_mirror_enabled: boolean\n}\n```\n\n### 3. **Core Files**\n\n#### **package.json**\n- Name: `memorytree-workflow` v0.1.0\n- Node: >=20\n- Binaries: `memorytree`, `memorytree-daemon` Ôćĺ `dist/cli.js`\n- Key Dependencies:\n  - `commander` ^13.1.0 (CLI framework)\n  - `fast-glob` ^3.3.3 (file discovery)\n  - `smol-toml` ^1.3.1 (config parsing)\n  - `sql.js` ^1.12.0 (SQLite search index)\n- Dev: vitest, tsx, tsup, typescript, eslint\n\n#### **tsconfig.json**\n- Target: ES2022\n- Module: NodeNext\n- Strict mode enabled\n- exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noUncheckedIndexedAccess for extra safety\n- sourceMap: true\n\n#### **src/heartbeat/config.ts** (236 lines)\n**Purpose**: Manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml configuration\n\n**Key Functions**:\n- `loadConfig(): Config` - Load TOML with fallback to defaults\n- `saveConfig(cfg: Config): void` - Persist config to TOML file\n- `intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number` - Parse \"5m\" Ôćĺ 300 seconds\n- `registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config` - Add project (immutable update)\n\n**Config Interface**:\n```typescript\ninterface Config {\n  heartbeat_interval: string      // '5m', '1h', etc. Default: '5m'\n  watch_dirs: readonly string[]   // Directories to monitor\n  projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]\n  auto_push: boolean              // Default: true\n  log_level: string               // 'debug'|'info'|'warn'|'error'\n}\n```\n\n**Key Implementation Details**:\n- Uses smol-toml for parsing\n- Defaults: 5m interval, info level, auto_push enabled\n- Validates intervals with regex `/^(\\d+)\\s*(s|m|h)$/`\n- Deduplicates projects by resolved path\n- **Immutable**: registerProject returns new Config object\n\n#### **src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts** (209 lines)\n**Purpose**: Main heartbeat daemon orchestration\n\n**Entry Points**:\n- `main(): Promise<number>` - Single execution with lock acquisition\n- `runHeartbeat(config: Config): Promise<number>` - Orchestrate project processing\n- `processProject(config, projectPath, projectName): Promise<void>` - Per-project work\n\n**Core Logic**:\n1. Acquire lock (prevent concurrent runs)\n2. For each registered project:\n   - Discover source transcripts (Codex, Claude, Gemini)\n   - Parse each transcript\n   - Check for content\n   - Match to repository\n   - Scan for sensitive patterns\n   - Import to Memory/\n3. Git commit + push (with retry)\n4. Release lock\n\n**Sensitive Pattern Detection** (5 regex patterns):\n- API keys: `api_key=` or `apikey=`\n- Passwords: `password=`, `passwd=`, `pwd=`\n- Secrets/tokens: `secret=`, `token=`\n- Known prefixes: `sk-`, `pk_live_`, `ghp_`, `gho_`, `glpat-`\n- Bearer tokens: `Bearer <20+ chars>`\n\n**Git Operations**:\n- Check `git status --porcelain Memory/` for changes\n- Commit with message: `memorytree(transcripts): import N transcript(s)`\n- Push with retry logic (2 attempts)\n- Threshold-based alerts on 3 consecutive failures\n\n#### **src/cli/main.ts** (209 lines)\n**Purpose**: CLI entry point with all subcommands\n\n**Commands**:\n1. `init` - Initialize MemoryTree in repository\n   - Options: --root, --project-name, --goal-summary, --locale, --date, --time, --force\n2. `upgrade` - Upgrade repo without overwriting policy\n3. `import` - Import single transcript\n   - Required: --source\n   - Options: --root, --client, --project-name, --global-root, --raw-upload-permission\n4. `discover` - Bulk import with filtering\n   - Options: --client (all|codex|claude|gemini), --scope, --limit\n5. `locale` - Detect effective locale\n6. `recall` - On-demand sync + session recall\n7. `daemon` (subcommands):\n   - `install` - Register with OS scheduler\n   - `uninstall` - Remove scheduled task\n   - `run-once` - Single heartbeat cycle\n   - `watch` - Continuous loop (dev only)\n   - `status` - Show registration state\n\n**Implementation**: Uses Commander.js with lazy import of command handlers\n\n### 4. **Supporting Files**\n\n#### **src/heartbeat/log.ts** (203 lines)\n- Singleton logger writing to `~/.memorytree/logs/heartbeat-YYYY-MM-DD.log` + stderr\n- Levels: debug, info, warn, error\n- Methods: debug(), info(), warn(), error(), exception(msg, err)\n- Test helper: `_resetLogger()`\n\n#### **src/heartbeat/alert.ts** (216 lines)\n- Persistent deduplication: `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`\n- Threshold-based: accumulate 3 failures before writing alert\n- Failure counts: `~/.memorytree/failure_counts.json`\n- Max alerts kept: 100 (FIFO trim)\n- Alert types: no_remote, sensitive_match, push_failed, lock_held\n- Functions: readAlerts(), writeAlert(), writeAlertWithThreshold(), resetFailureCount()\n\n#### **src/heartbeat/lock.ts** (170 lines)\n- PID-based exclusive lock: `~/.memorytree/heartbeat.lock`\n- Handles stale locks from dead processes\n- Platform detection: Windows (tasklist) vs Unix (kill -0)\n- TOCTOU-safe: uses `O_CREAT | O_EXCL`\n- Functions: acquireLock(), releaseLock(), readLockPid(), isProcessAlive()\n\n#### **src/transcript/parse.ts** (398 lines)\n**Three parsers** (by client):\n\n**Codex Parser** (parseCodexTranscript):\n- JSONL format with canonical `response_item` records\n- Fallback to `event_msg` streaming events\n- Filters system injections with markers: `<INSTRUCTIONS>`, `<environment_context>`, etc.\n- Extracts: messages, tool events (function_call, custom_tool_call)\n\n**Claude Parser** (parseClaudeTranscript):\n- JSONL records with structured content blocks\n- Supports text, thinking, reasoning (skipped), tool_use, tool_result\n- Deduplicates by timestamp + content hash\n\n**Gemini Parser** (parseGeminiTranscript):\n- Flexible: JSONL or JSON\n- Deep tree traversal to find metadata and messages\n- Handles variants: role/author/sender, parts/content/text, toolUse/toolName\n\n**Common**: Client inference from path patterns (/.codex/, /.claude/, /.gemini/)\n\n#### **src/transcript/common.ts** (356 lines)\n**Utilities**:\n- `slugify(value, fallback)` - Convert to kebab-case slug\n- `sha256File(path)` - Hash raw file\n- `contentHash(text)` - First 16 chars of SHA256\n- `normalizeTimestamp(value, fallback)` - Convert to ISO 8601\n- `parseIsoTimestamp(value)` - Parse ISO to Date\n- `timestampPartition(ts)` - Extract YYYY, MM for directory paths\n- `joinParagraphs(parts)` - Join text with double newlines\n- `summarizeValue(value, limit)` - Summarize to 180 chars\n- `yamlEscape(value)` - Quote & escape for YAML front matter\n- `deduplicateMessages()`, `deduplicateToolEvents()` - By signature (timestamp + hash)\n- Text extraction: `extractTextBlocks()`, `extractSimpleText()`, `extractGeminiText()`\n- Data access: `ensureDict()`, `ensureList()`, `getNested()`, `loadJsonl()`, `loadJson()`\n\n#### **src/transcript/import.ts** (150+ lines)\n**Main Function**: `importTranscript(parsed, root, globalRoot, projectSlug, permission, mirrorToRepo)`\n\n**Creates Artifacts**:\n1. Raw JSONL copy (global + optionally repo)\n2. Clean markdown with YAML front matter (global + optionally repo)\n3. JSON manifest (global + optionally repo)\n4. Appends to `sessions.jsonl` (deduped by SHA256)\n5. Upserts SQLite search index\n\n**Paths**:\n- Repo: `Memory/06_transcripts/{raw,clean,manifests}/{client}/{YYYY}/{MM}/{session_id}__{hash8}.{ext}`\n- Global: `~/.memorytree/transcripts/{raw,clean}/{client}/{project}/{YYYY}/{MM}/{session_id}__{hash8}.{ext}`\n\n**Markdown Format**: YAML front matter + metadata table + messages + tool events\n\n### 5. **Memory Directory Structure** (D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory)\n\n```\nMemory/\nÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ 01_goals/                          # Long-term project goals\nÔöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ goal_v001_20260316.md\nÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ 02_todos/                          # Task tracking\nÔöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ todo_v001_001_20260316.md\nÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ 03_chat_logs/                      # Chat history snapshots\nÔöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ 2026-03-16_12-05.md\nÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ 04_knowledge/                      # Extracted knowledge/summaries\nÔöé   ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ memory-classification-and-cleaning_2026-03-16.md\nÔöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ memorytree-vault-architecture_2026-03-16.md\nÔööÔöÇÔöÇ 06_transcripts/                    # AI session transcripts (main)\n    ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ raw/                           # Original JSONL\n    Ôöé   ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ codex/2026/03/*.jsonl\n    Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ claude/2026/03/*.jsonl\n    ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ clean/                         # Cleaned markdown\n    Ôöé   ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ codex/2026/03/*.md\n    Ôöé   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ claude/2026/03/*.md\n    ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ manifests/                     # Metadata JSON\n        ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ codex/2026/03/*.json\n        ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ claude/2026/03/*.json\n```\n\n**Example Manifest** (019cf4b1-5d2d-7d20-b373-a69ade3bc5c3__0ebaa458.json):\n- Client: codex\n- Session ID: 019cf4b1-5d2d-7d20-b373-a69ade3bc5c3\n- Message count: 203\n- Tool event count: 748\n- Import timestamp: 2026-03-16T08:32:09Z\n- SHA256: 0ebaa45828828a35237af35509c3dd72dab402be55e9b683039bf7a1615da5a5\n\n**Example Clean Markdown** (first 100 lines):\n- YAML front matter with metadata\n- Numbered messages with timestamps\n- Indented text content\n- Supports multiple clients with their specific message structure\n\n### 6. **Test Suite** (17 test files)\n\n**Patterns**:\n- Uses Vitest with beforeEach/afterEach setup\n- Mocks `node:os.homedir()` to temp directories (prevents pollution)\n- Test fixtures in tmpdir\n- Examples:\n  - `config.test.ts`: roundtrip save/load, interval parsing, project registration\n  - `heartbeat.test.ts`: sensitive pattern detection (API keys, tokens, passwords)\n  - `parse.test.ts`: (not shown but exists)\n  - `import.test.ts`: (not shown but exists)\n  - `lock.test.ts`: (not shown but exists)\n  - `alert.test.ts`: (not shown but exists)\n\n**Test Pattern Example** (config.test.ts):\n```typescript\nbeforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(...) })\nafterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true }) })\n\ndescribe('loadConfig', () => {\n  it('returns defaults when file missing', () => { ... })\n  it('parses valid TOML', () => { ... })\n  it('uses defaults for invalid fields', () => { ... })\n})\n```\n\n### 7. **Architecture Notes**\n\n**Immutability Principle**:\n- Config updates return new objects: `registerProject(cfg, path)` Ôćĺ new Config\n- Alert operations create new arrays: `writeAlert()` reads, modifies copy, writes\n- Failure counts: same pattern\n\n**Stateless & Idempotent**:\n- Heartbeat: single-shot execution, no state between runs\n- Lock prevents concurrent execution\n- Manifest deduplication by SHA256 prevents re-imports\n\n**Platform Support**:\n- Windows: tasklist for PID checking, handles backslashes in paths\n- Unix: kill -0 for PID checking\n- Path normalization: toPosixPath converts backslashes to forward slashes\n\n**Security**:\n- Sensitive pattern detection before import\n- Alerts on matches (no upload)\n- File hashing prevents tampering detection\n- Input validation throughout\n\n### 8. **Key Implementation Details**\n\n**Timestamp Handling**:\n- Unix seconds Ôćĺ ISO 8601 conversion\n- Fallback to file mtime if metadata missing\n- Earliest timestamp detection for session start\n- Partition by YYYY/MM for directory structure\n\n**Text Extraction**:\n- Multi-format support: string, nested objects, arrays\n- Deduplication by timestamp + content hash\n- Paragraph joining with double newlines\n- Summarization with truncation (default 180 chars)\n\n**Git Integration**:\n- Works with any git repo with Memory/ subdirectory\n- Commits only if changes exist in Memory/\n- Automatic retry on push failure\n- Respects auto_push config flag\n\nThis is a complete, production-grade TypeScript implementation of a transcript management system with heartbeat scheduling, multi-client parsing, and persistent state management.",
    "type": "text"
  },
  {

  }
]

1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * MemoryTree CLI ÔÇö unified entry point.
     3Ôćĺ * Registers all subcommands via commander.
     4Ôćĺ */
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport { Command } from 'commander'
     7Ôćĺ
     8Ôćĺconst program = new Command()
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺprogram
    11Ôćĺ  .name('memorytree')
    12Ôćĺ  .description('MemoryTree ÔÇö transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity')
    13Ôćĺ  .version('0.1.0')
    14Ôćĺ
    15Ôćĺ// ÔöÇÔöÇ init ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
    16Ôćĺ
    17Ôćĺprogram
    18Ôćĺ  .command('init')
    19Ôćĺ  .description('Initialize a MemoryTree workspace in a repository')
    20Ôćĺ  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    21Ôćĺ  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
    22Ôćĺ  .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Initial goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
    23Ôćĺ  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Template locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
    24Ôćĺ  .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
    25Ôćĺ  .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
    26Ôćĺ  .option('--skip-agents', 'Deprecated ÔÇö use upgrade instead')
    27Ôćĺ  .option('--force', 'Overwrite existing generated files')
    28Ôćĺ  .action(async (opts) => {
    29Ôćĺ    const { cmdInit } = await import('./cmd-init.js')
    30Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = cmdInit({
    31Ôćĺ      root: opts.root,
    32Ôćĺ      projectName: opts.projectName,
    33Ôćĺ      goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
    34Ôćĺ      locale: opts.locale,
    35Ôćĺ      date: opts.date ?? '',

    37Ôćĺ      skipAgents: opts.skipAgents ?? false,

    44Ôćĺprogram

   136Ôćĺ// ÔöÇÔöÇ recall ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   137Ôćĺ
   138Ôćĺprogram
   139Ôćĺ  .command('recall')
   140Ôćĺ  .description('On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall')
   141Ôćĺ  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   142Ôćĺ  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
   143Ôćĺ  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
   144Ôćĺ  .option('--activation-time <time>', 'ISO timestamp of session activation')
   145Ôćĺ  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   146Ôćĺ  .action(async (opts) => {
   147Ôćĺ    const { cmdRecall } = await import('./cmd-recall.js')
   148Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = await cmdRecall({
   149Ôćĺ      root: opts.root,
   150Ôćĺ      projectName: opts.projectName,
   151Ôćĺ      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
   152Ôćĺ      activationTime: opts.activationTime ?? '',
   153Ôćĺ      format: opts.format,
   154Ôćĺ    })
   155Ôćĺ  })
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ// ÔöÇÔöÇ daemon ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺconst daemon = program
   160Ôćĺ  .command('daemon')
   161Ôćĺ  .description('Manage the MemoryTree heartbeat lifecycle')
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺdaemon
   164Ôćĺ  .command('install')
   165Ôćĺ  .description('Register heartbeat with the OS scheduler')
   166Ôćĺ  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override heartbeat interval (e.g., "5m")')
   167Ôćĺ  .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Override auto_push setting (true/false)')
   168Ôćĺ  .action(async (opts) => {
   169Ôćĺ    const { cmdInstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   170Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = cmdInstall({
   171Ôćĺ      interval: opts.interval,
   172Ôćĺ      autoPush: opts.autoPush,
   173Ôćĺ    })
   174Ôćĺ  })
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺdaemon
   177Ôćĺ  .command('uninstall')
   178Ôćĺ  .description('Remove the heartbeat scheduled task')
   179Ôćĺ  .action(async () => {
   180Ôćĺ    const { cmdUninstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   181Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = cmdUninstall()
   182Ôćĺ  })
   183Ôćĺ
   184Ôćĺdaemon
   185Ôćĺ  .command('run-once')
   186Ôćĺ  .description('Execute a single heartbeat cycle now')
   187Ôćĺ  .action(async () => {
   188Ôćĺ    const { cmdRunOnce } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   189Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = await cmdRunOnce()
   190Ôćĺ  })
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺdaemon
   193Ôćĺ  .command('watch')
   194Ôćĺ  .description('Continuous heartbeat loop (development only)')
   195Ôćĺ  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override interval')
   196Ôćĺ  .action(async (opts) => {
   197Ôćĺ    const { cmdWatch } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   198Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = await cmdWatch({ interval: opts.interval })
   199Ôćĺ  })
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺdaemon
   202Ôćĺ  .command('status')
   203Ôćĺ  .description('Show heartbeat registration and lock state')
   204Ôćĺ  .action(async () => {
   205Ôćĺ    const { cmdStatus } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
   206Ôćĺ    process.exitCode = cmdStatus()
   207Ôćĺ  })
   208Ôćĺ
   209Ôćĺprogram.parse()
   210Ôćĺ

Read output=1Ôćĺ/** 2Ôćĺ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml. 3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py 4Ôćĺ */ 5Ôćĺ 6Ôćĺimport { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } f...
Show output payload 
1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml.
     3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py
     4Ôćĺ */
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     7Ôćĺimport { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8Ôćĺimport { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺimport { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    13Ôćĺ
    14Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    15Ôćĺ// Constants
    16Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17Ôćĺ
    18Ôćĺconst DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
    19Ôćĺconst DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
    20Ôćĺconst DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
    21Ôćĺconst VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24Ôćĺ// Types
    25Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺexport interface ProjectEntry {
    28Ôćĺ  readonly path: string
    29Ôćĺ  readonly name: string
    30Ôćĺ}
    31Ôćĺ
    32Ôćĺexport interface Config {
    33Ôćĺ  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
    34Ôćĺ  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
    35Ôćĺ  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
    36Ôćĺ  readonly auto_push: boolean
    37Ôćĺ  readonly log_level: string
    38Ôćĺ}
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    41Ôćĺ// Path helpers
    42Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺexport function memorytreeRoot(): string {
    45Ôćĺ  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
    46Ôćĺ}
    47Ôćĺ
    48Ôćĺexport function configPath(): string {
    49Ôćĺ  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
    50Ôćĺ}
    51Ôćĺ
    52Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53Ôćĺ// Load / Save
    54Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    55Ôćĺ
    56Ôćĺexport function loadConfig(): Config {
    57Ôćĺ  const path = configPath()
    58Ôćĺ  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    59Ôćĺ    return defaultConfig()
    60Ôćĺ  }
    61Ôćĺ  let raw: Record<string, unknown>
    62Ôćĺ  try {
    63Ôćĺ    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
    64Ôćĺ    raw = parseToml(text) as Record<string, unknown>
    65Ôćĺ  } catch {
    66Ôćĺ    return defaultConfig()
    67Ôćĺ  }
    68Ôćĺ  return parseRaw(raw)
    69Ôćĺ}
    70Ôćĺ
    71Ôćĺexport function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void {
    72Ôćĺ  const path = configPath()
    73Ôćĺ  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ  const lines: string[] = [
    76Ôćĺ    `heartbeat_interval = ${tomlString(cfg.heartbeat_interval)}`,
    77Ôćĺ    `auto_push = ${cfg.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false'}`,
    78Ôćĺ    `log_level = ${tomlString(cfg.log_level)}`,
    79Ôćĺ  ]
    80Ôćĺ
    81Ôćĺ  if (cfg.watch_dirs.length > 0) {
    82Ôćĺ    const items = cfg.watch_dirs.map(d => tomlString(d)).join(', ')
    83Ôćĺ    lines.push(`watch_dirs = [${items}]`)
    84Ôćĺ  } else {
    85Ôćĺ    lines.push('watch_dirs = []')
    86Ôćĺ  }
    87Ôćĺ
    88Ôćĺ  lines.push('')
    89Ôćĺ  for (const project of cfg.projects) {
    90Ôćĺ    lines.push('[[projects]]')
    91Ôćĺ    lines.push(`path = ${tomlString(project.path)}`)
    92Ôćĺ    if (project.name) {
    93Ôćĺ      lines.push(`name = ${tomlString(project.name)}`)
    94Ôćĺ    }
    95Ôćĺ    lines.push('')
    96Ôćĺ  }
    97Ôćĺ
    98Ôćĺ  writeFileSync(path, lines.join('\n') + '\n', 'utf-8')
    99Ôćĺ}
   100Ôćĺ
   101Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102Ôćĺ// Interval parsing
   103Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺexport function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number {
   106Ôćĺ  const match = interval.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   107Ôćĺ  if (!match) {
   108Ôćĺ    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   109Ôćĺ  }
   110Ôćĺ  const value = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
   111Ôćĺ  const unit = match[2]!
   112Ôćĺ  if (value <= 0) {
   113Ôćĺ    return intervalToSeconds(DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
   114Ôćĺ  }
   115Ôćĺ  const multiplier: Record<string, number> = { s: 1, m: 60, h: 3600 }
   116Ôćĺ  return value * (multiplier[unit] ?? 60)
   117Ôćĺ}
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   120Ôćĺ// Project registration
   121Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   122Ôćĺ
   123Ôćĺexport function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config {
   124Ôćĺ  const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(repoPath))
   125Ôćĺ  for (const entry of cfg.projects) {
   126Ôćĺ    if (toPosixPath(resolve(entry.path)) === resolved) {
   127Ôćĺ      return cfg
   128Ôćĺ    }
   129Ôćĺ  }
   130Ôćĺ  const name = resolved.split('/').pop() ?? ''
   131Ôćĺ  return {
   132Ôćĺ    ...cfg,
   133Ôćĺ    projects: [...cfg.projects, { path: resolved, name }],
   134Ôćĺ  }
   135Ôćĺ}
   136Ôćĺ
   137Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   138Ôćĺ// Internal helpers
   139Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   140Ôćĺ
   141Ôćĺfunction defaultConfig(): Config {
   142Ôćĺ  return {
   143Ôćĺ    heartbeat_interval: DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
   144Ôćĺ    watch_dirs: [],
   145Ôćĺ    projects: [],
   146Ôćĺ    auto_push: DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH,
   147Ôćĺ    log_level: DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL,
   148Ôćĺ  }
   149Ôćĺ}
   150Ôćĺ
   151Ôćĺfunction parseRaw(raw: Record<string, unknown>): Config {
   152Ôćĺ  let interval = raw['heartbeat_interval']
   153Ôćĺ  if (typeof interval !== 'string' || !isValidInterval(interval)) {
   154Ôćĺ    interval = DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
   155Ôćĺ  }
   156Ôćĺ
   157Ôćĺ  let autoPush = raw['auto_push']
   158Ôćĺ  if (typeof autoPush !== 'boolean') {
   159Ôćĺ    autoPush = DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH
   160Ôćĺ  }
   161Ôćĺ
   162Ôćĺ  let logLevel = raw['log_level']
   163Ôćĺ  if (typeof logLevel !== 'string' || !VALID_LOG_LEVELS.has(logLevel.toLowerCase())) {
   164Ôćĺ    logLevel = DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL
   165Ôćĺ  }
   166Ôćĺ  logLevel = (logLevel as string).toLowerCase()
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺ  const watchDirs: string[] = []
   169Ôćĺ  const rawDirs = raw['watch_dirs']
   170Ôćĺ  if (Array.isArray(rawDirs)) {
   171Ôćĺ    for (const d of rawDirs) {
   172Ôćĺ      if (typeof d === 'string') watchDirs.push(d)
   173Ôćĺ    }
   174Ôćĺ  }
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ  const projects: ProjectEntry[] = []
   177Ôćĺ  const rawProjects = raw['projects']
   178Ôćĺ  if (Array.isArray(rawProjects)) {
   179Ôćĺ    for (const entry of rawProjects) {
   180Ôćĺ      if (entry !== null && typeof entry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(entry)) {
   181Ôćĺ        const rec = entry as Record<string, unknown>
   182Ôćĺ        if (typeof rec['path'] === 'string') {
   183Ôćĺ          projects.push({
   184Ôćĺ            path: rec['path'] as string,
   185Ôćĺ            name: String(rec['name'] ?? ''),
   186Ôćĺ          })
   187Ôćĺ        }
   188Ôćĺ      }
   189Ôćĺ    }
   190Ôćĺ  }
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺ  return {
   193Ôćĺ    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,
   194Ôćĺ    watch_dirs: watchDirs,
   195Ôćĺ    projects,
   196Ôćĺ    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,
   197Ôćĺ    log_level: logLevel as string,
   198Ôćĺ  }
   199Ôćĺ}
   200Ôćĺ
   201Ôćĺfunction isValidInterval(value: string): boolean {
   202Ôćĺ  const match = value.trim().toLowerCase().match(/^(\d+)\s*(s|m|h)$/)
   203Ôćĺ  if (!match) return false
   204Ôćĺ  return parseInt(match[1]!, 10) > 0
   205Ôćĺ}
   206Ôćĺ
   207Ôćĺfunction tomlString(value: string): string {
   208Ôćĺ  const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"')
   209Ôćĺ  return `"${escaped}"`
   210Ôćĺ}
   211Ôćĺ

Tool Result #15 Read toolu_01E9wE37M8aXPPLc8VKdr9pe 09:49:19
Read output=1Ôćĺ/** 2Ôćĺ * MemoryTree heartbeat ÔÇö single execution, stateless, idempotent. 3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py 4Ôćĺ */ 5Ôćĺ 6Ôćĺimport type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcrip...
Show output payload 
1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * MemoryTree heartbeat ÔÇö single execution, stateless, idempotent.
     3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py
     4Ôćĺ */
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
     7Ôćĺimport { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
     8Ôćĺimport { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
     9Ôćĺimport { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
    10Ôćĺimport { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
    11Ôćĺimport { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '../transcript/discover.js'
    12Ôćĺimport type { Config } from './config.js'
    13Ôćĺimport { loadConfig } from './config.js'
    14Ôćĺimport { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'
    15Ôćĺimport { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'
    16Ôćĺimport type { LogLevel } from './log.js'
    17Ôćĺimport { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'
    18Ôćĺimport { git } from '../utils/exec.js'
    19Ôćĺimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    20Ôćĺimport { basename, resolve } from 'node:path'
    21Ôćĺimport { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    22Ôćĺ
    23Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    24Ôćĺ// Sensitive pattern detection
    25Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺconst SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
    28Ôćĺ  /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    29Ôćĺ  /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    30Ôćĺ  /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
    31Ôćĺ  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
    32Ôćĺ  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
    33Ôćĺ]
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36Ôćĺ// Main entry point
    37Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺexport async function main(): Promise<number> {
    40Ôćĺ  const config = loadConfig()
    41Ôćĺ  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)
    42Ôćĺ  const logger = getLogger()
    43Ôćĺ
    44Ôćĺ  if (!acquireLock()) {
    45Ôćĺ    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')
    46Ôćĺ    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')
    47Ôćĺ    return 0
    48Ôćĺ  }
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺ  try {
    51Ôćĺ    return await runHeartbeat(config)
    52Ôćĺ  } finally {
    53Ôćĺ    releaseLock()
    54Ôćĺ  }
    55Ôćĺ}
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    58Ôćĺ// Heartbeat orchestration
    59Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    60Ôćĺ
    61Ôćĺexport async function runHeartbeat(config: Config): Promise<number> {
    62Ôćĺ  const logger = getLogger()
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺ  if (config.projects.length === 0) {
    65Ôćĺ    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')
    66Ôćĺ    return 0
    67Ôćĺ  }
    68Ôćĺ
    69Ôćĺ  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${config.projects.length} project(s) registered.`)
    70Ôćĺ
    71Ôćĺ  for (const entry of config.projects) {
    72Ôćĺ    const projectPath = resolve(entry.path)
    73Ôćĺ    if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {
    74Ôćĺ      logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)
    75Ôćĺ      continue
    76Ôćĺ    }
    77Ôćĺ    try {
    78Ôćĺ      await processProject(config, projectPath, entry.name || basename(projectPath))
    79Ôćĺ    } catch (err: unknown) {
    80Ôćĺ      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)
    81Ôćĺ      writeAlertWithThreshold(
    82Ôćĺ        toPosixPath(projectPath),
    83Ôćĺ        'push_failed',
    84Ôćĺ        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,
    85Ôćĺ      )
    86Ôćĺ    }
    87Ôćĺ  }
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')
    90Ôćĺ  return 0
    91Ôćĺ}
    92Ôćĺ
    93Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    94Ôćĺ// Per-project processing
    95Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    96Ôćĺ
    97Ôćĺexport async function processProject(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string): Promise<void> {
    98Ôćĺ  const logger = getLogger()
    99Ôćĺ  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')
   100Ôćĺ  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
   101Ôćĺ
   102Ôćĺ  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
   103Ôćĺ  let importedCount = 0
   104Ôćĺ
   105Ôćĺ  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
   106Ôćĺ    let parsed: ParsedTranscript
   107Ôćĺ    try {
   108Ôćĺ      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   109Ôćĺ    } catch {
   110Ôćĺ      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)
   111Ôćĺ      continue
   112Ôćĺ    }
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺ    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
   115Ôćĺ    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue
   116Ôćĺ
   117Ôćĺ    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ    try {
   120Ôćĺ      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, 'not-set', true)
   121Ôćĺ      importedCount++
   122Ôćĺ    } catch {
   123Ôćĺ      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)
   124Ôćĺ    }
   125Ôćĺ  }
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ  if (importedCount === 0) {
   128Ôćĺ    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No new transcripts to import.`)
   129Ôćĺ    return
   130Ôćĺ  }
   131Ôćĺ
   132Ôćĺ  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)
   133Ôćĺ  gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, importedCount)
   134Ôćĺ}
   135Ôćĺ
   136Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   137Ôćĺ// Sensitive pattern scanning
   138Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   139Ôćĺ
   140Ôćĺexport function scanSensitive(parsed: ParsedTranscript, projectPath: string): void {
   141Ôćĺ  const logger = getLogger()
   142Ôćĺ  for (const msg of parsed.messages) {
   143Ôćĺ    for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_PATTERNS) {
   144Ôćĺ      if (pattern.test(msg.text)) {
   145Ôćĺ        logger.warn(
   146Ôćĺ          `Sensitive pattern detected in transcript ${parsed.source_path} (project: ${basename(projectPath)}, role: ${msg.role})`,
   147Ôćĺ        )
   148Ôćĺ        writeAlert(
   149Ôćĺ          toPosixPath(projectPath),
   150Ôćĺ          'sensitive_match',
   151Ôćĺ          `Sensitive pattern in transcript: ${basename(parsed.source_path)}`,
   152Ôćĺ        )
   153Ôćĺ        return
   154Ôćĺ      }
   155Ôćĺ    }
   156Ôćĺ  }
   157Ôćĺ}
   158Ôćĺ
   159Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   160Ôćĺ// Git operations
   161Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   162Ôćĺ
   163Ôćĺexport function gitCommitAndPush(config: Config, projectPath: string, projectName: string, count: number): void {
   164Ôćĺ  const logger = getLogger()
   165Ôćĺ
   166Ôćĺ  const status = git(projectPath, 'status', '--porcelain', 'Memory/')
   167Ôćĺ  if (!status.trim()) {
   168Ôćĺ    logger.info(`[${projectName}] No git changes in Memory/.`)
   169Ôćĺ    return
   170Ôćĺ  }
   171Ôćĺ
   172Ôćĺ  git(projectPath, 'add', 'Memory/')
   173Ôćĺ  git(projectPath, 'commit', '-m', `memorytree(transcripts): import ${count} transcript(s)`)
   174Ôćĺ  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Committed ${count} transcript import(s).`)
   175Ôćĺ
   176Ôćĺ  if (!config.auto_push) {
   177Ôćĺ    logger.info(`[${projectName}] auto_push disabled, skipping push.`)
   178Ôćĺ    return
   179Ôćĺ  }
   180Ôćĺ
   181Ôćĺ  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
   182Ôćĺ  if (!remotes.trim()) {
   183Ôćĺ    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] No git remote configured, skipping push.`)
   184Ôćĺ    writeAlert(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'no_remote', 'Push skipped: no Git remote configured.')
   185Ôćĺ    return
   186Ôćĺ  }
   187Ôćĺ
   188Ôćĺ  if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   189Ôćĺ    logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Push failed, retrying once...`)
   190Ôćĺ    if (!tryPush(projectPath, projectName)) {
   191Ôćĺ      logger.error(`[${projectName}] Push failed after retry.`)
   192Ôćĺ      writeAlertWithThreshold(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed', 'Push failed after retry.')
   193Ôćĺ      return
   194Ôćĺ    }
   195Ôćĺ  }
   196Ôćĺ
   197Ôćĺ  resetFailureCount(toPosixPath(projectPath), 'push_failed')
   198Ôćĺ}
   199Ôćĺ
   200Ôćĺexport function tryPush(projectPath: string, projectName: string): boolean {
   201Ôćĺ  try {
   202Ôćĺ    git(projectPath, 'push')
   203Ôćĺ    getLogger().info(`[${projectName}] Pushed successfully.`)
   204Ôćĺ    return true
   205Ôćĺ  } catch {
   206Ôćĺ    return false
   207Ôćĺ  }
   208Ôćĺ}
   209Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺimport { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach, vi } from 'vitest'
     2Ôćĺimport { mkdtempSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, rmSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
     3Ôćĺimport { join } from 'node:path'
     4Ôćĺimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     7Ôćĺ// Mock homedir so all path helpers point to a temp directory
     8Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
     9Ôćĺ
    10Ôćĺlet tmpDir: string
    11Ôćĺ
    12Ôćĺvi.mock('node:os', async () => {
    13Ôćĺ  const actual = await vi.importActual<typeof import('node:os')>('node:os')
    14Ôćĺ  return {
    15Ôćĺ    ...actual,
    16Ôćĺ    homedir: () => tmpDir,
    17Ôćĺ  }
    18Ôćĺ})
    19Ôćĺ
    20Ôćĺ// Import after mock setup so configPath() / memorytreeRoot() use the mock
    21Ôćĺimport {
    22Ôćĺ  loadConfig,
    23Ôćĺ  saveConfig,
    24Ôćĺ  intervalToSeconds,
    25Ôćĺ  registerProject,
    26Ôćĺ  configPath,
    27Ôćĺ  memorytreeRoot,
    28Ôćĺ} from '../../src/heartbeat/config.js'
    29Ôćĺ
    30Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    31Ôćĺ// Setup / Teardown
    32Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    33Ôćĺ
    34ÔćĺbeforeEach(() => {
    35Ôćĺ  tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'cfg-test-'))
    36Ôćĺ})
    37Ôćĺ
    38ÔćĺafterEach(() => {
    39Ôćĺ  rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })
    40Ôćĺ})
    41Ôćĺ
    42Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    43Ôćĺ// configPath / memorytreeRoot
    44Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    45Ôćĺ
    46Ôćĺdescribe('configPath / memorytreeRoot', () => {
    47Ôćĺ  it('memorytreeRoot returns <home>/.memorytree', () => {
    48Ôćĺ    const root = memorytreeRoot()
    49Ôćĺ    expect(root).toContain('.memorytree')
    50Ôćĺ    expect(root.startsWith(tmpDir)).toBe(true)
    51Ôćĺ  })
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺ  it('configPath returns <home>/.memorytree/config.toml', () => {
    54Ôćĺ    const path = configPath()
    55Ôćĺ    expect(path).toContain('config.toml')
    56Ôćĺ    expect(path.startsWith(tmpDir)).toBe(true)
    57Ôćĺ  })
    58Ôćĺ})
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    61Ôćĺ// loadConfig
    62Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    63Ôćĺ
    64Ôćĺdescribe('loadConfig', () => {
    65Ôćĺ  it('returns defaults when config file does not exist', () => {
    66Ôćĺ    const cfg = loadConfig()
    67Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('5m')
    68Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
    69Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('info')
    70Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual([])
    71Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects).toEqual([])
    72Ôćĺ  })
    73Ôćĺ
    74Ôćĺ  it('parses valid TOML file', () => {
    75Ôćĺ    const path = configPath()
    76Ôćĺ    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
    77Ôćĺ    writeFileSync(
    78Ôćĺ      path,
    79Ôćĺ      [
    80Ôćĺ        'heartbeat_interval = "10m"',
    81Ôćĺ        'auto_push = false',
    82Ôćĺ        'log_level = "debug"',
    83Ôćĺ        'watch_dirs = ["/home/user/repos"]',
    84Ôćĺ        '',
    85Ôćĺ        '[[projects]]',
    86Ôćĺ        'path = "/home/user/project-a"',
    87Ôćĺ        'name = "project-a"',
    88Ôćĺ        '',
    89Ôćĺ      ].join('\n'),
    90Ôćĺ    )
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ    const cfg = loadConfig()
    93Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('10m')
    94Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(false)
    95Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('debug')
    96Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual(['/home/user/repos'])
    97Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects).toHaveLength(1)
    98Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects[0]!.path).toBe('/home/user/project-a')
    99Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects[0]!.name).toBe('project-a')
   100Ôćĺ  })
   101Ôćĺ
   102Ôćĺ  it('returns defaults for invalid TOML', () => {
   103Ôćĺ    const path = configPath()
   104Ôćĺ    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   105Ôćĺ    writeFileSync(path, '<<<not valid toml>>>')
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ    const cfg = loadConfig()
   108Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('5m')
   109Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
   110Ôćĺ  })
   111Ôćĺ
   112Ôćĺ  it('uses defaults for missing or invalid fields', () => {
   113Ôćĺ    const path = configPath()
   114Ôćĺ    mkdirSync(join(tmpDir, '.memorytree'), { recursive: true })
   115Ôćĺ    // Only set heartbeat_interval; other fields should default
   116Ôćĺ    writeFileSync(path, 'heartbeat_interval = "1h"\n')
   117Ôćĺ
   118Ôćĺ    const cfg = loadConfig()
   119Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.heartbeat_interval).toBe('1h')
   120Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.auto_push).toBe(true)
   121Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.log_level).toBe('info')
   122Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.watch_dirs).toEqual([])
   123Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects).toEqual([])
   124Ôćĺ  })
   125Ôćĺ})
   126Ôćĺ
   127Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   128Ôćĺ// saveConfig
   129Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺdescribe('saveConfig', () => {
   132Ôćĺ  it('roundtrip: save then load yields equivalent config', () => {
   133Ôćĺ    const original = {
   134Ôćĺ      heartbeat_interval: '10m',
   135Ôćĺ      auto_push: false,
   136Ôćĺ      log_level: 'debug',
   137Ôćĺ      watch_dirs: ['/repos/a', '/repos/b'],
   138Ôćĺ      projects: [
   139Ôćĺ        { path: '/home/user/project-a', name: 'project-a' },
   140Ôćĺ        { path: '/home/user/project-b', name: 'project-b' },
   141Ôćĺ      ],
   142Ôćĺ    } as const
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ    saveConfig(original)
   145Ôćĺ    const loaded = loadConfig()
   146Ôćĺ
   147Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.heartbeat_interval).toBe(original.heartbeat_interval)
   148Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.auto_push).toBe(original.auto_push)
   149Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.log_level).toBe(original.log_level)
   150Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.watch_dirs).toEqual([...original.watch_dirs])
   151Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.projects).toHaveLength(2)
   152Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.projects[0]!.path).toBe(original.projects[0]!.path)
   153Ôćĺ    expect(loaded.projects[1]!.name).toBe(original.projects[1]!.name)
   154Ôćĺ  })
   155Ôćĺ
   156Ôćĺ  it('serializes empty projects list', () => {
   157Ôćĺ    const cfg = {
   158Ôćĺ      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   159Ôćĺ      auto_push: true,
   160Ôćĺ      log_level: 'info',
   161Ôćĺ      watch_dirs: [],
   162Ôćĺ      projects: [],
   163Ôćĺ    } as const
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ    saveConfig(cfg)
   166Ôćĺ
   167Ôćĺ    const text = readFileSync(configPath(), 'utf-8')
   168Ôćĺ    expect(text).toContain('heartbeat_interval = "5m"')
   169Ôćĺ    expect(text).toContain('auto_push = true')
   170Ôćĺ    expect(text).not.toContain('[[projects]]')
   171Ôćĺ  })
   172Ôćĺ})
   173Ôćĺ
   174Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   175Ôćĺ// intervalToSeconds
   176Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   177Ôćĺ
   178Ôćĺdescribe('intervalToSeconds', () => {
   179Ôćĺ  it('parses minutes: 5m -> 300', () => {
   180Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('5m')).toBe(300)
   181Ôćĺ  })
   182Ôćĺ
   183Ôćĺ  it('parses hours: 1h -> 3600', () => {
   184Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('1h')).toBe(3600)
   185Ôćĺ  })
   186Ôćĺ
   187Ôćĺ  it('parses seconds: 30s -> 30', () => {
   188Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('30s')).toBe(30)
   189Ôćĺ  })
   190Ôćĺ
   191Ôćĺ  it('returns default (300) for invalid input', () => {
   192Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('invalid')).toBe(300)
   193Ôćĺ  })
   194Ôćĺ
   195Ôćĺ  it('returns default (300) for zero value', () => {
   196Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('0m')).toBe(300)
   197Ôćĺ  })
   198Ôćĺ
   199Ôćĺ  it('handles leading/trailing whitespace', () => {
   200Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('  10m  ')).toBe(600)
   201Ôćĺ  })
   202Ôćĺ
   203Ôćĺ  it('is case-insensitive', () => {
   204Ôćĺ    expect(intervalToSeconds('2H')).toBe(7200)
   205Ôćĺ  })
   206Ôćĺ})
   207Ôćĺ
   208Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   209Ôćĺ// registerProject
   210Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   211Ôćĺ
   212Ôćĺdescribe('registerProject', () => {
   213Ôćĺ  it('adds a new project to an empty list', () => {
   214Ôćĺ    const cfg = {
   215Ôćĺ      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   216Ôćĺ      auto_push: true,
   217Ôćĺ      log_level: 'info',
   218Ôćĺ      watch_dirs: [],
   219Ôćĺ      projects: [],
   220Ôćĺ    } as const
   221Ôćĺ
   222Ôćĺ    const updated = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   223Ôćĺ    expect(updated.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   224Ôćĺ    expect(updated.projects[0]!.path).toBeTruthy()
   225Ôćĺ    // Name derived from last path segment
   226Ôćĺ    expect(updated.projects[0]!.name).toBeTruthy()
   227Ôćĺ  })
   228Ôćĺ
   229Ôćĺ  it('skips duplicate project (by resolved path)', () => {
   230Ôćĺ    const cfg = {
   231Ôćĺ      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   232Ôćĺ      auto_push: true,
   233Ôćĺ      log_level: 'info',
   234Ôćĺ      watch_dirs: [],
   235Ôćĺ      projects: [],
   236Ôćĺ    } as const
   237Ôćĺ
   238Ôćĺ    const updated1 = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   239Ôćĺ    const updated2 = registerProject(updated1, tmpDir)
   240Ôćĺ    expect(updated2.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   241Ôćĺ  })
   242Ôćĺ
   243Ôćĺ  it('does not mutate the original config', () => {
   244Ôćĺ    const cfg = {
   245Ôćĺ      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
   246Ôćĺ      auto_push: true,
   247Ôćĺ      log_level: 'info',
   248Ôćĺ      watch_dirs: [],
   249Ôćĺ      projects: [],
   250Ôćĺ    } as const
   251Ôćĺ
   252Ôćĺ    const updated = registerProject(cfg, tmpDir)
   253Ôćĺ    expect(cfg.projects).toHaveLength(0)
   254Ôćĺ    expect(updated.projects).toHaveLength(1)
   255Ôćĺ  })
   256Ôćĺ})
   257Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * Transcript import ÔÇö orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
     3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
     4Ôćĺ */
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     7Ôćĺimport { dirname, extname, join, basename, relative } from 'node:path'
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺimport type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
    10Ôćĺimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    11Ôćĺimport {
    12Ôćĺ  loadJson,
    13Ôćĺ  normalizeTimestamp,
    14Ôćĺ  sha256File,
    15Ôćĺ  slugify,
    16Ôćĺ  timestampPartition,
    17Ôćĺ  yamlEscape,
    18Ôćĺ} from './common.js'
    19Ôćĺimport { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺexport async function importTranscript(
    22Ôćĺ  parsed: ParsedTranscript,
    23Ôćĺ  root: string,
    24Ôćĺ  globalRoot: string,
    25Ôćĺ  projectSlug: string,
    26Ôćĺ  rawUploadPermission: string,
    27Ôćĺ  mirrorToRepo = true,
    28Ôćĺ): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
    29Ôćĺ  const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
    30Ôćĺ  const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
    31Ôćĺ  const sessionLabel = slugify(
    32Ôćĺ    parsed.session_id,
    33Ôćĺ    slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
    34Ôćĺ  )
    35Ôćĺ  const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
    36Ôćĺ  const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
    37Ôćĺ
    38Ôćĺ  const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
    39Ôćĺ
    40Ôćĺ  const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
    41Ôćĺ  const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    42Ôćĺ  const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    43Ôćĺ  const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    44Ôćĺ
    45Ôćĺ  const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    46Ôćĺ  const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    47Ôćĺ  const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    48Ôćĺ  const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
    49Ôćĺ  const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
    50Ôćĺ
    51Ôćĺ  for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
    52Ôćĺ    mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    53Ôćĺ  }
    54Ôćĺ  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    55Ôćĺ    for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath]) {
    56Ôćĺ      mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    57Ôćĺ    }
    58Ôćĺ  }
    59Ôćĺ
    60Ôćĺ  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    61Ôćĺ    copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
    62Ôćĺ  }
    63Ôćĺ  copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
    64Ôćĺ
    65Ôćĺ  let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
    66Ôćĺ    client: parsed.client,
    67Ôćĺ    project: projectSlug,
    68Ôćĺ    session_id: parsed.session_id,
    69Ôćĺ    title: parsed.title,
    70Ôćĺ    started_at: parsed.started_at,
    71Ôćĺ    imported_at: importedAt,
    72Ôćĺ    cwd: parsed.cwd,
    73Ôćĺ    branch: parsed.branch,
    74Ôćĺ    raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
    75Ôćĺ    raw_sha256: rawSha256,
    76Ôćĺ    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
    77Ôćĺ    repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
    78Ôćĺ    repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
    79Ôćĺ    repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
    80Ôćĺ    global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
    81Ôćĺ    global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
    82Ôćĺ    global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
    83Ôćĺ    message_count: parsed.messages.length,
    84Ôćĺ    tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
    85Ôćĺ    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
    86Ôćĺ    repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
    87Ôćĺ  }
    88Ôćĺ
    89Ôćĺ  const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
    90Ôćĺ  manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    93Ôćĺ    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
    94Ôćĺ  }
    95Ôćĺ  writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
    96Ôćĺ  const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
    97Ôćĺ  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    98Ôćĺ    writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifestRecord)
    99Ôćĺ  }
   100Ôćĺ  const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
   101Ôćĺ  writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifestRecord)
   102Ôćĺ  if (appendToEventLog) {
   103Ôćĺ    appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
   104Ôćĺ  }
   105Ôćĺ  await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
   106Ôćĺ
   107Ôćĺ  return manifest
   108Ôćĺ}
   109Ôćĺ
   110Ôćĺexport function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
   111Ôćĺ  return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0
   112Ôćĺ}
   113Ôćĺ
   114Ôćĺexport function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
   115Ôćĺ  const lines: string[] = [
   116Ôćĺ    '---',
   117Ôćĺ    `client: ${manifest.client}`,
   118Ôćĺ    `project: ${manifest.project}`,
   119Ôćĺ    `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
   120Ôćĺ    `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
   121Ôćĺ    `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
   122Ôćĺ    `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
   123Ôćĺ    `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
   124Ôćĺ    `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
   125Ôćĺ    `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
   126Ôćĺ    `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
   127Ôćĺ    `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
   128Ôćĺ    `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
   129Ôćĺ    '---',
   130Ôćĺ    '',
   131Ôćĺ    `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
   132Ôćĺ    '',
   133Ôćĺ    '## Metadata',
   134Ôćĺ    `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
   135Ôćĺ    `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
   136Ôćĺ    `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
   137Ôćĺ    `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
   138Ôćĺ    `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
   139Ôćĺ    `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
   140Ôćĺ    `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
   141Ôćĺ    `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
   142Ôćĺ    `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
   143Ôćĺ    '',
   144Ôćĺ    '## Messages',
   145Ôćĺ  ]
   146Ôćĺ
   147Ôćĺ  if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
   148Ôćĺ    for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
   149Ôćĺ      const message = parsed.messages[i]!
   150Ôćĺ      lines.push(
   151Ôćĺ        `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
   152Ôćĺ        `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
   153Ôćĺ        '',
   154Ôćĺ        message.text,
   155Ôćĺ        '',
   156Ôćĺ      )
   157Ôćĺ    }
   158Ôćĺ  } else {
   159Ôćĺ    lines.push(
   160Ôćĺ      'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
   161Ôćĺ      '',
   162Ôćĺ    )
   163Ôćĺ  }
   164Ôćĺ
   165Ôćĺ  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
   166Ôćĺ}
   167Ôćĺ
   168Ôćĺexport function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
   169Ôćĺ  existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
   170Ôćĺ  payload: ManifestEntry,
   171Ôćĺ): ManifestEntry {
   172Ôćĺ  if (existing === null) return payload
   173Ôćĺ  const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
   174Ôćĺ  if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
   175Ôćĺ  const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
   176Ôćĺ  if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
   177Ôćĺ    return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
   178Ôćĺ  }
   179Ôćĺ  return payload
   180Ôćĺ}
   181Ôćĺ
   182Ôćĺexport function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
   183Ôćĺ  const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   184Ôćĺ  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
   185Ôćĺ    if (key !== 'imported_at') {
   186Ôćĺ      result[key] = value
   187Ôćĺ    }
   188Ôćĺ  }
   189Ôćĺ  return result
   190Ôćĺ}
   191Ôćĺ
   192Ôćĺexport function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
   193Ôćĺ  if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
   194Ôćĺ  try {
   195Ôćĺ    const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
   196Ôćĺ    return !deepEqual(current, payload)
   197Ôćĺ  } catch {
   198Ôćĺ    return true
   199Ôćĺ  }
   200Ôćĺ}
   201Ôćĺ
   202Ôćĺexport function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   203Ôćĺ  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   204Ôćĺ}
   205Ôćĺ
   206Ôćĺexport function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   207Ôćĺ  appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   208Ôćĺ}
   209Ôćĺ
   210Ôćĺexport function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
   211Ôćĺ  if (source === destination) return
   212Ôćĺ  copyFileSync(source, destination)
   213Ôćĺ}
   214Ôćĺ
   215Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   216Ôćĺ// Internal helpers
   217Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   218Ôćĺ
   219Ôćĺfunction stemOf(filePath: string): string {
   220Ôćĺ  const base = basename(filePath)
   221Ôćĺ  const ext = extname(base)
   222Ôćĺ  return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
   223Ôćĺ}
   224Ôćĺ
   225Ôćĺfunction deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
   226Ôćĺ  if (a === b) return true
   227Ôćĺ  if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
   228Ôćĺ  if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
   229Ôćĺ  if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
   230Ôćĺ  const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
   231Ôćĺ  const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
   232Ôćĺ  const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
   233Ôćĺ  const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
   234Ôćĺ  if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
   235Ôćĺ  return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
   236Ôćĺ}
   237Ôćĺ

1Ôćĺ/**
     2Ôćĺ * Transcript parsing ÔÇö client inference, dispatch, and format-specific parsers.
     3Ôćĺ * Port of scripts/_transcript_parse.py
     4Ôćĺ */
     5Ôćĺ
     6Ôćĺimport { readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
     7Ôćĺimport { basename, extname } from 'node:path'
     8Ôćĺ
     9Ôćĺimport type { Client, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptMessage, TranscriptToolEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'
    10Ôćĺimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    11Ôćĺimport {
    12Ôćĺ  SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES,
    13Ôćĺ  TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,
    14Ôćĺ  TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
    15Ôćĺ  TOOL_USE_TYPES,
    16Ôćĺ  deduplicateMessages,
    17Ôćĺ  deduplicateToolEvents,
    18Ôćĺ  earliestTimestamp,
    19Ôćĺ  ensureDict,
    20Ôćĺ  ensureList,
    21Ôćĺ  extractGeminiText,
    22Ôćĺ  extractTextBlocks,
    23Ôćĺ  findFirstMappingWithKeys,
    24Ôćĺ  getNested,
    25Ôćĺ  joinParagraphs,
    26Ôćĺ  loadJsonl,
    27Ôćĺ  normalizeTimestamp,
    28Ôćĺ  summarizeValue,
    29Ôćĺ} from './common.js'
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32Ôćĺ// Client inference + dispatch
    33Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34Ôćĺ
    35Ôćĺexport function inferClient(client: string, sourcePath: string): Client {
    36Ôćĺ  if (client !== 'auto') {
    37Ôćĺ    return client as Client
    38Ôćĺ  }
    39Ôćĺ  const normalized = toPosixPath(sourcePath).toLowerCase()
    40Ôćĺ  const fileName = basename(sourcePath).toLowerCase()
    41Ôćĺ  if (normalized.includes('/.codex/') || fileName.startsWith('rollout-')) {
    42Ôćĺ    return 'codex'
    43Ôćĺ  }
    44Ôćĺ  if (normalized.includes('/.claude/') || normalized.includes('/projects/')) {
    45Ôćĺ    return 'claude'
    46Ôćĺ  }
    47Ôćĺ  if (normalized.includes('/.gemini/') || normalized.includes('checkpoint')) {
    48Ôćĺ    return 'gemini'
    49Ôćĺ  }
    50Ôćĺ  throw new Error(`could not infer transcript client from source path: ${sourcePath}`)
    51Ôćĺ}
    52Ôćĺ
    53Ôćĺexport function parseTranscript(client: string, sourcePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
    54Ôćĺ  const resolved = inferClient(client, sourcePath)
    55Ôćĺ  if (resolved === 'codex') {
    56Ôćĺ    return parseCodexTranscript(sourcePath)
    57Ôćĺ  }
    58Ôćĺ  if (resolved === 'claude') {
    59Ôćĺ    return parseClaudeTranscript(sourcePath)
    60Ôćĺ  }
    61Ôćĺ  if (resolved === 'gemini') {
    62Ôćĺ    return parseGeminiTranscript(sourcePath)
    63Ôćĺ  }
    64Ôćĺ  throw new Error(`unsupported transcript client: ${resolved}`)
    65Ôćĺ}
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    68Ôćĺ// Codex parser
    69Ôćĺ// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    70Ôćĺ
    71Ôćĺexport function parseCodexTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
    72Ôćĺ  const records = loadJsonl(filePath)
    73Ôćĺ  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
    74Ôćĺ  let sessionId = stem
    75Ôćĺ  let title = stem
    76Ôćĺ  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
    77Ôćĺ  let cwd = ''
    78Ôćĺ  let branch = ''
    79Ôćĺ  // Canonical messages from `payload.type === 'message'` (response_item records).
    80Ôćĺ  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []

}

  "content": "/**\n * GitHub Dark-inspired CSS for the report website.\n * Self-contained ÔÇö no external CDN dependencies.\n */\n\nexport const REPORT_CSS = `\n:root {\n  --bg: #0d1117;\n  --bg-secondary: #161b22;\n  --bg-card: #21262d;\n  --border: #30363d;\n  --text: #e6edf3;\n  --text-muted: #8b949e;\n  --accent: #58a6ff;\n  --accent-hover: #79b8ff;\n  --green-0: #161b22;\n  --green-1: #0e4429;\n  --green-2: #006d32;\n  --green-3: #26a641;\n  --green-4: #39d353;\n  --user-bg: #1c2d3e;\n  --user-border: #388bfd44;\n  --assistant-bg: #1c1c1c;\n  --assistant-border: #30363d;\n  --code-bg: #161b22;\n  --badge-codex: #1f6feb;\n  --badge-claude: #6e40c9;\n  --badge-gemini: #1a7f37;\n  --danger: #f85149;\n  --warning: #d29922;\n  --success: #3fb950;\n  --font-mono: 'SF Mono', 'Consolas', 'Liberation Mono', 'Menlo', monospace;\n}\n\n*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n\nhtml { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; }\n\nbody {\n  background: var(--bg);\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n}\n\na { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }\na:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); text-decoration: underline; }\n\ncode {\n  font-family: var(--font-mono);\n  font-size: 0.875em;\n  background: var(--code-bg);\n  padding: 0.15em 0.4em;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n}\n\npre {\n  background: var(--code-bg);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  overflow-x: auto;\n  margin: 0.75rem 0;\n}\n\npre code {\n  background: none;\n  border: none;\n  padding: 0;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n}\n\nh1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {\n  color: var(--text);\n  line-height: 1.3;\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\nh1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }\nh2 { font-size: 1.375rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.4rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\nh3 { font-size: 1.125rem; }\n\np { margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\n\nul, ol { padding-left: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\nli { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }\n\ntable { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.9rem; }\nth, td { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }\nth { color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: var(--bg-secondary); }\ntr:hover td { background: var(--bg-secondary); }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Nav ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.nav {\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n  padding: 0 1.5rem;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0;\n  position: sticky;\n  top: 0;\n  z-index: 100;\n}\n\n.nav-brand {\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  color: var(--text);\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem 0.75rem 0;\n  margin-right: 0.5rem;\n  border-right: 1px solid var(--border);\n}\n\n.nav-link {\n  display: inline-block;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  transition: color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.nav-link:hover { color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; }\n.nav-link.active { color: var(--text); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent); }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Layout ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1.5rem; }\n\n.page-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }\n.page-header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }\n.page-header .subtitle { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Cards ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.card-title {\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.stat-value {\n  font-size: 2rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: var(--text);\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n.stat-label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 0.25rem; }\n\n.stats-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Charts ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.chart-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 900px) {\n  .chart-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n\n.chart-card {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.chart-title {\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.chart-card svg { display: block; width: 100%; overflow: visible; }\n.chart-card.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Badge ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.badge {\n  display: inline-block;\n  padding: 0.2em 0.6em;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n\n.badge-codex { background: #1f6feb33; color: #58a6ff; border: 1px solid #1f6feb66; }\n.badge-claude { background: #6e40c933; color: #bc8cff; border: 1px solid #6e40c966; }\n.badge-gemini { background: #1a7f3733; color: #3fb950; border: 1px solid #1a7f3766; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Messages ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.messages { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; margin-top: 1rem; }\n\n.message {\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  border: 1px solid;\n  max-width: 100%;\n}\n\n.message-user {\n  background: var(--user-bg);\n  border-color: var(--user-border);\n  align-self: flex-start;\n}\n\n.message-assistant {\n  background: var(--assistant-bg);\n  border-color: var(--assistant-border);\n}\n\n.message-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.message-role {\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  text-transform: capitalize;\n}\n\n.message-user .message-role { color: #58a6ff; }\n.message-assistant .message-role { color: #8b949e; }\n\n.message-body { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; word-break: break-word; }\n.message-body p { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n.message-body p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Summary card ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.summary-card {\n  background: #161b22;\n  border: 1px solid #30363d;\n  border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n}\n\n.summary-card .summary-label {\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.05em;\n  color: var(--accent);\n  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Metadata table ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.meta-table { font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }\n.meta-table td:first-child { color: var(--text-muted); width: 140px; font-weight: 500; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Backlinks ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.backlinks {\n  background: var(--bg-secondary);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n}\n\n.backlinks-title { font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; }\n.backlinks ul { padding-left: 1rem; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Search ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.search-box {\n  width: 100%;\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 1rem;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n  outline: none;\n  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.search-box:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }\n\n.search-results { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; }\n\n.search-result {\n  background: var(--bg-card);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  transition: border-color 0.15s;\n}\n\n.search-result:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }\n.search-result-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }\n.search-result-meta { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }\n.search-result-snippet { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); }\n.search-result mark { background: #3d3000; color: var(--warning); border-radius: 2px; padding: 0 0.1em; }\n#search-count { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Heatmap legend ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n.heatmap-legend {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--text-muted);\n  margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Responsive ÔöÇÔöÇ */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n  .nav { padding: 0 0.75rem; }\n  .container { padding: 1rem 0.75rem; }\n  .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }\n}\n`\n"
}
