{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/layout.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * HTML layout helpers: shell, navigation, and HTML escaping.\n */\n\nimport { REPORT_CSS } from './css.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// HTML escaping\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function escHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n    .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')\n    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Navigation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport type NavPage = 'dashboard' | 'transcripts' | 'goals' | 'knowledge' | 'search'\n\nconst NAV_ITEMS: Array<{ id: NavPage; label: string; href: string }> = [\n  { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', href: '../index.html' },\n  { id: 'transcripts', label: 'Transcripts', href: '../transcripts/index.html' },\n  { id: 'goals', label: 'Goals', href: '../goals/index.html' },\n  { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge', href: '../knowledge/index.html' },\n  { id: 'search', label: 'Search', href: '../search.html' },\n]\n\n/** Nav items for root-level pages (index.html, search.html) use relative paths */\nconst NAV_ITEMS_ROOT: Array<{ id: NavPage; label: string; href: string }> = [\n  { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', href: 'index.html' },\n  { id: 'transcripts', label: 'Transcripts', href: 'transcripts/index.html' },\n  { id: 'goals', label: 'Goals', href: 'goals/index.html' },\n  { id: 'knowledge', label: 'Knowledge', href: 'knowledge/index.html' },\n  { id: 'search', label: 'Search', href: 'search.html' },\n]\n\nexport function renderNav(current: NavPage, rootLevel = false): string {\n  const items = rootLevel ? NAV_ITEMS_ROOT : NAV_ITEMS\n  const links = items\n    .map(item => {\n      const cls = item.id === current ? 'nav-link active' : 'nav-link'\n      return `<a href=\"${item.href}\" class=\"${cls}\">${item.label}</a>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n  return `<nav class=\"nav\"><span class=\"nav-brand\">MemoryTree</span>${links}</nav>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// HTML shell\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = ''): string {\n  return `<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>${escHtml(title)} ÔÇö MemoryTree</title>\n<style>${REPORT_CSS}</style>\n${extraHead}\n</head>\n<body>\n${nav}\n<div class=\"container\">\n${content}\n</div>\n</body>\n</html>`\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/stats.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Statistics computation from ManifestEntry arrays.\n * All purely algorithmic ÔÇö no I/O, no external deps.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { ReportStats } from '../types/report.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main stats computation\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function computeStats(\n  manifests: ManifestEntry[],\n  toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {},\n): ReportStats {\n  const totalSessions = manifests.length\n  let totalMessages = 0\n  let totalToolEvents = 0\n  const clientCounts: Record<string, number> = {}\n  const daySet = new Set<string>()\n\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    totalMessages += m.message_count\n    totalToolEvents += m.tool_event_count\n\n    const client = m.client || 'unknown'\n    clientCounts[client] = (clientCounts[client] ?? 0) + 1\n\n    const day = isoDay(m.started_at)\n    if (day) daySet.add(day)\n  }\n\n  const dayBuckets = buildDayBuckets(manifests)\n  const weekBuckets = buildWeekBuckets(manifests)\n\n  const dates = manifests\n    .map(m => m.started_at)\n    .filter(Boolean)\n    .sort()\n\n  const from = dates[0] ?? ''\n  const to = dates[dates.length - 1] ?? ''\n\n  return {\n    totalSessions,\n    totalMessages,\n    totalToolEvents,\n    activeDays: daySet.size,\n    dateRange: { from, to },\n    clientCounts,\n    dayBuckets,\n    weekBuckets,\n    toolCounts,\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Day buckets: 'YYYY-MM-DD' Ôćĺ session count\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function buildDayBuckets(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): Record<string, number> {\n  const buckets: Record<string, number> = {}\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    const day = isoDay(m.started_at)\n    if (day) {\n      buckets[day] = (buckets[day] ?? 0) + 1\n    }\n  }\n  return buckets\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Week buckets: 'YYYY-WNN' Ôćĺ message count\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function buildWeekBuckets(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): Record<string, number> {\n  const buckets: Record<string, number> = {}\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    const week = isoWeek(m.started_at)\n    if (week) {\n      buckets[week] = (buckets[week] ?? 0) + m.message_count\n    }\n  }\n  return buckets\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tool name extraction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Extract tool names from tool event summary strings.\n * Summary format is typically: \"function_call input=...\" or \"Bash ...\" etc.\n */\nexport function extractToolNames(summaries: string[]): string[] {\n  return summaries.map(s => {\n    const trimmed = s.trim()\n    // Try to extract first identifier word\n    const match = trimmed.match(/^([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_:-]*)/)\n    if (match?.[1]) {\n      return match[1]\n    }\n    return 'unknown'\n  })\n}\n\n/**\n * Accumulate tool name counts into an existing map.\n */\nexport function accumulateToolCounts(\n  toolCounts: Record<string, number>,\n  names: string[],\n): Record<string, number> {\n  const result = { ...toolCounts }\n  for (const name of names) {\n    result[name] = (result[name] ?? 0) + 1\n  }\n  return result\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Internal helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Extract 'YYYY-MM-DD' from an ISO timestamp. Returns '' if invalid. */\nfunction isoDay(ts: string): string {\n  if (!ts) return ''\n  const match = ts.match(/^(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})/)\n  return match?.[1] ?? ''\n}\n\n/** Compute 'YYYY-WNN' ISO week string from an ISO timestamp. */\nfunction isoWeek(ts: string): string {\n  if (!ts) return ''\n  try {\n    const d = new Date(ts)\n    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return ''\n    // ISO week: Thursday determines the week number\n    const thursday = new Date(d)\n    thursday.setDate(d.getDate() + (4 - ((d.getDay() + 6) % 7 + 1)))\n    const year = thursday.getFullYear()\n    const jan4 = new Date(year, 0, 4)\n    const week = Math.ceil(\n      ((thursday.getTime() - jan4.getTime()) / 86400000 + jan4.getDay() + 1) / 7,\n    )\n    return `${year}-W${String(week).padStart(2, '0')}`\n  } catch {\n    return ''\n  }\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/charts.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * SVG chart renderers. All inline SVG, no external libraries.\n * Edge cases: all-zero data renders gracefully.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Color constants\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nconst HEATMAP_COLORS = ['#161b22', '#0e4429', '#006d32', '#26a641', '#39d353']\nconst CLIENT_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {\n  codex: '#388bfd',\n  claude: '#bc8cff',\n  gemini: '#3fb950',\n}\nconst FALLBACK_COLORS = ['#58a6ff', '#f78166', '#d29922', '#3fb950', '#bc8cff', '#ff7b72']\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Heatmap (GitHub-style, last 365 days)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderHeatmap(dayBuckets: Record<string, number>): string {\n  const today = new Date()\n  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)\n\n  // Start from the Sunday before the week that was ~52 weeks ago\n  const startDate = new Date(today)\n  startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - 364)\n  startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - startDate.getDay())\n\n  const cellSize = 11\n  const cellGap = 3\n  const cellStep = cellSize + cellGap\n  const leftPad = 0\n  const topPad = 18 // space for day labels\n\n  // Build weeks array\n  const weeks: Array<Array<{ date: string; count: number; future: boolean }>> = []\n  const cur = new Date(startDate)\n\n  while (cur <= today || weeks.length < 53) {\n    if (weeks.length >= 53) break\n    const week: Array<{ date: string; count: number; future: boolean }> = []\n    for (let d = 0; d < 7; d++) {\n      const dateStr = toDateStr(cur)\n      const isFuture = cur > today\n      week.push({ date: dateStr, count: isFuture ? 0 : (dayBuckets[dateStr] ?? 0), future: isFuture })\n      cur.setDate(cur.getDate() + 1)\n    }\n    weeks.push(week)\n  }\n\n  const width = weeks.length * cellStep + leftPad\n  const height = 7 * cellStep + topPad + 4\n\n  const dayLabels = ['', 'Mon', '', 'Wed', '', 'Fri', '']\n  let cells = ''\n\n  for (let w = 0; w < weeks.length; w++) {\n    const week = weeks[w]\n    if (!week) continue\n    for (let d = 0; d < 7; d++) {\n      const cell = week[d]\n      if (!cell) continue\n      const x = leftPad + w * cellStep\n      const y = topPad + d * cellStep\n      const color = cell.future ? '#0d1117' : getHeatColor(cell.count)\n      const title = cell.date ? `${escHtml(cell.date)}: ${cell.count} session(s)` : ''\n      cells += `<rect x=\"${x}\" y=\"${y}\" width=\"${cellSize}\" height=\"${cellSize}\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"${color}\">`\n      if (title) cells += `<title>${title}</title>`\n      cells += `</rect>`\n    }\n  }\n\n  let labels = ''\n  for (let d = 0; d < 7; d++) {\n    const label = dayLabels[d]\n    if (!label) continue\n    const y = topPad + d * cellStep + cellSize - 1\n    labels += `<text x=\"-2\" y=\"${y}\" font-size=\"9\" fill=\"#8b949e\" text-anchor=\"end\">${label}</text>`\n  }\n\n  return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 ${width} ${height}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" aria-label=\"Activity heatmap\">\n  ${labels}\n  ${cells}\n</svg>\n<div class=\"heatmap-legend\">Less\n  ${HEATMAP_COLORS.map(c => `<svg width=\"11\" height=\"11\" viewBox=\"0 0 11 11\"><rect width=\"11\" height=\"11\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"${c}\"/></svg>`).join('')}\nMore</div>`\n}\n\nfunction getHeatColor(count: number): string {\n  if (count === 0) return HEATMAP_COLORS[0] ?? '#161b22'\n  if (count === 1) return HEATMAP_COLORS[1] ?? '#0e4429'\n  if (count <= 3) return HEATMAP_COLORS[2] ?? '#006d32'\n  if (count <= 6) return HEATMAP_COLORS[3] ?? '#26a641'\n  return HEATMAP_COLORS[4] ?? '#39d353'\n}\n\nfunction toDateStr(d: Date): string {\n  const y = d.getFullYear()\n  const m = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')\n  const day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')\n  return `${y}-${m}-${day}`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Client distribution doughnut\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderClientDoughnut(clientCounts: Record<string, number>): string {\n  const cx = 90\n  const cy = 90\n  const r = 60\n  const innerR = 38\n\n  const entries = Object.entries(clientCounts).filter(([, v]) => v > 0)\n  const total = entries.reduce((s, [, v]) => s + v, 0)\n\n  if (total === 0 || entries.length === 0) {\n    return emptyDoughnut(cx, cy, r)\n  }\n\n  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * r\n  let offset = 0\n  let segments = ''\n  const legendItems: string[] = []\n\n  entries.forEach(([client, count], i) => {\n    const fraction = count / total\n    const dashLen = fraction * circumference\n    const dashGap = circumference - dashLen\n    const color = CLIENT_COLORS[client] ?? FALLBACK_COLORS[i % FALLBACK_COLORS.length] ?? '#58a6ff'\n    segments += `<circle\n      cx=\"${cx}\" cy=\"${cy}\" r=\"${r}\"\n      fill=\"none\"\n      stroke=\"${color}\"\n      stroke-width=\"${r - innerR}\"\n      stroke-dasharray=\"${dashLen.toFixed(2)} ${dashGap.toFixed(2)}\"\n      stroke-dashoffset=\"${(-offset * circumference / 1).toFixed(2)}\"\n      transform=\"rotate(-90 ${cx} ${cy})\"\n    ><title>${escHtml(client)}: ${count} (${(fraction * 100).toFixed(0)}%)</title></circle>`\n    offset += fraction\n\n    const pct = (fraction * 100).toFixed(0)\n    legendItems.push(\n      `<tr><td><svg width=\"10\" height=\"10\" viewBox=\"0 0 10 10\"><rect width=\"10\" height=\"10\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"${color}\"/></svg></td>` +\n      `<td style=\"padding-left:6px;color:#e6edf3\">${escHtml(client)}</td>` +\n      `<td style=\"padding-left:12px;color:#8b949e;text-align:right\">${count} (${pct}%)</td></tr>`,\n    )\n    return undefined\n  })\n\n  const legendX = cx * 2 + 20\n  const width = legendX + 180\n  const height = cy * 2\n\n  return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 ${width} ${height}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" aria-label=\"Client distribution\">\n  <circle cx=\"${cx}\" cy=\"${cy}\" r=\"${r}\" fill=\"#161b22\"/>\n  ${segments}\n  <circle cx=\"${cx}\" cy=\"${cy}\" r=\"${innerR}\" fill=\"#0d1117\"/>\n  <text x=\"${cx}\" y=\"${cy - 6}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\" fill=\"#e6edf3\">${total}</text>\n  <text x=\"${cx}\" y=\"${cy + 14}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" font-size=\"10\" fill=\"#8b949e\">sessions</text>\n  <foreignObject x=\"${legendX}\" y=\"${(cy * 2 - legendItems.length * 28) / 2}\" width=\"180\" height=\"${legendItems.length * 28 + 10}\">\n    <table xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\" style=\"font-size:12px;border-collapse:collapse;font-family:sans-serif\">\n      ${legendItems.join('')}\n    </table>\n  </foreignObject>\n</svg>`\n}\n\nfunction emptyDoughnut(cx: number, cy: number, r: number): string {\n  const width = cx * 2 + 220\n  const height = cy * 2\n  return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 ${width} ${height}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <circle cx=\"${cx}\" cy=\"${cy}\" r=\"${r}\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#30363d\" stroke-width=\"22\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"${cx}\" cy=\"${cy}\" r=\"${r - 21}\" fill=\"#0d1117\"/>\n  <text x=\"${cx}\" y=\"${cy + 5}\" text-anchor=\"middle\" font-size=\"10\" fill=\"#8b949e\">No data</text>\n</svg>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Weekly messages line chart (last 52 weeks)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderWeeklyLine(weekBuckets: Record<string, number>): string {\n  const W = 580\n  const H = 140\n  const padL = 38\n  const padR = 12\n  const padT = 12\n  const padB = 24\n  const plotW = W - padL - padR\n  const plotH = H - padT - padB\n\n  // Build last 52 weeks array\n  const weeks = getLast52Weeks()\n  const data = weeks.map(w => weekBuckets[w] ?? 0)\n  const maxVal = Math.max(...data, 1)\n\n  const points = data.map((v, i) => {\n    const x = padL + (i / (data.length - 1)) * plotW\n    const y = padT + plotH - (v / maxVal) * plotH\n    return { x, y }\n  })\n\n  // Build filled area path\n  const linePoints = points.map(p => `${p.x.toFixed(1)},${p.y.toFixed(1)}`).join(' ')\n  const firstX = points[0]?.x ?? padL\n  const lastX = points[points.length - 1]?.x ?? (padL + plotW)\n  const baseY = padT + plotH\n\n  const areaPath =\n    `M${firstX.toFixed(1)},${baseY} ` +\n    points.map(p => `L${p.x.toFixed(1)},${p.y.toFixed(1)}`).join(' ') +\n    ` L${lastX.toFixed(1)},${baseY} Z`\n\n  // Y axis labels\n  const yLabels = [0, Math.round(maxVal / 2), maxVal]\n    .map(v => {\n      const y = padT + plotH - (v / maxVal) * plotH\n      return `<text x=\"${padL - 4}\" y=\"${y + 4}\" font-size=\"9\" fill=\"#8b949e\" text-anchor=\"end\">${v}</text>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  // X axis: show first and last week labels\n  const firstWeek = weeks[0] ?? ''\n  const lastWeek = weeks[weeks.length - 1] ?? ''\n  const xLabels =\n    `<text x=\"${padL}\" y=\"${H - 4}\" font-size=\"9\" fill=\"#8b949e\" text-anchor=\"start\">${escHtml(firstWeek)}</text>` +\n    `<text x=\"${W - padR}\" y=\"${H - 4}\" font-size=\"9\" fill=\"#8b949e\" text-anchor=\"end\">${escHtml(lastWeek)}</text>`\n\n  return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 ${W} ${H}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" aria-label=\"Weekly messages\">\n  <defs>\n    <linearGradient id=\"lineGrad\" x1=\"0\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"0\" y2=\"1\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#58a6ff\" stop-opacity=\"0.3\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#58a6ff\" stop-opacity=\"0.02\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n  </defs>\n  <line x1=\"${padL}\" y1=\"${padT}\" x2=\"${padL}\" y2=\"${padT + plotH}\" stroke=\"#30363d\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n  <line x1=\"${padL}\" y1=\"${padT + plotH}\" x2=\"${padL + plotW}\" y2=\"${padT + plotH}\" stroke=\"#30363d\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n  ${yLabels}\n  ${xLabels}\n  <path d=\"${areaPath}\" fill=\"url(#lineGrad)\"/>\n  <polyline points=\"${linePoints}\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#58a6ff\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n</svg>`\n}\n\nfunction getLast52Weeks(): string[] {\n  const weeks: string[] = []\n  const today = new Date()\n  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)\n  for (let i = 51; i >= 0; i--) {\n    const d = new Date(today)\n    d.setDate(d.getDate() - i * 7)\n    weeks.push(toIsoWeek(d))\n  }\n  return weeks\n}\n\nfunction toIsoWeek(d: Date): string {\n  const thursday = new Date(d)\n  thursday.setDate(d.getDate() + (4 - ((d.getDay() + 6) % 7 + 1)))\n  const year = thursday.getFullYear()\n  const jan4 = new Date(year, 0, 4)\n  const week = Math.ceil(\n    ((thursday.getTime() - jan4.getTime()) / 86400000 + jan4.getDay() + 1) / 7,\n  )\n  return `${year}-W${String(week).padStart(2, '0')}`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Top tools horizontal bar chart\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderToolBar(toolCounts: Record<string, number>): string {\n  const entries = Object.entries(toolCounts)\n    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)\n    .slice(0, 10)\n\n  if (entries.length === 0) {\n    return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 500 60\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n  <text x=\"250\" y=\"35\" text-anchor=\"middle\" font-size=\"13\" fill=\"#8b949e\">No tool data available</text>\n</svg>`\n  }\n\n  const W = 500\n  const rowH = 22\n  const rowGap = 6\n  const labelW = 130\n  const barArea = W - labelW - 60\n  const H = entries.length * (rowH + rowGap) + 10\n  const maxCount = entries[0]?.[1] ?? 1\n\n  const bars = entries\n    .map(([name, count], i) => {\n      const y = i * (rowH + rowGap) + 5\n      const barW = Math.max(2, (count / maxCount) * barArea)\n      const color = FALLBACK_COLORS[i % FALLBACK_COLORS.length] ?? '#58a6ff'\n      return (\n        `<text x=\"${labelW - 4}\" y=\"${y + rowH - 5}\" font-size=\"10\" fill=\"#8b949e\" text-anchor=\"end\">${escHtml(name)}</text>` +\n        `<rect x=\"${labelW}\" y=\"${y + 2}\" width=\"${barW.toFixed(1)}\" height=\"${rowH - 4}\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"${color}\" opacity=\"0.8\">` +\n        `<title>${escHtml(name)}: ${count}</title></rect>` +\n        `<text x=\"${labelW + barW + 4}\" y=\"${y + rowH - 5}\" font-size=\"10\" fill=\"#8b949e\">${count}</text>`\n      )\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  return `<svg viewBox=\"0 0 ${W} ${H}\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" aria-label=\"Top tools\">\n  ${bars}\n</svg>`\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/links.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Link graph construction: detects [[session_id]] / [[stem]] references\n * in clean markdown content and builds forward/backlink maps.\n */\n\nimport { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { basename, join } from 'node:path'\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { LinkGraph } from '../../types/report.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Link graph builder\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function buildLinkGraph(manifests: ManifestEntry[], root: string): LinkGraph {\n  const forwardLinks: Record<string, string[]> = {}\n  const backlinks: Record<string, string[]> = {}\n\n  // Build lookup table: various identifiers Ôćĺ canonical session_id\n  const lookup: Record<string, string> = {}\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    // Register by session_id\n    lookup[m.session_id] = m.session_id\n    // Register by artifact stem (e.g. \"019cf4b1-....__0ebaa458\")\n    const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path\n    if (cleanPath) {\n      const stem = basename(cleanPath, '.md')\n      if (stem) lookup[stem] = m.session_id\n    }\n  }\n\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    const cleanPath = resolveCleanPath(m, root)\n    if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) continue\n\n    let content: string\n    try {\n      content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')\n    } catch {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const refs = extractLinks(content)\n    for (const ref of refs) {\n      const targetId = lookup[ref]\n      if (!targetId || targetId === m.session_id) continue // skip self-refs\n\n      // Forward: m Ôćĺ target\n      const fwd = forwardLinks[m.session_id]\n      if (fwd) {\n        if (!fwd.includes(targetId)) fwd.push(targetId)\n      } else {\n        forwardLinks[m.session_id] = [targetId]\n      }\n\n      // Backlink: target ÔćÉ m\n      const back = backlinks[targetId]\n      if (back) {\n        if (!back.includes(m.session_id)) back.push(m.session_id)\n      } else {\n        backlinks[targetId] = [m.session_id]\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return { backlinks, forwardLinks }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Link extraction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Extract all [[...]] references from text. */\nexport function extractLinks(content: string): string[] {\n  const results: string[] = []\n  const re = /\\[\\[([^\\][\\n]+)\\]\\]/g\n  let match: RegExpExecArray | null\n  while ((match = re.exec(content)) !== null) {\n    const ref = match[1]?.trim()\n    if (ref && ref.length > 0) {\n      results.push(ref)\n    }\n  }\n  return results\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Path helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function resolveCleanPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {\n  if (m.repo_clean_path) {\n    return join(root, m.repo_clean_path)\n  }\n  if (m.global_clean_path) {\n    return m.global_clean_path\n  }\n  return null\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/search.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Full-text search: pre-built JSON index embedded as inline JS.\n * Vanilla JS substring search, no external library.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { SearchIndexEntry } from '../../types/report.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\n\nconst MAX_INDEX_BYTES = 50_000\nconst SNIPPET_LEN = 200\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Index construction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function buildSearchIndex(\n  manifests: ManifestEntry[],\n  getSnippet: (m: ManifestEntry) => string,\n): SearchIndexEntry[] {\n  const entries: SearchIndexEntry[] = []\n  let totalBytes = 0\n\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    let snippet = getSnippet(m).slice(0, SNIPPET_LEN)\n    const entry: SearchIndexEntry = {\n      url: transcriptUrl(m),\n      title: m.title || m.session_id,\n      client: m.client,\n      date: m.started_at.slice(0, 10),\n      snippet,\n    }\n    const entryBytes = JSON.stringify(entry).length\n    if (totalBytes + entryBytes > MAX_INDEX_BYTES) {\n      // Truncate snippet to fit within budget\n      const remaining = MAX_INDEX_BYTES - totalBytes - (entryBytes - snippet.length) - 10\n      if (remaining < 20) break\n      snippet = snippet.slice(0, remaining)\n      entry.snippet = snippet\n    }\n    totalBytes += JSON.stringify(entry).length\n    entries.push(entry)\n  }\n\n  return entries\n}\n\nfunction transcriptUrl(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const client = m.client || 'unknown'\n  // Build relative URL from search.html to transcript page\n  // search.html is at root level, transcript pages at transcripts/{client}/{stem}.html\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  const stem = cleanPath ? cleanPath.replace(/.*\\//, '').replace(/\\.md$/, '') : m.session_id\n  return `transcripts/${client}/${stem}.html`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Search page renderer\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderSearchPage(index: SearchIndexEntry[]): string {\n  const indexJson = JSON.stringify(index)\n  const nav = renderNav('search', true)\n\n  const extraHead = `<script>\nconst SEARCH_INDEX = ${indexJson};\n</script>`\n\n  const content = `\n<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Search</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">Full-text search across all imported sessions</p>\n</div>\n\n<input\n  type=\"search\"\n  id=\"search-input\"\n  class=\"search-box\"\n  placeholder=\"Search sessions, messages, and content...\"\n  autofocus\n>\n<div id=\"search-count\"></div>\n<div id=\"search-results\" class=\"search-results\"></div>\n\n<script>\n(function() {\n  const input = document.getElementById('search-input');\n  const resultsEl = document.getElementById('search-results');\n  const countEl = document.getElementById('search-count');\n\n  function highlight(text, query) {\n    if (!query) return escHtml(text);\n    const escaped = escHtml(text);\n    const escapedQuery = escHtml(query);\n    const re = new RegExp(escapedQuery.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\\\]\\\\\\\\]/g, '\\\\\\\\$&'), 'gi');\n    return escaped.replace(re, function(m) { return '<mark>' + m + '</mark>'; });\n  }\n\n  function escHtml(s) {\n    return s.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/\"/g,'&quot;');\n  }\n\n  function renderResults(query) {\n    const q = (query || '').toLowerCase().trim();\n    if (!q) {\n      resultsEl.innerHTML = '';\n      countEl.textContent = SEARCH_INDEX.length + ' session(s) indexed';\n      return;\n    }\n    const matches = SEARCH_INDEX.filter(function(e) {\n      return (e.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||\n             (e.snippet || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||\n             (e.client || '').toLowerCase().includes(q);\n    });\n    countEl.textContent = matches.length + ' result(s) for \"' + escHtml(q) + '\"';\n    resultsEl.innerHTML = matches.map(function(e) {\n      return '<div class=\"search-result\">' +\n        '<div class=\"search-result-title\"><a href=\"' + escHtml(e.url) + '\">' + highlight(e.title, query) + '</a></div>' +\n        '<div class=\"search-result-meta\"><span class=\"badge badge-' + escHtml(e.client) + '\">' + escHtml(e.client) + '</span> &nbsp; ' + escHtml(e.date) + '</div>' +\n        '<div class=\"search-result-snippet\">' + highlight(e.snippet, query) + '</div>' +\n        '</div>';\n    }).join('');\n  }\n\n  renderResults('');\n  input.addEventListener('input', function() { renderResults(input.value); });\n})();\n</script>`\n\n  return htmlShell('Search', content, nav, extraHead)\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/dashboard.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Dashboard page renderer: stat cards + SVG charts + recent sessions.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport type { ReportStats } from '../../types/report.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\nimport { renderHeatmap, renderClientDoughnut, renderWeeklyLine, renderToolBar } from './charts.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Dashboard\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderDashboard(stats: ReportStats, manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('dashboard', true)\n  const content = [\n    renderPageHeader(stats),\n    renderStatsCards(stats),\n    renderCharts(stats),\n    renderRecentSessions(manifests),\n  ].join('\\n')\n\n  return htmlShell('Dashboard', content, nav)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Internal renderers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction renderPageHeader(stats: ReportStats): string {\n  const from = stats.dateRange.from.slice(0, 10) || 'ÔÇö'\n  const to = stats.dateRange.to.slice(0, 10) || 'ÔÇö'\n  return `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Memory Dashboard</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">Activity from ${escHtml(from)} to ${escHtml(to)}</p>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderStatsCards(stats: ReportStats): string {\n  const cards = [\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalSessions), label: 'Sessions' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalMessages), label: 'Messages' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.totalToolEvents), label: 'Tool Events' },\n    { value: fmtNum(stats.activeDays), label: 'Active Days' },\n  ]\n\n  const html = cards\n    .map(\n      c => `<div class=\"card\">\n  <div class=\"card-title\">${c.label}</div>\n  <div class=\"stat-value\">${c.value}</div>\n</div>`,\n    )\n    .join('')\n\n  return `<div class=\"stats-grid\">${html}</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderCharts(stats: ReportStats): string {\n  const heatmap = renderHeatmap(stats.dayBuckets)\n  const doughnut = renderClientDoughnut(stats.clientCounts)\n  const line = renderWeeklyLine(stats.weekBuckets)\n  const bar = renderToolBar(stats.toolCounts)\n\n  return `<div class=\"chart-grid\">\n  <div class=\"chart-card full-width\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Activity (last 365 days)</div>\n    ${heatmap}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Client Distribution</div>\n    ${doughnut}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Messages / Week (last 52 weeks)</div>\n    ${line}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"chart-card full-width\">\n    <div class=\"chart-title\">Top 10 Tools</div>\n    ${bar}\n  </div>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderRecentSessions(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {\n  const recent = [...manifests]\n    .sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))\n    .slice(0, 10)\n\n  if (recent.length === 0) {\n    return `<div class=\"card\"><p style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">No sessions imported yet.</p></div>`\n  }\n\n  const rows = recent\n    .map(m => {\n      const url = transcriptHref(m)\n      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n      const msgs = m.message_count\n      const tools = m.tool_event_count\n      return `<tr>\n  <td>${badge}</td>\n  <td><a href=\"${escHtml(url)}\">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">${escHtml(date)}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right\">${msgs}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);text-align:right\">${tools}</td>\n</tr>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  return `<h2>Recent Sessions</h2>\n<div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:0;overflow:hidden\">\n<table>\n<thead><tr>\n  <th>Client</th><th>Title</th><th>Date</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">Msgs</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">Tools</th>\n</tr></thead>\n<tbody>${rows}</tbody>\n</table>\n</div>`\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction fmtNum(n: number): string {\n  return n.toLocaleString('en-US')\n}\n\nfunction transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  const stem = cleanPath ? cleanPath.replace(/.*\\//, '').replace(/\\.md$/, '') : m.session_id\n  return `transcripts/${m.client}/${stem}.html`\n}\n\nexport function clientBadge(client: string): string {\n  return `<span class=\"badge badge-${escHtml(client)}\">${escHtml(client)}</span>`\n}\n"
}

  "content": "/**\n * Session list page: tabular index of all imported transcripts.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\nimport { clientBadge } from './dashboard.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Transcript list\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderTranscriptList(manifests: ManifestEntry[]): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false)\n\n  const sorted = [...manifests].sort((a, b) => b.started_at.localeCompare(a.started_at))\n\n  if (sorted.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Sessions</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No sessions imported yet.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell('Sessions', content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const rows = sorted\n    .map(m => {\n      const url = transcriptHref(m)\n      const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n      const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 16)\n      const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n      return `<tr>\n  <td>${badge}</td>\n  <td><a href=\"${escHtml(url)}\">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td>\n  <td style=\"color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.8rem\">${escHtml(m.session_id.slice(0, 8))}</td>\n  <td style=\"text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)\">${m.message_count}</td>\n  <td style=\"text-align:right;color:var(--text-muted)\">${m.tool_event_count}</td>\n</tr>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Sessions</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${sorted.length} session(s) imported</p>\n</div>\n<div class=\"card\" style=\"padding:0;overflow:hidden\">\n<table>\n<thead><tr>\n  <th>Client</th>\n  <th>Title</th>\n  <th>Date</th>\n  <th>ID</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">Msgs</th>\n  <th style=\"text-align:right\">Tools</th>\n</tr></thead>\n<tbody>${rows}</tbody>\n</table>\n</div>`\n\n  return htmlShell('Sessions', content, nav)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helper\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  const stem = cleanPath ? cleanPath.replace(/.*\\//, '').replace(/\\.md$/, '') : m.session_id\n  return `${m.client}/${stem}.html`\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/transcript.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Individual transcript page: metadata, AI summary, backlinks, messages.\n */\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../../types/transcript.js'\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\nimport { clientBadge } from './dashboard.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Parsed message for rendering\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface RenderedMessage {\n  role: string\n  timestamp: string\n  text: string\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Transcript page\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function renderTranscript(\n  messages: RenderedMessage[],\n  manifest: ManifestEntry,\n  summary: string,\n  backlinks: ManifestEntry[],\n): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('transcripts', false)\n\n  const content = [\n    renderHeader(manifest),\n    summary ? renderSummaryCard(summary) : '',\n    backlinks.length > 0 ? renderBacklinks(backlinks) : '',\n    renderMessages(messages),\n  ]\n    .filter(Boolean)\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const title = manifest.title || manifest.session_id\n  return htmlShell(title, content, nav)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Sub-renderers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction renderHeader(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const badge = clientBadge(m.client)\n  const date = m.started_at.slice(0, 10)\n  const time = m.started_at.slice(11, 19)\n\n  return `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</h1>\n</div>\n<table class=\"meta-table card\">\n<tbody>\n  <tr><td>Client</td><td>${badge}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Date</td><td>${escHtml(date)} ${escHtml(time)}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Session ID</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.session_id)}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Messages</td><td>${m.message_count}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Tool Events</td><td>${m.tool_event_count}</td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Branch</td><td><code>${escHtml(m.branch || 'ÔÇö')}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>Working Dir</td><td><code style=\"font-size:0.8rem\">${escHtml(m.cwd || 'ÔÇö')}</code></td></tr>\n  <tr><td>SHA256</td><td><code style=\"font-size:0.75rem\">${escHtml(m.raw_sha256.slice(0, 16))}ÔÇŽ</code></td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>`\n}\n\nfunction renderSummaryCard(summary: string): string {\n  return `<div class=\"summary-card\">\n  <div class=\"summary-label\">AI Summary</div>\n  <div>${escHtml(summary)}</div>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderBacklinks(backlinks: ManifestEntry[]): string {\n  const items = backlinks\n    .map(m => {\n      const url = transcriptHref(m)\n      return `<li><a href=\"${escHtml(url)}\">${escHtml(m.title || m.session_id)}</a></li>`\n    })\n    .join('')\n  return `<div class=\"backlinks\">\n  <div class=\"backlinks-title\">Referenced by ${backlinks.length} session(s)</div>\n  <ul>${items}</ul>\n</div>`\n}\n\nfunction renderMessages(messages: RenderedMessage[]): string {\n  if (messages.length === 0) {\n    return `<div class=\"card\" style=\"color:var(--text-muted)\">No messages available for this session.</div>`\n  }\n\n  const rendered = messages\n    .map(msg => {\n      const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'message-user' : 'message-assistant'\n      const ts = msg.timestamp ? `<span style=\"margin-left:auto\">${escHtml(msg.timestamp.slice(11, 19))}</span>` : ''\n      const body = renderMessageBody(msg.text)\n      return `<div class=\"message ${roleClass}\">\n  <div class=\"message-header\">\n    <span class=\"message-role\">${escHtml(msg.role)}</span>${ts}\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"message-body\">${body}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  return `<h2 style=\"margin-top:1.5rem\">Messages</h2>\n<div class=\"messages\">${rendered}</div>`\n}\n\n/**\n * Render message text to HTML with code block support.\n * Input text is plain text from clean markdown.\n */\nfunction renderMessageBody(text: string): string {\n  // Process code blocks first (they contain preformatted content)\n  const parts: string[] = []\n  const codeBlockRe = /```[\\w]*\\n?([\\s\\S]*?)```/g\n  let lastIndex = 0\n  let match: RegExpExecArray | null\n\n  while ((match = codeBlockRe.exec(text)) !== null) {\n    if (match.index > lastIndex) {\n      parts.push(renderInlineText(text.slice(lastIndex, match.index)))\n    }\n    const code = match[1] ?? ''\n    parts.push(`<pre><code>${escHtml(code)}</code></pre>`)\n    lastIndex = match.index + match[0].length\n  }\n\n  if (lastIndex < text.length) {\n    parts.push(renderInlineText(text.slice(lastIndex)))\n  }\n\n  return parts.join('')\n}\n\n/** Render inline text (paragraphs + inline formatting). */\nfunction renderInlineText(text: string): string {\n  const paragraphs = text.split(/\\n{2,}/).filter(p => p.trim())\n  return paragraphs\n    .map(p => `<p>${applyInlineMarkdown(escHtml(p.trim()))}</p>`)\n    .join('')\n}\n\n/** Apply inline markdown to already-HTML-escaped text. */\nfunction applyInlineMarkdown(html: string): string {\n  return html\n    .replace(/\\*\\*(.+?)\\*\\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')\n    .replace(/\\*(.+?)\\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')\n    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')\n    .replace(/\\n/g, '<br>')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helper\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction transcriptHref(m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  const stem = cleanPath ? cleanPath.replace(/.*\\//, '').replace(/\\.md$/, '') : m.session_id\n  // From within a client subdir, go up one to sibling or up two for different client\n  return `../${m.client}/${stem}.html`\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/knowledge.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Knowledge page: renders markdown files from Memory/04_knowledge/.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Knowledge page\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface KnowledgeFile {\n  filename: string\n  title: string\n  content: string\n}\n\nexport function renderKnowledge(files: KnowledgeFile[]): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('knowledge', false)\n\n  const subtitle = `${files.length} knowledge file(s)`\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Knowledge</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No knowledge files found in Memory/04_knowledge/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell('Knowledge', content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugify(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Knowledge</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${subtitle}</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell('Knowledge', content, nav)\n}\n\nfunction slugify(name: string): string {\n  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/goals.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Goals page: renders markdown files from Memory/01_goals/.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml, htmlShell, renderNav } from './layout.js'\nimport { markdownToHtml } from './markdown.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Goals page\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface GoalFile {\n  filename: string\n  title: string\n  content: string\n}\n\nexport function renderGoals(files: GoalFile[]): string {\n  const nav = renderNav('goals', false)\n\n  if (files.length === 0) {\n    const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Goals</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">No goal files found in Memory/01_goals/.</p>\n</div>`\n    return htmlShell('Goals', content, nav)\n  }\n\n  const sections = files\n    .map(f => {\n      const htmlContent = markdownToHtml(f.content)\n      return `<div class=\"card\" id=\"${escHtml(slugify(f.filename))}\">\n  <h2>${escHtml(f.title)}</h2>\n  <p style=\"font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:1rem\">${escHtml(f.filename)}</p>\n  <div class=\"markdown-body\">${htmlContent}</div>\n</div>`\n    })\n    .join('\\n')\n\n  const content = `<div class=\"page-header\">\n  <h1>Goals</h1>\n  <p class=\"subtitle\">${files.length} goal file(s)</p>\n</div>\n${sections}`\n\n  return htmlShell('Goals', content, nav)\n}\n\nfunction slugify(name: string): string {\n  return name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')\n}\n"
}

Write input={"content":"/**\n * Minimal Markdown Ôćĺ HTML converter.\n * Handles: headings, bold, italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, lists.\n * All content is HTML-escaped before applyi...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/markdown.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Minimal Markdown Ôćĺ HTML converter.\n * Handles: headings, bold, italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, lists.\n * All content is HTML-escaped before applying structural tags.\n */\n\nimport { escHtml } from './layout.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main converter\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function markdownToHtml(md: string): string {\n  const lines = md.split('\\n')\n  const output: string[] = []\n  let i = 0\n  let inList = false\n  let listType: 'ul' | 'ol' | null = null\n\n  function closeList() {\n    if (inList) {\n      output.push(listType === 'ol' ? '</ol>' : '</ul>')\n      inList = false\n      listType = null\n    }\n  }\n\n  while (i < lines.length) {\n    const line = lines[i] ?? ''\n\n    // Fenced code block\n    if (line.startsWith('```')) {\n      closeList()\n      const lang = line.slice(3).trim()\n      const codeLines: string[] = []\n      i++\n      while (i < lines.length && !(lines[i] ?? '').startsWith('```')) {\n        codeLines.push(lines[i] ?? '')\n        i++\n      }\n      output.push(`<pre><code${lang ? ` class=\"language-${escHtml(lang)}\"` : ''}>${escHtml(codeLines.join('\\n'))}</code></pre>`)\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // YAML front matter (skip)\n    if (i === 0 && line === '---') {\n      i++\n      while (i < lines.length && (lines[i] ?? '') !== '---') i++\n      i++ // skip closing ---\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Headings\n    const headingMatch = line.match(/^(#{1,6})\\s+(.*)$/)\n    if (headingMatch) {\n      closeList()\n      const level = headingMatch[1]?.length ?? 1\n      const text = headingMatch[2] ?? ''\n      output.push(`<h${level}>${applyInline(text)}</h${level}>`)\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Horizontal rule\n    if (/^---+$/.test(line.trim())) {\n      closeList()\n      output.push('<hr>')\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Ordered list\n    const olMatch = line.match(/^(\\s*)\\d+\\.\\s+(.+)$/)\n    if (olMatch) {\n      if (!inList || listType !== 'ol') {\n        closeList()\n        output.push('<ol>')\n        inList = true\n        listType = 'ol'\n      }\n      output.push(`<li>${applyInline(olMatch[2] ?? '')}</li>`)\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Unordered list\n    const ulMatch = line.match(/^(\\s*)[-*+]\\s+(.+)$/)\n    if (ulMatch) {\n      if (!inList || listType !== 'ul') {\n        closeList()\n        output.push('<ul>')\n        inList = true\n        listType = 'ul'\n      }\n      output.push(`<li>${applyInline(ulMatch[2] ?? '')}</li>`)\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Blank line\n    if (!line.trim()) {\n      closeList()\n      i++\n      continue\n    }\n\n    // Paragraph\n    closeList()\n    output.push(`<p>${applyInline(line)}</p>`)\n    i++\n  }\n\n  closeList()\n  return output.join('\\n')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Inline formatting\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction applyInline(text: string): string {\n  const escaped = escHtml(text)\n  return escaped\n    .replace(/\\*\\*(.+?)\\*\\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')\n    .replace(/\\*(.+?)\\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')\n    .replace(/__(.+?)__/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')\n    .replace(/_(.+?)_/g, '<em>$1</em>')\n    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')\n    .replace(/\\[([^\\]]+)\\]\\(([^)]+)\\)/g, (_, label: string, href: string) => {\n      return `<a href=\"${escHtml(href)}\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\">${label}</a>`\n    })\n}\n"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/summarize.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * AI summary generation with SHA256-based caching.\n * Falls back gracefully when API key is absent or SDK is missing.\n */\n\nimport { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\n\nimport type { SummaryCache } from '../types/report.js'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Types\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface SummaryMessage {\n  role: string\n  text: string\n}\n\nexport interface SummaryOptions {\n  cacheDir: string\n  noAi: boolean\n  model: string\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Semaphore (max 5 concurrent AI calls)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nlet activeCalls = 0\nconst MAX_CONCURRENT = 5\n\nasync function withSemaphore<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {\n  while (activeCalls >= MAX_CONCURRENT) {\n    await new Promise<void>(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100))\n  }\n  activeCalls++\n  try {\n    return await fn()\n  } finally {\n    activeCalls--\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main entry point\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport async function getSummary(\n  sha256: string,\n  messages: SummaryMessage[],\n  options: SummaryOptions,\n): Promise<string> {\n  // Check cache\n  const cached = readCache(sha256, options.cacheDir)\n  if (cached !== null) {\n    return cached\n  }\n\n  if (options.noAi) return ''\n\n  const apiKey = process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY']\n  if (!apiKey) return ''\n\n  return withSemaphore(() => callApi(sha256, messages, options))\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// API call\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nasync function callApi(\n  sha256: string,\n  messages: SummaryMessage[],\n  options: SummaryOptions,\n): Promise<string> {\n  try {\n    // Dynamic import so the build never fails if @anthropic-ai/sdk is absent\n    const { default: Anthropic } = await (import('@anthropic-ai/sdk') as Promise<{ default: typeof import('@anthropic-ai/sdk').default }>)\n\n    const client = new Anthropic()\n    const prompt = buildSummaryPrompt(messages)\n\n    const response = await client.messages.create({\n      model: options.model,\n      max_tokens: 200,\n      system:\n        'Summarize in 2-3 sentences. What was accomplished? What problems were solved? Be specific. Use past tense.',\n      messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],\n    })\n\n    const block = response.content[0]\n    const text = block && block.type === 'text' ? block.text : ''\n    if (text) {\n      writeCache(sha256, text, options.cacheDir)\n    }\n    return text\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    // MODULE_NOT_FOUND or any API error ÔÇö never crash the build\n    const code = (err as NodeJS.ErrnoException).code\n    if (code !== 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND') {\n      console.warn(`[summarize] API call failed: ${String(err)}`)\n    }\n    return ''\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Prompt construction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** First 30 messages, each truncated to 500 chars. */\nexport function buildSummaryPrompt(messages: SummaryMessage[]): string {\n  const slice = messages.slice(0, 30)\n  const lines = slice.map(m => {\n    const text = m.text.slice(0, 500)\n    return `${m.role.toUpperCase()}: ${text}`\n  })\n  return lines.join('\\n\\n')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Cache read / write\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function readCache(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string | null {\n  const path = cachePath(sha256, cacheDir)\n  if (!existsSync(path)) return null\n  try {\n    const raw = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')\n    const entry = JSON.parse(raw) as SummaryCache\n    return entry.summary ?? null\n  } catch {\n    return null\n  }\n}\n\nexport function writeCache(sha256: string, summary: string, cacheDir: string): void {\n  try {\n    mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })\n    const entry: SummaryCache = {\n      sha256,\n      summary,\n      generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n    }\n    writeFileSync(cachePath(sha256, cacheDir), JSON.stringify(entry, null, 2) + '\\n', 'utf-8')\n  } catch {\n    // Never crash on cache write failure\n  }\n}\n\nfunction cachePath(sha256: string, cacheDir: string): string {\n  return join(cacheDir, `${sha256}.json`)\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Report build orchestrator.\n * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.\n */\n\nimport {\n  existsSync,\n  mkdirSync,\n  readdirSync,\n  readFileSync,\n  writeFileSync,\n  appendFileSync,\n} from 'node:fs'\nimport { basename, dirname, join, relative } from 'node:path'\n\nimport type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'\nimport { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'\nimport { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'\nimport { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'\nimport { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'\nimport type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'\nimport { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'\nimport type { KnowledgeFile } from './render/knowledge.js'\nimport { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'\nimport type { GoalFile } from './render/goals.js'\nimport { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'\nimport { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'\nimport { getSummary } from './summarize.js'\nimport type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'\n\nconst DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Main entry point\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {\n  const { root, output } = options\n  const noAi = options.noAi ?? false\n  const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL\n  const cacheDir = join(output, '.cache')\n\n  // Ensure output dirs exist\n  mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })\n  mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })\n  mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })\n\n  // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored\n  ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')\n\n  // Load all manifests\n  const manifests = loadManifests(root)\n\n  // Build link graph from clean markdown\n  const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)\n\n  // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts\n  let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}\n\n  // Summary options\n  const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }\n\n  // Process each transcript: parse Ôćĺ summarize Ôćĺ render Ôćĺ write Ôćĺ discard\n  const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}\n  const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []\n\n  for (const m of manifests) {\n    const messages = parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)\n\n    // Tool events from parsed transcript (try raw path)\n    const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)\n    if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {\n      try {\n        const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)\n        const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)\n        toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)\n      } catch {\n        // Skip if raw parsing fails\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Search snippet from first message text\n    const firstMsg = messages[0]\n    snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : ''\n\n    // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)\n    const manifest = m\n    const msgs = messages\n    summaryPromises.push(\n      (async () => {\n        const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)\n        const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []\n        const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds\n          .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))\n          .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)\n\n        const html = renderTranscript(msgs, manifest, summary, backlinkManifests)\n        const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)\n        mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })\n        writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')\n      })(),\n    )\n  }\n\n  // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)\n  await Promise.all(summaryPromises)\n\n  // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts\n  const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)\n\n  // Dashboard\n  writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests), 'utf-8')\n\n  // Session list\n  writeFileSync(\n    join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),\n    renderTranscriptList(manifests),\n    'utf-8',\n  )\n\n  // Goals page\n  const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))\n  writeFileSync(\n    join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),\n    renderGoals(goalFiles),\n    'utf-8',\n  )\n\n  // Knowledge page\n  const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))\n  writeFileSync(\n    join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),\n    renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles),\n    'utf-8',\n  )\n\n  // Search\n  const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(manifests, m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '')\n  writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex), 'utf-8')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Manifest loading\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {\n  const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')\n  if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []\n\n  const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []\n  loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)\n  return manifests\n}\n\nfunction loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {\n  let entries: string[]\n  try {\n    entries = readdirSync(dir)\n  } catch {\n    return\n  }\n\n  for (const entry of entries) {\n    const fullPath = join(dir, entry)\n    if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {\n      try {\n        const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')\n        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as ManifestEntry\n        if (parsed.session_id && parsed.client) {\n          out.push(parsed)\n        }\n      } catch {\n        // Skip malformed manifests\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Recurse into subdirectories\n      loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Clean markdown message parsing\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */\nexport function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path\n    ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path)\n    : m.global_clean_path\n  if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []\n\n  let content: string\n  try {\n    content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  }\n\n  return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)\n}\n\n/** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */\nexport function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {\n  const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []\n\n  // Find ## Messages section\n  const msgSection = content.indexOf('\\n## Messages')\n  if (msgSection === -1) return []\n\n  const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after \"## Messages\\n\"\n\n  // Split on ### N. role headers\n  const msgRe = /^### \\d+\\.\\s+(\\w+)/gm\n  let match: RegExpExecArray | null\n  const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []\n\n  while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {\n    starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })\n  }\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {\n    const start = starts[i]\n    if (!start) continue\n    const nextStart = starts[i + 1]\n    const chunk = nextStart\n      ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)\n      : body.slice(start.index)\n\n    const lines = chunk.split('\\n')\n    // First line is the header, second may be timestamp\n    let timestamp = ''\n    const textLines: string[] = []\n    let pastHeader = false\n\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {\n        pastHeader = true\n        continue\n      }\n      if (!pastHeader) continue\n      const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\\s*`([^`]+)`/)\n      if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {\n        timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''\n        continue\n      }\n      textLines.push(line)\n    }\n\n    // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text\n    const text = textLines.join('\\n').trim()\n    if (text || timestamp) {\n      messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })\n    }\n  }\n\n  return messages\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Raw transcript tool extraction\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */\nfunction extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {\n  const summaries: string[] = []\n  let content: string\n  try {\n    content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  }\n\n  for (const line of content.split('\\n')) {\n    const trimmed = line.trim()\n    if (!trimmed) continue\n    try {\n      const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>\n      // Codex: function_call type\n      const type = record['type'] as string | undefined\n      if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {\n        const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type\n        summaries.push(name)\n        continue\n      }\n      // Claude: tool_use content blocks\n      const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined\n      const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined\n      if (Array.isArray(content2)) {\n        for (const block of content2) {\n          if (\n            block !== null &&\n            typeof block === 'object' &&\n            (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'\n          ) {\n            const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'\n            summaries.push(name)\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Skip malformed lines\n    }\n  }\n\n  return summaries\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Output path helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {\n  const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''\n  const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id\n  return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)\n}\n\nfunction resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {\n  if (m.repo_raw_path) {\n    return join(root, m.repo_raw_path)\n  }\n  if (m.global_raw_path) {\n    return m.global_raw_path\n  }\n  return null\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {\n  if (!existsSync(dir)) return []\n\n  let entries: string[]\n  try {\n    entries = readdirSync(dir)\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  }\n\n  return entries\n    .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))\n    .sort()\n    .map(filename => {\n      const fullPath = join(dir, filename)\n      let content = ''\n      try {\n        content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')\n      } catch {\n        // empty\n      }\n      const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')\n      return { filename, title, content }\n    })\n}\n\nfunction extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {\n  const match = content.match(/^#\\s+(.+)$/m)\n  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// .gitignore management\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {\n  const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')\n  let existing = ''\n  if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {\n    try {\n      existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')\n    } catch {\n      return\n    }\n  }\n  // Check if already present (normalize line endings)\n  const lines = existing.replace(/\\r\\n/g, '\\n').split('\\n')\n  if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return\n\n  // Append with trailing newline\n  const append = existing.endsWith('\\n') ? entry + '\\n' : '\\n' + entry + '\\n'\n  try {\n    appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')\n  } catch {\n    // Best-effort\n  }\n}\n"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-report.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`.\n */\n\nimport { createServer } from 'node:http'\nimport { createReadStream, existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { extname, join, resolve } from 'node:path'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Build command\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface CmdReportBuildOptions {\n  root: string\n  output: string\n  noAi: boolean\n  model: string\n}\n\nexport async function cmdReportBuild(opts: CmdReportBuildOptions): Promise<number> {\n  const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')\n  try {\n    await buildReport({\n      root: resolve(opts.root),\n      output: resolve(opts.output),\n      noAi: opts.noAi,\n      model: opts.model,\n      pdf: false,\n    })\n    console.log(`Report generated at: ${resolve(opts.output)}`)\n    console.log(`Open: ${join(resolve(opts.output), 'index.html')}`)\n    return 0\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    console.error(`Report build failed: ${String(err)}`)\n    return 1\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Serve command\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface CmdReportServeOptions {\n  dir: string\n  port: number\n}\n\nexport function cmdReportServe(opts: CmdReportServeOptions): number {\n  const root = resolve(opts.dir)\n  const port = opts.port\n\n  const MIME: Record<string, string> = {\n    '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',\n    '.css': 'text/css',\n    '.js': 'application/javascript',\n    '.json': 'application/json',\n    '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',\n    '.ico': 'image/x-icon',\n  }\n\n  const server = createServer((req, res) => {\n    const urlPath = (req.url ?? '/').split('?')[0] ?? '/'\n    const safePath = urlPath.replace(/\\.\\./g, '')\n    let filePath = join(root, safePath)\n\n    // Serve index.html for directory requests\n    if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {\n      filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')\n    }\n\n    if (!existsSync(filePath)) {\n      res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })\n      res.end('Not found')\n      return\n    }\n\n    const ext = extname(filePath)\n    const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'\n    res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })\n    createReadStream(filePath).pipe(res)\n  })\n\n  server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {\n    if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {\n      console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)\n      process.exit(1)\n    }\n    console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)\n    process.exit(1)\n  })\n\n  server.listen(port, () => {\n    console.log(`Serving ${root}`)\n    console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)\n    console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')\n  })\n\n  return 0\n}\n"
}

  "new_string": "// ÔöÇÔöÇ report ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\n\nconst report = program\n  .command('report')\n  .description('Generate or serve the MemoryTree HTML report website')\n\nreport\n  .command('build')\n  .description('Build a self-contained HTML report website from Memory/')\n  .option('--root <path>', 'Repository root (must contain Memory/)', '.')\n  .option(\n    '--output <path>',\n    'Output directory (default: <root>/Memory/07_reports)',\n    '',\n  )\n  .option('--no-ai', 'Disable AI-generated session summaries')\n  .option(\n    '--model <model>',\n    'Claude model for AI summaries',\n    'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',\n  )\n  .action(async (opts) => {\n    const { cmdReportBuild } = await import('./cmd-report.js')\n    const root = opts.root as string\n    const rawOutput = opts.output as string\n    const output = rawOutput || `${root}/Memory/07_reports`\n    // Commander's --no-ai sets opts.ai = false\n    const noAi = opts.ai === false\n    process.exitCode = await cmdReportBuild({\n      root,\n      output,\n      noAi,\n      model: opts.model as string,\n    })\n  })\n\nreport\n  .command('serve')\n  .description('Serve the generated report website on a local HTTP server')\n  .option(\n    '--dir <path>',\n    'Report directory to serve (default: ./Memory/07_reports)',\n    './Memory/07_reports',\n  )\n  .option('--port <n>', 'Port to listen on', '4321')\n  .action(async (opts) => {\n    const { cmdReportServe } = await import('./cmd-report.js')\n    process.exitCode = cmdReportServe({\n      dir: opts.dir as string,\n      port: parseInt(opts.port as string, 10) || 4321,\n    })\n  })\n\n// ÔöÇÔöÇ daemon   "new_string": "  let generateReport = raw['generate_report']\n  if (typeof generateReport !== 'boolean') {\n    generateReport = DEFAULT_GENERATE_REPORT\n  }\n\n  let aiSummaryModel = raw['ai_summary_model']\n  if (typeof aiSummaryModel !== 'string' || !aiSummaryModel) {\n    aiSummaryModel = DEFAULT_AI_SUMMARY_MODEL\n  }\n\n  return {\n    heartbeat_interval: interval as string,\n    watch_dirs: watchDirs,\n    projects,\n    auto_push: autoPush as boolean,\n    log_level: logLevel as string,\n    generate_report: generateReport as boolean,\n    ai_summary_model: aiSummaryModel as string,\n  }\n}"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts",
  "old_string": "  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)\n  gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, importedCount)\n}",
  "new_string": "  logger.info(`[${projectName}] Imported ${importedCount} transcript(s).`)\n  gitCommitAndPush(config, projectPath, projectName, importedCount)\n\n  if (config.generate_report) {\n    try {\n      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')\n      await buildReport({\n        root: projectPath,\n        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),\n        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],\n        model: config.ai_summary_model,\n        pdf: false,\n      })\n      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)\n    } catch (err: unknown) {\n      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)\n      // Never propagate ÔÇö report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle\n    }\n  }\n}"
}
