Tool Result #396 WebFetch toolu_015A6jdxdACT4AwYdoh4oS2A 11:16:21
WebFetch output=# Quartz 4 Feature List Based on the provided content, here are the **27 features** listed: ## Core Features - **Citations** - Reference management support - **Docker Support** ...
Show output payload 
# Quartz 4 Feature List

Based on the provided content, here are the **27 features** listed:

## Core Features
- **Citations** - Reference management support
- **Docker Support** - Containerized deployment
- **LaTeX** - Mathematical notation rendering
- **Mermaid Diagrams** - Interactive flowchart visualization
- **Obsidian Compatibility** - Import from Obsidian notes
- **OxHugo Compatibility** - Hugo integration support
- **Roam Research Compatibility** - Data import capability
- **Wikilinks** - Internal note linking

## Search & Discovery
- **Full-text Search** - Content indexing and retrieval
- **Graph View** - Visual knowledge network mapping
- **Backlinks** - Reverse link tracking
- **Folder and Tag Listings** - Organized content browsing

## Navigation & UI
- **Breadcrumbs** - Hierarchical path display
- **Explorer** - File tree navigation
- **Table of Contents** - Page section navigation
- **Popover Previews** - Link hover previews
- **Reader Mode** - Distraction-free reading

## Content Features
- **Callouts** - Highlighted message blocks
- **Syntax Highlighting** - Code formatting
- **Comments** - Reader annotations

## Accessibility & Theming
- **Darkmode** - Theme switching
- **Internationalization (i18n)** - Multi-language support

## Distribution
- **RSS Feed** - Content syndication
- **Social Media Preview Cards** - Link metadata
- **Private Pages** - Access control
- **SPA Routing** - Client-side navigation

**Note:** The provided content lists features but lacks detailed specifications for reading time, transclusions, aliases, sitemap, and 404 customization.

### Heartbeat ň«îŠłÉňÉÄŔç¬ňŐĘÚÇÜščą

heartbeat ŠÁüšĘő´╝łŠľ░ňó×ŠşąÚ¬Ą´╝ë´╝Ü

1. importTranscript()          ÔćÉ ňĚ▓Šťë
2. gitCommitAndPush()          ÔćÉ ňĚ▓Šťë
3. buildReport()               ÔćÉ Šľ░ňŐášÜä
4. deployToGhPages()           ÔćÉ ńŞÇŠťčŠľ░ňó×
5. notifyWebhook()             ÔćÉ ńŞÇŠťčŠľ░ňó×
   Ôćô

Entered plan mode. You should now focus on exploring the codebase and designing an implementation approach.

In plan mode, you should:
1. Thoroughly explore the codebase to understand existing patterns
2. Identify similar features and architectural approaches
3. Consider multiple approaches and their trade-offs
4. Use AskUserQuestion if you need to clarify the approach
5. Design a concrete implementation strategy
6. When ready, use ExitPlanMode to present your plan for approval

Remember: DO NOT write or edit any files yet. This is a read-only exploration and planning phase.

{
  "description": "Explore current report codebase structure",
  "subagent_type": "Explore",
  "prompt": "Explore the memorytree-workflow skill at C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/. I need a comprehensive inventory of:\n\n1. All files under src/report/ and src/types/report.ts - list every file with its exports\n2. The current CSS in src/report/render/css.ts - what CSS variables exist, what component classes exist\n3. The layout.ts file - what helpers exist (htmlShell, renderNav, escHtml, etc.)\n4. The build.ts orchestrator - what are the main steps, what data structures are passed around\n5. The config.ts - what Config fields exist, especially projects and watch_dirs\n6. The manifest structure from src/types/transcript.ts - what fields are on ManifestEntry (especially cwd, client, session_id, started_at, title, message_count, tool_event_count, branch, raw_sha256, repo_clean_path, global_clean_path)\n7. The stats.ts - what does computeStats() return, what is ReportStats\n8. The heartbeat.ts - where buildReport() is called\n\nBe thorough and specific - I'm planning a major upgrade of the report system (sidebar nav, dark/light mode, i18n, graph view, GitHub Pages deploy, webhook notifications, responsive design, per-client and per-project pages). I need to know exactly what exists before designing what to add."
}
Tool Call #408 Agent toolu_01QBqtgAqDkgoGYTM1JeQQd4 12:16:13
Agent input={"description":"Explore Quartz features and D3 force graph patterns","prompt":"I'm building a knowledge graph visualization for a TypeScript static site generator (similar to Qu...
Show input payload 
{
  "description": "Explore Quartz features and D3 force graph patterns",
  "subagent_type": "Explore",
  "prompt": "I'm building a knowledge graph visualization for a TypeScript static site generator (similar to Quartz by jackyzha0). I need to understand how to implement a force-directed knowledge graph WITHOUT any external npm dependencies (everything must be inline in the HTML output).\n\nPlease search the web and find:\n1. How Quartz implements its graph view - specifically what library/approach it uses (D3? custom?)\n2. The minimum D3.js code needed for a force-directed graph (just the force simulation part, not the full library) - approximately how many KB?\n3. Alternative: can we implement a simple force-directed graph in pure vanilla JS + SVG without D3? What would that look like for ~100-500 nodes?\n4. What is the typical data format for a knowledge graph (nodes + edges JSON)?\n5. How does Quartz implement popover previews on hover - pure CSS or JS?\n\nAlso look at:\n- src/report/render/links.ts at C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow - what link graph data is already built\n- src/report/render/search.ts - how the inline JS search is currently embedded\n\nGoal: design the simplest possible self-contained graph view that works from file:// and GitHub Pages with no CDN dependencies."
}
Tool Result #409 Agent toolu_01DkVTeML2o4yhfiJuW1eueU 12:19:01

[
  {
    "text": "Perfect! Now let me compile a comprehensive inventory based on my exploration:\n\n## Comprehensive Inventory: MemoryTree Report System\n\nBased on my thorough exploration of `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/`, here is a detailed breakdown of the current report generation system:\n\n---\n\n### 1. FILES UNDER `src/report/` - Complete Directory Structure\n\n**Main orchestrator:**\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts` - Report build orchestrator (394 lines)\n\n**Render module (src/report/render/):**\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/css.ts` - GitHub Dark CSS (346 lines)\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/layout.ts` - HTML helpers (138 lines)\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/dashboard.ts` - Dashboard page\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/transcript-list.ts` - Session list page\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/transcript.ts` - Individual transcript pages\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/charts.ts` - SVG chart renderers\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/search.ts` - Full-text search page\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/knowledge.ts` - Knowledge page (Memory/04_knowledge/)\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/goals.ts` - Goals page (Memory/01_goals/)\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/markdown.ts` - Markdown to HTML converter\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/links.ts` - Link graph builder (backlinks)\n\n**Support modules:**\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/stats.ts` - Statistics computation\n- `/c/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/summarize.ts` - AI summary generation with caching\n\n---\n\n### 2. `src/types/report.ts` - Type Exports\n\n```typescript\n// Core stats interface\nexport interface ReportStats {\n  totalSessions: number\n  totalMessages: number\n  totalToolEvents: number\n  activeDays: number\n  dateRange: { from: string; to: string }\n  clientCounts: Record<string, number>\n  dayBuckets: Record<string, number>        // 'YYYY-MM-DD' Ôćĺ session count\n  weekBuckets: Record<string, number>        // 'YYYY-WNN' Ôćĺ message count\n  toolCounts: Record<string, number>         // tool name Ôćĺ invocation count\n}\n\n// Summary caching\nexport interface SummaryCache {\n  sha256: string\n  summary: string\n  generated_at: string\n}\n\n// Link graph for backlinks/forward links\nexport interface LinkGraph {\n  backlinks: Record<string, string[]>        // session_id Ôćĺ session_ids that reference it\n  forwardLinks: Record<string, string[]>     // session_id Ôćĺ session_ids it references\n}\n\n// Search index entry (embedded in search.html)\nexport interface SearchIndexEntry {\n  url: string\n  title: string\n  client: string\n  date: string\n  snippet: string\n}\n\n// Build options passed to buildReport()\nexport interface BuildReportOptions {\n  root: string                               // project root\n  output: string                             // Memory/07_reports output path\n  noAi?: boolean                             // disable AI summaries\n  model?: string                             // AI model (defaults to Haiku)\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. CSS Variables & Component Classes in `src/report/render/css.ts`\n\n**CSS Custom Properties (--variables):**\n- `--bg` (#0d1117) - main background\n- `--bg-secondary` (#161b22) - secondary background\n- `--bg-card` (#21262d) - card background\n- `--border` (#30363d) - border color\n- `--text` (#e6edf3) - primary text\n- `--text-muted` (#8b949e) - muted text\n- `--accent` (#58a6ff) - link/accent color\n- `--accent-hover` (#79b8ff) - accent hover\n- `--green-0` through `--green-4` - heatmap gradient colors\n- `--user-bg`, `--user-border` - user message styling\n- `--assistant-bg`, `--assistant-border` - assistant message styling\n- `--code-bg` (#161b22) - code block background\n- `--badge-codex`, `--badge-claude`, `--badge-gemini` - client badges\n- `--danger`, `--warning`, `--success` - semantic colors\n- `--font-mono` - monospace font stack\n\n**Component Classes:**\n- `.nav`, `.nav-brand`, `.nav-link`, `.nav-link.active` - navigation bar\n- `.container` - max-width container\n- `.page-header`, `.subtitle` - page headers\n- `.card`, `.card-title` - card containers\n- `.stat-value`, `.stat-label` - statistics display\n- `.stats-grid` - grid of stat cards\n- `.chart-grid`, `.chart-card`, `.chart-title`, `.chart-card.full-width` - charts\n- `.badge`, `.badge-codex`, `.badge-claude`, `.badge-gemini`, `.badge-unknown` - client badges\n- `.message`, `.message-user`, `.message-assistant`, `.message-header`, `.message-role`, `.message-body` - message bubbles\n- `.summary-card`, `.summary-label` - AI summary display\n- `.meta-table` - metadata table styling\n- `.backlinks`, `.backlinks-title` - backlinks section\n- `.search-box`, `.search-results`, `.search-result`, `.search-result-title`, `.search-result-meta`, `.search-result-snippet` - search UI\n- `.search-result mark` - search highlight\n- `.heatmap-legend` - activity heatmap legend\n- `.markdown-body` - markdown content styling\n\n---\n\n### 4. Layout.ts Helpers - All Exported Functions\n\n```typescript\n// HTML escaping\nexport function escHtml(text: string): string\n\n// Navigation rendering\nexport type NavPage = 'dashboard' | 'transcripts' | 'goals' | 'knowledge' | 'search'\nexport function renderNav(current: NavPage, rootLevel = false): string\n\n// Transcript URL helpers (canonical implementation)\nexport function manifestStem(m: ManifestEntry): string\nexport function transcriptUrlFromRoot(m: ManifestEntry): string     // Use from index.html\nexport function transcriptUrlFromTranscript(m: ManifestEntry): string // Use from transcript pages\n\n// Client badge rendering (allowlisted CSS classes)\nexport function clientBadge(client: string): string\n\n// Shared markdown file type\nexport interface MarkdownFile {\n  filename: string\n  title: string\n  content: string\n}\nexport function slugifyName(name: string): string\n\n// HTML shell wrapper\nexport function htmlShell(title: string, content: string, nav: string, extraHead = ''): string\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. Build.ts Orchestrator - Main Steps & Data Flow\n\n**Main entry point: `buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions)`**\n\n1. **Setup** - Create output directories, ensure gitignore entry for Memory/07_reports/\n2. **Load manifests** - Recursively load all JSON manifests from Memory/06_transcripts/manifests/\n3. **Build link graph** - Detect [[session_id]] and [[stem]] references in clean markdown (backlinks)\n4. **Process transcripts (parallel with semaphore):**\n   - Parse clean markdown messages\n   - Extract tool summaries from raw JSONL (codex function_call, claude tool_use)\n   - Accumulate tool name counts\n   - Generate AI summaries (with SHA256 caching)\n   - Render individual transcript HTML pages\n   - Write transcripts/{client}/{stem}.html\n5. **Compute final statistics** - Aggregate across all manifests\n6. **Render dashboard** - index.html with stat cards + charts\n7. **Render transcript list** - transcripts/index.html\n8. **Load and render goals** - goals/index.html from Memory/01_goals/*.md\n9. **Load and render knowledge** - knowledge/index.html from Memory/04_knowledge/*.md\n10. **Build and render search** - search.html with embedded JSON index + vanilla JS search\n\n**Key data structures passed around:**\n- `ManifestEntry[]` - Array of transcript metadata\n- `RenderedMessage[]` - Parsed messages { role, timestamp, text }\n- `ReportStats` - Aggregated statistics\n- `LinkGraph` - Backlink/forward link maps\n- `SearchIndexEntry[]` - Search index entries\n\n---\n\n### 6. Config.ts - All Config Fields\n\nLocated in `~/.memorytree/config.toml`\n\n```typescript\nexport interface Config {\n  readonly heartbeat_interval: string              // e.g., \"5m\" (default: \"5m\")\n  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]           // Directories to watch for transcripts\n  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]       // Array of project paths + names\n  readonly auto_push: boolean                      // Auto-push to git remote (default: true)\n  readonly log_level: string                       // debug|info|warn|error (default: \"info\")\n  readonly generate_report: boolean                // Enable report generation (default: false)\n  readonly ai_summary_model: string               // AI model for summaries (default: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)\n}\n\nexport interface ProjectEntry {\n  readonly path: string                            // Absolute path to project\n  readonly name: string                            // Display name\n}\n\n// Utilities\nexport function loadConfig(): Config\nexport function saveConfig(cfg: Config): void\nexport function registerProject(cfg: Config, repoPath: string): Config\nexport function intervalToSeconds(interval: string): number\n```\n\n---\n\n### 7. Manifest Structure (ManifestEntry) from `src/types/transcript.ts`\n\n```typescript\nexport interface ManifestEntry {\n  client: string                                   // 'codex' | 'claude' | 'gemini'\n  project: string                                  // Project name\n  session_id: string                               // UUID v4 session identifier\n  raw_sha256: string                               // SHA256 of raw transcript\n  title: string                                    // Session title\n  started_at: string                               // ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g., \"2026-03-16T15:48:01Z\")\n  imported_at: string                              // When transcript was imported\n  cwd: string                                      // Working directory at session start\n  branch: string                                   // Git branch name\n  raw_source_path: string                          // Original source path\n  raw_upload_permission: string                    // Upload permission level\n  global_raw_path: string                          // Path to raw JSONL (global location)\n  global_clean_path: string                        // Path to clean markdown (global location)\n  global_manifest_path: string                     // Path to this manifest (global location)\n  repo_raw_path: string                            // Path to raw JSONL (relative to repo)\n  repo_clean_path: string                          // Path to clean markdown (relative to repo)\n  repo_manifest_path: string                       // Path to this manifest (relative to repo)\n  message_count: number                            // Total messages in session\n  tool_event_count: number                         // Total tool invocations\n  cleaning_mode: string                            // Cleaning mode applied\n  repo_mirror_enabled: boolean                     // Whether repo mirroring is enabled\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 8. Stats.ts - computeStats() Return & ReportStats\n\n```typescript\nexport function computeStats(\n  manifests: ManifestEntry[],\n  toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {},\n): ReportStats\n\n// Returns ReportStats (see section 2) with:\n// - totalSessions: manifests.length\n// - totalMessages: sum of message_count\n// - totalToolEvents: sum of tool_event_count\n// - activeDays: count of unique YYYY-MM-DD dates\n// - dateRange: { from, to } from sorted started_at timestamps\n// - clientCounts: { 'codex': 5, 'claude': 12, ... }\n// - dayBuckets: 'YYYY-MM-DD' Ôćĺ session count (for heatmap)\n// - weekBuckets: 'YYYY-WNN' Ôćĺ message count (for weekly line chart)\n// - toolCounts: tool name Ôćĺ invocation count (accumulated from raw transcripts)\n\n// Utility functions:\nexport function extractToolNames(summaries: string[]): string[]  // Extract first word from summaries\nexport function accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names): Record<string, number>\nexport function isoWeekKey(d: Date): string  // Compute 'YYYY-WNN' from Date\nexport function buildDayBuckets(manifests): Record<string, number>\nexport function buildWeekBuckets(manifests): Record<string, number>\n```\n\n---\n\n### 9. Heartbeat.ts - Where buildReport() is Called\n\n**In `processProject()` function (lines 135-149):**\n\n```typescript\nexport async function processProject(\n  config: Config,\n  projectPath: string,\n  projectName: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  // ... import transcripts ...\n  \n  if (config.generate_report) {\n    try {\n      const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')\n      await buildReport({\n        root: projectPath,\n        output: join(projectPath, 'Memory', '07_reports'),\n        noAi: !process.env['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'],\n        model: config.ai_summary_model,\n      })\n      logger.info(`[${projectName}] Report generated.`)\n    } catch (err: unknown) {\n      logger.warn(`[${projectName}] Report generation failed: ${String(err)}`)\n      // Never propagate ÔÇö report failure must not abort heartbeat cycle\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Key context:**\n- Called only if `config.generate_report` is `true`\n- Report output goes to `Memory/07_reports/`\n- Wrapped in try-catch so failures don't abort heartbeat\n- Uses config's `ai_summary_model` field\n- Disables AI summaries if `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent\n\n**Broader heartbeat flow:**\n1. `main()` acquires lock\n2. Calls `runHeartbeat(config)` which iterates over `config.projects`\n3. For each project, calls `processProject()`:\n   - Discovers transcripts from source files (codex, claude, gemini)\n   - Parses and imports new transcripts\n   - Scans for sensitive patterns\n   - Commits and pushes to git\n   - **Generates report** (if enabled)\n\n---\n\n### Summary for Your Upgrade Planning\n\n**Current system provides:**\n- Single static HTML report (no dark/light mode toggle, no i18n, no responsive sidebar)\n- GitHub Dark hardcoded CSS with one color scheme\n- Navigation: dashboard, transcripts, goals, knowledge, search (flat top nav)\n- Dashboard: stat cards, heatmap (365 days), client pie chart, weekly line, tool bar chart\n- Transcript pages: metadata table, AI summary, backlinks, message bubbles\n- Search: full-text substring search with vanilla JS (no server backend)\n- Link graph: detects [[session_id]] references for backlinks\n\n**Key integration points for your features:**\n- CSS variables already defined Ôćĺ easy to add dark/light mode toggle\n- NavPage type limits navigation Ôćĺ add to enum for new pages\n- Render functions are isolated Ôćĺ add per-client, per-project pages by duplicating structure\n- Chart renderers use inline SVG Ôćĺ consider D3 or Chart.js for graph view\n- buildReport() orchestrates the pipeline Ôćĺ add webhook notifications here\n- Search page already responsive (single container) Ôćĺ enhance responsiveness further\n- GitHub Pages deployment Ôćĺ add in build.ts (copy to gh-pages branch)\n\n---\n\nThat's the complete inventory! All file paths are absolute as requested.",

  },

]

locale / gh_pages_branch / cname / webhook_url ňşŚŠ«Á |\n| `src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` | ń╝áŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Áš╗Ö buildReport() |\n\n---\n\n## Ŕ»Žš╗ćň«×šÄ░ŔžäŠá╝\n\n### 1. i18n š│╗š╗č\n\n```typescript\n// src/report/i18n/index.ts\nexport interface Translations {\n  nav: { dashboard: string; sessions: string; projects: string; graph: string\n         goals: string; todos: string; knowledge: string; archive: string; search: string }\n  dashboard: { title: string; subtitle: string; sessions: string; messages: string\n               toolEvents: string; activeDays: string; recentSessions: string }\n  sessions: { title: string; noSessions: string; client: string; date: string\n              id: string; msgs: string; tools: string; all: string }\n  transcript: { aiSummary: string; referencedBy: string; messages: string\n                noMessages: string; client: string; sessionId: string; branch: string\n                workingDir: string; sha256: string; toolEvents: string }\n  graph: { title: string; subtitle: string; noData: string }\n  projects: { title: string; noProjects: string; sessions: string }\n  search: { title: string; placeholder: string; results: string; noResults: string }\n  common: { loading: string; error: string; unknown: string }\n}\n\nexport function loadLocale(locale: string): Translations\n```\n\n**Šö»ŠîüŔ»şŔĘÇ´╝łńŞÇŠťč´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- `en` (Ú╗śŔ«Ą)\n- `zh-CN`\n\n**ÚůŹšŻ«´╝Ü**\n```toml\n# ~/.memorytree/config.toml\nlocale = \"zh-CN\"\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆň»╝Ŕł¬ + ňôŹň║öň╝ĆňŞâň▒Ç\n\n**HTML š╗ôŠ×ä´╝łŠŤ┐ŠŹóňŻôňëŹ top nav´╝ë´╝Ü**\n```html\n<div class=\"app-layout\">\n  <aside class=\"sidebar\" id=\"sidebar\">\n    <div class=\"sidebar-brand\">­čî▓ MemoryTree</div>\n    <nav class=\"sidebar-nav\">\n      <!-- ňłćš╗ä´╝ÜMain -->\n      <div class=\"nav-group-label\">Main</div>\n      <a class=\"nav-item [active]\" href=\"...\">Dashboard</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Sessions</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Projects</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Graph</a>\n      <!-- ňłćš╗ä´╝ÜMemory -->\n      <div class=\"nav-group-label\">Memory</div>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Goals</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Todos</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Knowledge</a>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Archive</a>\n      <!-- ňłćš╗ä´╝ÜTools -->\n      <div class=\"nav-group-label\">Tools</div>\n      <a class=\"nav-item\" href=\"...\">Search</a>\n    </nav>\n    <div class=\"sidebar-footer\">\n      <button class=\"theme-toggle\" id=\"themeToggle\">ÔśÇ Light</button>\n    </div>\n  </aside>\n  <div class=\"sidebar-overlay\" id=\"sidebarOverlay\"></div>\n  <main class=\"main-content\">\n    <div class=\"mobile-header\">\n      <button class=\"hamburger\" id=\"hamburger\">Ôś░</button>\n      <span class=\"mobile-title\">MemoryTree</span>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"container\">\n      {content}\n    </div>\n  </main>\n</div>\n```\n\n**ňôŹň║öň╝ĆŠľşšé╣´╝Ü**\n- `> 1024px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆňŤ║ň«Üň▒Ľň╝Ç´╝ł240px´╝ë´╝îńŞ╗ňćůň«╣ňĚŽšž╗\n- `768ÔÇô1024px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆš¬äšëł´╝ł56px´╝îňĆ¬ŠśżšĄ║ňŤżŠáç´╝ë\n- `< 768px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆÚÜÉŔŚĆ´╝îhamburger ŠîëÚĺ«´╝îšé╣ňç╗ń╗ÄňĚŽŠ╗Ĺňç║ + overlay\n\n**ŠëÇŠťëńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ JS ňćůŔüöňťĘ layout.ts šÜä htmlShell() ńŞş´╝łš║Ž 40 Ŕíî´╝ë**\n\n---\n\n### 3. ŠÜŚŔë▓ / ń║«Ŕë▓ňłçŠŹó\n\n```css\n/* css.ts Šľ░ňó×ń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗Úóś */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] {\n  --bg: #ffffff;\n  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;\n  --bg-card: #ffffff;\n  --border: #d0d7de;\n  --text: #1f2328;\n  --text-muted: #636c76;\n  --accent: #0969da;\n  --accent-hover: #0550ae;\n  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;\n  --user-border: #54aeff44;\n  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;\n  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;\n  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;\n}\n```\n\n**JS´╝łňćůŔüöňťĘ htmlShell´╝ë´╝Ü**\n```javascript\n// ňłŁňžőňîľ´╝ÜŔ»╗ňĆľ localStorage´╝îÚ╗śŔ«Ą dark\nconst saved = localStorage.getItem('mt-theme') || 'dark'\ndocument.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', saved)\n// ňłçŠŹó\ndocument.getElementById('themeToggle').addEventListener('click', () => {\n  const next = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'\n  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next)\n  localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', next)\n})\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łGraph View´╝ë\n\n**ÚíÁÚŁó´╝Ü** `graph.html`´╝łń╗Ä build.ts šöčŠłÉ´╝ë\n\n**ŠĽ░ŠŹ«´╝Ü** ňĄŹšöĘňĚ▓Šťë LinkGraph´╝łlinks.ts´╝ë+ ManifestEntry[]\n\n**ŠŞ▓Ščô´╝Ü** ňćůŔüö ~250 Ŕíî vanilla JS force-directed graph´╝łŠŚá D3´╝îŠŚá CDN´╝ë\n\n```javascript\n// š«ÇňŹĽ spring layout š«ŚŠ│Ľ´╝Ü\n// - Š»ĆňŞž´╝Üň║öšöĘŠľąňŐŤ´╝łŠëÇŠťëŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ ň╝ĽňŐŤ´╝łŠťëŔ┐×š║┐šÜäŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ Úś╗ň░╝\n// - ŠŞ▓Ščôňł░ <canvas> Šłľ inline SVG´╝łcanvas ŠÇžŔâŻŠŤ┤ňąŻ´╝ë\n// ŔŐéšé╣š▒╗ň×ő´╝Ü\n//   'session'   Ôćĺ ňťćňŻó´╝îŠîë client šŁÇŔë▓´╝łblue/purple/green´╝ë\n//   'knowledge' Ôćĺ ŔĆ▒ňŻó´╝îÚ╗äŔë▓\n//   'goal'      Ôćĺ ňůşŔż╣ňŻó´╝îŠęÖŔë▓\n// ń║Ąń║ĺ´╝Ü\n//   - hover Ôćĺ Úźśń║«Ŕ»ąŔŐéšé╣ňĆŐňůÂšŤ┤ŠÄąŔ┐×ŠÄą\n//   - click Ôćĺ ŔĚ│ŔŻČňł░ň»╣ň║öÚíÁÚŁó\n//   - scroll Ôćĺ zoom\n//   - drag Ôćĺ pan\n\nconst GRAPH_DATA = {\n  nodes: [\n    { id: \"session_id_xxx\", label: \"Session Title\", type: \"session\", client: \"claude\", url: \"...\" },\n    ...\n  ],\n  edges: [\n    { source: \"session_id_xxx\", target: \"session_id_yyy\" },\n    ...\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n**ŔŐéšé╣ńŞŐÚÖÉ**´╝ÜŔÂůŔ┐ç 500 ŔŐéšé╣ŠŚÂňĆ¬ŠśżšĄ║ŠťÇŔ┐Ĺ 500 ńŞ¬´╝łŠîë started_at ŠÄĺň║Ć´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### 5. Šîë Client ňłćš▒╗´╝łSessions ÚíÁňó×ň╝║´╝ë\n\n`transcripts/index.html` ÚíÂÚâĘňŐá tab bar´╝Ü\n\n```\n[ All (84) ]  [ Claude (42) ]  [ Codex (31) ]  [ Gemini (11) ]\n```\n\nš║» JS šşŤÚÇë´╝łdata-client ň▒×ŠÇž´╝ë´╝îńŞŹŔĚ│ÚíÁ´╝îńŞŹÚçŹŠľ░ňŐáŔŻŻŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 6. Šîë Project ňłćš▒╗´╝łŠľ░ Projects ÚíÁ´╝ë\n\n**ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ŠŁąŠ║É´╝Ü** `ManifestEntry.cwd` Ôćĺ ŠĆÉňĆľŠťÇňÉÄńŞÇŠ«ÁŔĚ»ňżäńŻťńŞ║Úí╣šŤ«ňÉŹ\n\n```typescript\n// src/report/render/projects.ts\nfunction extractProject(cwd: string): string {\n  return cwd.split(/[/\\\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'\n}\n\n// ŠîëÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš╗ä manifests\n// projects/index.html Ôćĺ Úí╣šŤ«ňłŚŔíĘ´╝łňŹíšëçŠá╝ň╝Ć´╝îňÉź session ŠĽ░ÚçĆŃÇüŠťÇňÉÄŠ┤╗ŔĚâŠŚÂÚŚ┤ŃÇüńŻ┐šöĘŔ┐çšÜä clients´╝ë\n// šé╣ňç╗Úí╣šŤ« Ôćĺ šşŤÚÇëňł░Ŕ»ąÚí╣šŤ«šÜä sessions´╝łňĄŹšöĘ transcript-list ŠŞ▓Ščô´╝îňŐá ?project= ňĆéŠĽ░ or JS šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n### 7. Memory ňůĘňłćš▒╗ň»╝Ŕł¬\n\nbuild.ts Šľ░ňó×ŠëźŠĆĆ´╝Ü\n- `Memory/02_todos/` Ôćĺ `todos/index.html`´╝łňÉî goals ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ´╝ë\n- `Memory/05_archive/` Ôćĺ `archive/index.html`´╝łňÉî goals ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ´╝ë\n- `Memory/03_chat_logs/` Ôćĺ ňŽéŠ×ťšŤ«ňŻĽňşśňťĘńŞöŠťë .md Šľçń╗Â´╝îňŐáňůąň»╝Ŕł¬´╝łňÉŽňłÖÚÜÉŔŚĆ´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### 8. Popover ÚóäŔžł\n\ntranscript ÚíÁÚŁó + sessions ňłŚŔíĘńŞş´╝îŠëÇŠťëňćůÚâĘÚôżŠÄąňŐá hover tooltip´╝Ü\n\n```html\n<!-- hover ŠŚÂŠśżšĄ║ -->\n<div class=\"popover\" data-for=\"session_id_xxx\">\n  <div class=\"popover-title\">Session Title</div>\n  <div class=\"popover-meta\">Claude ┬Ě 2026-03-16 ┬Ě 18 msgs</div>\n  <div class=\"popover-summary\">AI summary text here...</div>\n</div>\n```\n\nš║» CSS + ň░ĹÚçĆ JS´╝łposition Ŕ«íš«Ś´╝ëŃÇéSummary ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňÁîňťĘ data ň▒×ŠÇžÚçî´╝îŠŚáÚťÇÚóŁňĄľ HTTP Ŕ»ĚŠ▒éŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 9. GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\n\n**config.toml Šľ░ňó×ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\n```toml\ngh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\"   # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹÚâĘšŻ▓\ncname = \"memory.yourdomain.com\" # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹšöčŠłÉ CNAME\n```\n\n**src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts´╝Ü**\n```typescript\nexport async function deployToGhPages(options: {\n  root: string        // git repo root\n  outputDir: string   // Memory/07_reports/\n  branch: string      // gh-pages\n  cname?: string\n}): Promise<void>\n\n// ň«×šÄ░ŠşąÚ¬Ą´╝Ü\n// 1. ňŽéŠ×ť cname ňşśňťĘ´╝îňćÖ outputDir/CNAME Šľçń╗Â\n// 2. git -C root subtree push --prefix Memory/07_reports origin gh-pages\n//    ´╝łňŽéŠ×ť branch ńŞŹňşśňťĘňłÖňůłňłŤň╗║´╝Ügit checkout --orphan gh-pages´╝ë\n// 3. ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ąŠŚÂ warn ńŻćńŞŹŠŐŤňç║´╝łńŞŹńŞşŠľş heartbeat´╝ë\n```\n\n**heartbeat ÚŤćŠłÉ´╝Ü** buildReport() ň«îŠłÉňÉÄŔ░âšöĘ deployToGhPages()´╝łif gh_pages_branch ÚŁ×šę║´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### 10. Webhook ÚÇÜščą\n\n**config.toml Šľ░ňó×ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\n```toml\nwebhook_url = \"https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/xxx\"\n# Ŕç¬ňŐĘŔ»ćňłźň╣│ňĆ░´╝Üfeishu / telegram / discord / slack / generic\n```\n\n**src/report/deploy/webhook.ts´╝Ü**\n```typescript\nexport async function notifyWebhook(options: {\n  webhookUrl: string\n  stats: ReportStats\n  newSessions: ManifestEntry[]   // ŠťČŠČí heartbeat Šľ░ňó×šÜä sessions\n  siteUrl?: string               // GitHub Pages URL´╝łňŽéŠ×ťÚâĘšŻ▓ń║ć´╝ë\n}): Promise<void>\n\n// ň╣│ňĆ░Ŕ»ćňłźŔžäňłÖ´╝Ü\n// feishu:   URL ňÉź open.feishu.cn Šłľ open.larksuite.com\n// telegram: URL ňÉź api.telegram.org\n// discord:  URL ňÉź discord.com/api/webhooks\n// slack:    URL ňÉź hooks.slack.com\n// generic:  ňůÂń╗ľ´╝łňĆĹ { text: \"...\" } Šá╝ň╝Ć´╝ë\n\n// Úú×ń╣ŽŠÂłŠü»Šá╝ň╝Ć´╝łňŹíšëç´╝ë´╝Ü\n// {\n//   \"msg_type\": \"interactive\",\n//   \"card\": {\n//     \"header\": { \"title\": { \"content\": \"­čôŁ MemoryTree Šľ░ń╝ÜŔ»Ł\" } },\n//     \"elements\": [\n//       { \"tag\": \"div\", \"text\": { \"content\": \"**${title}**\\nClaude ┬Ě 18 msgs ┬Ě 42 tools\" } },\n//       { \"tag\": \"action\", \"actions\": [{ \"tag\": \"button\", \"text\": \"Ščąšťő\", \"url\": siteUrl }] }\n//     ]\n//   }\n// }\n```\n\n---\n\n## Šľ░ňó× Config ňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```typescript\n// src/heartbeat/config.ts\nexport interface Config {\n  // ... šÄ░ŠťëňşŚŠ«Á ...\n  readonly locale: string              // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: 'en'\n  readonly gh_pages_branch: string     // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: '' (ńŞŹÚâĘšŻ▓)\n  readonly cname: string               // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: ''\n  readonly webhook_url: string         // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: ''\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Šľ░ňó× BuildReportOptions ňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```typescript\n// src/types/report.ts\nexport interface BuildReportOptions {\n  root: string\n  output: string\n  noAi?: boolean\n  model?: string\n  locale?: string           // Šľ░ňó×´╝îÚ╗śŔ«Ą 'en'\n  ghPagesBranch?: string    // Šľ░ňó×´╝îÚ╗śŔ«Ą ''\n  cname?: string            // Šľ░ňó×´╝îÚ╗śŔ«Ą ''\n  webhookUrl?: string       // Šľ░ňó×´╝îÚ╗śŔ«Ą ''\n  newSessionIds?: string[]  // Šľ░ňó×´╝îšöĘń║Ä webhook ÚÇÜščą\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Ŕżôňç║šŤ«ňŻĽš╗ôŠ×ä´╝łŠľ░ňó×ÚâĘňłć´╝ë\n\n```\nMemory/07_reports/\n  index.html              ÔćÉ Dashboard´╝łňĚ▓Šťë´╝îŠŤ┤Šľ░ňŞâň▒Ç´╝ë\n  graph.html              ÔćÉ ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łŠľ░ňó×´╝ë\n  projects/\n    index.html            ÔćÉ Úí╣šŤ«ňłŚŔíĘ´╝łŠľ░ňó×´╝ë\n  transcripts/\n    index.html            ÔćÉ Sessions´╝łňĚ▓Šťë´╝îňŐá Client tab´╝ë\n    claude/...\n    codex/...\n    gemini/...\n  goals/index.html        ÔćÉ ňĚ▓Šťë\n  todos/index.html        ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×\n  knowledge/index.html    ÔćÉ ňĚ▓Šťë\n  archive/index.html      ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×\n  search.html             ÔćÉ ňĚ▓Šťë\n  CNAME                   ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×´╝łif cname ÚůŹšŻ«´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n## ŠÁőŔ»ĽŔ«íňłĺ\n\n| ŠÁőŔ»ĽŠľçń╗Â | ŔŽćšŤľňćůň«╣ |\n|---------|---------|\n| `tests/report/i18n.test.ts` | loadLocale en/zh-CN´╝ŤŠëÇŠťë key ňşśňťĘ´╝ŤŠŚá undefined |\n| `tests/report/render/sidebar.test.ts` | htmlShell ňîůňÉź sidebar´╝Ťtheme toggle JS´╝Ťhamburger |\n| `tests/report/render/projects.test.ts` | extractProject()´╝ŤgroupByProject()´╝Ťšę║ cwd ňĄäšÉć |\n| `tests/report/render/graph.test.ts` | ŔŐéšé╣/Ŕż╣ JSON šöčŠłÉ´╝Ť>500 ŔŐéšé╣Šł¬Šľş´╝Ťšę║ňŤżňĄäšÉć |\n| `tests/report/deploy/github-pages.test.ts` | CNAME Šľçń╗ÂšöčŠłÉ´╝Ťšę║ branch ŠŚÂŔĚ│Ŕ┐ç´╝Ťgit ňĹŻń╗ĄŠ×äÚÇá |\n| `tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts` | ň╣│ňĆ░Ŕ»ćňłź´╝łfeishu/telegram/discord´╝ë´╝ŤšŻĹš╗ťňĄ▒Ŕ┤ąńŞŹŠŐŤňç║ |\n| `tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts` | Šľ░ňşŚŠ«Á locale/gh_pages_branch/cname/webhook_url |\n\n---\n\n## ň«×šÄ░Úí║ň║Ć\n\n1. **i18n š│╗š╗č** (`src/report/i18n/`) + ŠÁőŔ»Ľ\n2. **CSS ÚçŹŠ×ä**´╝łńżžŔż╣ŠáĆňŞâň▒Ç + ń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗Úóś + ňôŹň║öň╝Ć´╝ë\n3. **layout.ts ňŹçš║ž**´╝łhtmlShell ňŐáńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ/toggle/i18n´╝ŤrenderNav Šö╣ńŞ║ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ´╝ë\n4. **config.ts + types/report.ts** ňŐáŠľ░ňşŚŠ«Á\n5. **todos.ts + archive.ts**´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\n6. **projects.ts**´╝łŠľ░ÚíÁÚŁó´╝ë\n7. **graph.ts**´╝łščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝îňŐŤň»╝ňÉĹ´╝ë\n8. **transcript-list.ts**´╝łňŐá Client tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\n9. **ňůĘÚâĘŠŞ▓ŠčôňçŻŠĽ░ń╝áňůą Translations**´╝łdashboard / transcript šşë´╝ë\n10. **deploy/github-pages.ts + webhook.ts** + ŠÁőŔ»Ľ\n11. **build.ts ŠŤ┤Šľ░**´╝łŠÄąňůąŠëÇŠťëŠľ░ÚíÁÚŁó + deploy + webhook´╝ë\n12. **heartbeat.ts ŠŤ┤Šľ░**´╝łń╝áŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Á´╝ë\n13. **ňůĘÚçĆŠÁőŔ»Ľ** + Š×äň╗║Ú¬îŔ»ü\n\n---\n\n## ń║îŠťčňżůňüÜ´╝łŔ«░ňŻĽ´╝îŠťČŠČíńŞŹň«×šÄ░´╝ë\n\n- [ ] ŠľçšźášŤ«ňŻĽ´╝łTOC´╝ëÔÇö Knowledge / Goals ÚíÁÚŁóňćůÚöÜšé╣\n- [ ] Breadcrumbs ň»╝Ŕł¬ŔĚ»ňżä\n- [ ] Reader Mode´╝łÚÜÉŔŚĆńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ + ň▒ůńŞşň«ŻŠľçŠťČ´╝ë\n- [ ] RSS Feed´╝ł`feed.xml`´╝ë\n- [ ] Mermaid ňŤżŔíĘŠŞ▓Ščô´╝łKnowledge ŠľçšźáÚçî´╝ë\n- [ ] SPA ň«óŠłĚšź»ŔĚ»šö▒´╝łhistory.pushState´╝ë\n- [ ] Callouts ŠáĚň╝Ć´╝ł`> [!note]` / `> [!warning]`´╝ë\n- [ ] Social Preview Cards´╝łOpen Graph meta Šáçšşż´╝ë\n- [ ] Šľ╣Šíł B i18n´╝łňĄÜŔ»şŔĘÇň╣Âňşś + ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŔç¬ňŐĘŔ»ćňłź´╝îÚŁóňÉĹ SaaS ňîľ´╝ë\n- [ ] ŠÉťš┤óňó×ň╝║´╝łŠö»Šîü client / project Ŕ┐çŠ╗Ą´╝ë\n- [ ] ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆŠŐśňĆáŔ«░ň┐ć´╝łlocalStorage Ŕ«░ńŻĆň«Ż/š¬äšŐÂŠÇü´╝ë\n- [ ] ń╝ÜŔ»Ł tag š│╗š╗č´╝łń╗Ä AI summary ŠĆÉňĆľňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź´╝ë\n\n---\n\n## Ú¬îŔ»üŠşąÚ¬Ą\n\n```bash\n# 1. Š×äň╗║\ncd C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow && npm run build\n\n# 2. ňůĘÚçĆŠÁőŔ»Ľ´╝łšŤ«Šáç 550+ ÚÇÜŔ┐ç´╝î0 ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą´╝ë\nnpm test\n\n# 3. šöčŠłÉŠŐąňĹŐ´╝łńŞşŠľçŠĘíň╝Ć´╝îńŞŹňÉ»šöĘ AI´╝ë\nnode dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo --no-ai\n\n# 4. ňÉ»ňŐĘŠťŹňŐí\nnode dist/cli.js report serve --dir D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports --port 4321\n\n# 5. |\n| `src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts` | ń╝áŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Áš╗Ö buildReport() |\n\n---\n\n## Ŕ»Žš╗ćň«×šÄ░ŔžäŠá╝\n\n### 1. i18n š│╗š╗č´╝łŠľ╣Šíł A´╝ÜŠ×äň╗║ŠŚÂŠîçň«ÜŔ»şŔĘÇ´╝ë\n\n```typescript\n// 'en'\n```\n\n**config.toml´╝Ü**\n```toml\nlocale = \"zh-CN\"   # šöĘŠłĚŔ«żšŻ«ńŞÇŠČí´╝îŠ×äň╗║ŠŚÂšöčŠĽł\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆň»╝Ŕł¬ + ňôŹň║öň╝Ć\n\n**ňŞâň▒Çš╗ôŠ×ä´╝łŠŤ┐ŠŹó top 240px´╝îńŞ╗ňćůň«╣Ŕç¬ňŐĘňĚŽšž╗\n- `< 768px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆÚÜÉŔŚĆ´╝îhamburger `Ôś░`´╝îšé╣ňç╗ń╗ÄňĚŽńżžŠ╗Ĺňç║ + Úü«šŻęň▒é\n\n**JS´╝łňćůŔüö´╝îš║Ž 40 Ŕíî´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- hamburger click Ôćĺ sidebar.classList.toggle('open')\n- overlay click Ôćĺ ňů│ÚŚş sidebar\n- theme toggle Ôćĺ `data-theme` ňłçŠŹó + `localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', ...)`\n- ňłŁňžőňîľŔ»╗ňĆľ `localStorage.getItem('mt-theme')` Ú╗śŔ«Ą dark\n\n---\n\n### 3. ŠÜŚŔë▓ / ń║«Ŕë▓ňłçŠŹó\n\n```css\n/* ń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗ÚóśŔŽćšŤľ´╝łňŐáňůą css.ts´╝ë */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] {\n  --bg: #ffffff;\n  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;\n  --bg-card: #ffffff;\n  --border: #d0d7de;\n  --text: #1f2328;\n  --text-muted: #636c76;\n  --accent: #0969da;\n  --accent-hover: #0550ae;\n  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;\n  --user-border: #54aeff44;\n  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;\n  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;\n  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łgraph.html´╝ë\n\n**ŠĽ░ŠŹ«Š║É´╝Ü** LinkGraph´╝łňĚ▓Šťë´╝ë+ ManifestEntry[] + MarkdownFile[]\n\n**ŔŐéšé╣š▒╗ň×ő´╝Ü**\n- `session`   Ôćĺ ňťćňŻó´╝îŠîë client šŁÇŔë▓´╝łŔôŁ/š┤ź/š╗┐´╝ë\n- `knowledge` Ôćĺ ŔĆ▒ňŻó´╝îÚ╗äŔë▓\n- `goal`      Ôćĺ ňůşŔż╣ňŻó´╝îŠęÖŔë▓\n\n**ŠŞ▓Ščô´╝Ü** `<canvas>` + ňćůŔüö vanilla JS force simulation´╝ł~250 Ŕíî´╝îŠŚá CDN´╝ë\n\n```javascript\n// force simulation ŠáŞň┐âÚÇ╗ŔżĹ´╝łňćůŔüö´╝ë\nconst GRAPH_DATA = { nodes: [...], edges: [...] }\n// Š»ĆňŞž´╝ÜŠľąňŐŤ´╝łŠëÇŠťëŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ ň╝ĽňŐŤ´╝łŠťëŔ┐×š║┐šÜäŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ ńŞşň┐âň╝ĽňŐŤ + Úś╗ň░╝\n// ń║Ąń║ĺ´╝Ühover Úźśń║« + tooltip´╝Ťclick ŔĚ│ŔŻČ´╝Ťscroll zoom´╝Ťdrag pan\n```\n\n**ŔŐéšé╣ńŞŐÚÖÉ´╝Ü** ŔÂůŔ┐ç 500 ńŞ¬ŠŚÂňĆľŠťÇŔ┐Ĺ 500 ńŞ¬´╝łŠîë started_at´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### 5. Šîë Client ňłćš▒╗´╝łSessions ÚíÁ tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\n\n`transcripts/index.html` ÚíÂÚâĘňŐá tab bar´╝îš║» JS šşŤÚÇë´╝ł`data-client` ň▒×ŠÇž´╝ë´╝Ü\n\n```\n[ All (84) ]  [ Claude (42) ]  [ Codex (31) ]  [ Gemini (11) ]\n```\n\n---\n\n### 6. Šîë Project ňłćš▒╗´╝łprojects/index.html´╝ë\n\n```typescript\n// src/report/render/projects.ts\nfunction extractProject(cwd: string): string {\n  return cwd.split(/[/\\\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'\n}\n// ŠîëÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš╗ä manifests Ôćĺ ňŹíšëçňłŚŔíĘ´╝łÚí╣šŤ«ňÉŹŃÇüsession ŠĽ░ŃÇüŠťÇňÉÄŠ┤╗ŔĚâŃÇüńŻ┐šöĘšÜä clients´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n### 7. Šľ░ňó× Memory ňłćš▒╗ÚíÁÚŁó\n\n- `Memory/02_todos/` Ôćĺ `todos/index.html`´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals.ts ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\n- `Memory/05_archive/` Ôćĺ `archive/index.html`´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals.ts ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\n- `Memory/03_chat_logs/`Ôćĺ Šťëňćůň«╣ňłÖňŐáňůąň»╝Ŕł¬´╝îňÉŽňłÖÚÜÉŔŚĆ\n\n---\n\n### 8. Popover ÚóäŔžł\n\nsession ÚôżŠÄą hover ŠŚÂŠśżšĄ║ŠĹśŔŽüňŹíšëç´╝łsummary ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňÁîňťĘ `data-*` ň▒×ŠÇž´╝îŠŚáÚťÇ HTTP Ŕ»ĚŠ▒é´╝ë´╝Ü\n\n```html\n<a href=\"...\" data-summary=\"...\" data-meta=\"Claude ┬Ě 2026-03-16 ┬Ě 18 msgs\">Session Title</a>\n```\n\nJS šŤĹňÉČ mouseover Ôćĺ ňłŤň╗║/ň«ÜńŻŹ `.popover` div Ôćĺ mouseleave ÚÜÉŔŚĆ\n\n---\n\n### 9. GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\n\n**config.toml Šľ░ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\n```toml\ngh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\"    # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹÚâĘšŻ▓\ncname = \"memory.yourdomain.com\" # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹšöčŠłÉ CNAME Šľçń╗Â\n```\n\n**src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts´╝Ü**\n```typescript\n// ŠşąÚ¬Ą´╝Ü\n// 1. ňŽéŠ×ť cname ÚŁ×šę║ Ôćĺ ňćÖ outputDir/CNAME\n// 2. git subtree push --prefix Memory/07_reports origin {branch}\n//    ´╝łbranch ńŞŹňşśňťĘňłÖňůł git checkout --orphan {branch} ň╣ÂŠÄĘšę║ŠĆÉń║Ą´╝ë\n// 3. ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą Ôćĺ logger.warn´╝îńŞŹŠŐŤňç║\n```\n\n---\n\n### 10. Webhook ÚÇÜščą\n\n**config.toml Šľ░ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\n```toml\nwebhook_url = \"https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/xxx\"\n```\n\n**src/report/deploy/webhook.ts´╝Ü**\n```typescript\n// ň╣│ňĆ░Ŕç¬ňŐĘŔ»ćňłź´╝łÚÇÜŔ┐ç URL šë╣ňżü´╝ë´╝Ü\n//   feishu / telegram / discord / slack / generic\n// Úú×ń╣Ž´╝ÜňĆĹňŹíšëçŠÂłŠü»´╝łŠáçÚóś + ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŠĽ░ + ŔĚ│ŔŻČŠîëÚĺ«´╝ë\n// Telegram´╝ÜsendMessage API\n// Discord/Slack´╝Ü{ content: \"...\" }\n// ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą Ôćĺ warn´╝îńŞŹŠŐŤňç║\n```\n\n---\n\n### 11. Ôöé\r\nÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔö┤ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś\r\n```\r\n\r\n**ňôŹň║öň╝ĆŠľşšé╣´╝Ü**\r\n- `> 1024px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆňŤ║ň«Ü 240px´╝îńŞ╗ňćůň«╣Ŕç¬ňŐĘňĚŽšž╗\r\n- `< 768px`´╝ÜńżžŔż╣ŠáĆÚÜÉŔŚĆ´╝îhamburger `Ôś░`´╝îšé╣ňç╗ń╗ÄňĚŽńżžŠ╗Ĺňç║ + Úü«šŻęň▒é\r\n\r\n**JS´╝łňćůŔüö´╝îš║Ž 40 Ŕíî´╝ë´╝Ü**\r\n- hamburger click Ôćĺ sidebar.classList.toggle('open')\r\n- overlay click Ôćĺ ňů│ÚŚş sidebar\r\n- theme toggle Ôćĺ `data-theme` ňłçŠŹó + `localStorage.setItem('mt-theme', ...)`\r\n- ňłŁňžőňîľŔ»╗ňĆľ `localStorage.getItem('mt-theme')` Ú╗śŔ«Ą dark\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 3. ŠÜŚŔë▓ / ń║«Ŕë▓ňłçŠŹó\r\n\r\n```css\r\n/* ń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗ÚóśŔŽćšŤľ´╝łňŐáňůą css.ts´╝ë */\r\n[data-theme=\"light\"] {\r\n  --bg: #ffffff;\r\n  --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa;\r\n  --bg-card: #ffffff;\r\n  --border: #d0d7de;\r\n  --text: #1f2328;\r\n  --text-muted: #636c76;\r\n  --accent: #0969da;\r\n  --accent-hover: #0550ae;\r\n  --user-bg: #ddf4ff;\r\n  --user-border: #54aeff44;\r\n  --assistant-bg: #f6f8fa;\r\n  --assistant-border: #d0d7de;\r\n  --code-bg: #f6f8fa;\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 4. ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łgraph.html´╝ë\r\n\r\n**ŠĽ░ŠŹ«Š║É´╝Ü** LinkGraph´╝łňĚ▓Šťë´╝ë+ ManifestEntry[] + MarkdownFile[]\r\n\r\n**ŔŐéšé╣š▒╗ň×ő´╝Ü**\r\n- `session`   Ôćĺ ňťćňŻó´╝îŠîë client šŁÇŔë▓´╝łŔôŁ/š┤ź/š╗┐´╝ë\r\n- `knowledge` Ôćĺ ŔĆ▒ňŻó´╝îÚ╗äŔë▓\r\n- `goal`      Ôćĺ ňůşŔż╣ňŻó´╝îŠęÖŔë▓\r\n\r\n**ŠŞ▓Ščô´╝Ü** `<canvas>` + ňćůŔüö vanilla JS force simulation´╝ł~250 Ŕíî´╝îŠŚá CDN´╝ë\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\n// force simulation ŠáŞň┐âÚÇ╗ŔżĹ´╝łňćůŔüö´╝ë\r\nconst GRAPH_DATA = { nodes: [...], edges: [...] }\r\n// Š»ĆňŞž´╝ÜŠľąňŐŤ´╝łŠëÇŠťëŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ ň╝ĽňŐŤ´╝łŠťëŔ┐×š║┐šÜäŔŐéšé╣ň»╣´╝ë+ ńŞşň┐âň╝ĽňŐŤ + Úś╗ň░╝\r\n// ń║Ąń║ĺ´╝Ühover Úźśń║« + tooltip´╝Ťclick ŔĚ│ŔŻČ´╝Ťscroll zoom´╝Ťdrag pan\r\n```\r\n\r\n**ŔŐéšé╣ńŞŐÚÖÉ´╝Ü** ŔÂůŔ┐ç 500 ńŞ¬ŠŚÂňĆľŠťÇŔ┐Ĺ 500 ńŞ¬´╝łŠîë started_at´╝ë\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 5. Šîë Client ňłćš▒╗´╝łSessions ÚíÁ tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\r\n\r\n`transcripts/index.html` ÚíÂÚâĘňŐá tab bar´╝îš║» JS šşŤÚÇë´╝ł`data-client` ň▒×ŠÇž´╝ë´╝Ü\r\n\r\n```\r\n[ All (84) ]  [ Claude (42) ]  [ Codex (31) ]  [ Gemini (11) ]\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 6. Šîë Project ňłćš▒╗´╝łprojects/index.html´╝ë\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// src/report/render/projects.ts\r\nfunction extractProject(cwd: string): string {\r\n  return cwd.split(/[/\\\\]/).filter(Boolean).at(-1) ?? 'unknown'\r\n}\r\n// ŠîëÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš╗ä manifests Ôćĺ ňŹíšëçňłŚŔíĘ´╝łÚí╣šŤ«ňÉŹŃÇüsession ŠĽ░ŃÇüŠťÇňÉÄŠ┤╗ŔĚâŃÇüńŻ┐šöĘšÜä clients´╝ë\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 7. Šľ░ňó× Memory ňłćš▒╗ÚíÁÚŁó\r\n\r\n- `Memory/02_todos/` Ôćĺ `todos/index.html`´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals.ts ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\r\n- `Memory/05_archive/` Ôćĺ `archive/index.html`´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals.ts ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\r\n- `Memory/03_chat_logs/`Ôćĺ Šťëňćůň«╣ňłÖňŐáňůąň»╝Ŕł¬´╝îňÉŽňłÖÚÜÉŔŚĆ\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 8. Popover ÚóäŔžł\r\n\r\nsession ÚôżŠÄą hover ŠŚÂŠśżšĄ║ŠĹśŔŽüňŹíšëç´╝łsummary ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňÁîňťĘ `data-*` ň▒×ŠÇž´╝îŠŚáÚťÇ HTTP Ŕ»ĚŠ▒é´╝ë´╝Ü\r\n\r\n```html\r\n<a href=\"...\" data-summary=\"...\" data-meta=\"Claude ┬Ě 2026-03-16 ┬Ě 18 msgs\">Session Title</a>\r\n```\r\n\r\nJS šŤĹňÉČ mouseover Ôćĺ ňłŤň╗║/ň«ÜńŻŹ `.popover` div Ôćĺ mouseleave ÚÜÉŔŚĆ\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 9. GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\r\n\r\n**config.toml Šľ░ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\r\n```toml\r\ngh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\"    # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹÚâĘšŻ▓\r\ncname = \"memory.yourdomain.com\" # šĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹšöčŠłÉ CNAME Šľçń╗Â\r\n```\r\n\r\n**src/report/deploy/github-pages.ts´╝Ü**\r\n```typescript\r\n// ŠşąÚ¬Ą´╝Ü\r\n// 1. ňŽéŠ×ť cname ÚŁ×šę║ Ôćĺ ňćÖ outputDir/CNAME\r\n// 2. git subtree push --prefix Memory/07_reports origin {branch}\r\n//    ´╝łbranch ńŞŹňşśňťĘňłÖňůł git checkout --orphan {branch} ň╣ÂŠÄĘšę║ŠĆÉń║Ą´╝ë\r\n// 3. ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą Ôćĺ logger.warn´╝îńŞŹŠŐŤňç║\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 10. Webhook ÚÇÜščą\r\n\r\n**config.toml Šľ░ňşŚŠ«Á´╝Ü**\r\n```toml\r\nwebhook_url = \"https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/xxx\"\r\n```\r\n\r\n**src/report/deploy/webhook.ts´╝Ü**\r\n```typescript\r\n// ň╣│ňĆ░Ŕç¬ňŐĘŔ»ćňłź´╝łÚÇÜŔ┐ç URL šë╣ňżü´╝ë´╝Ü\r\n//   feishu / telegram / discord / slack / generic\r\n// Úú×ń╣Ž´╝ÜňĆĹňŹíšëçŠÂłŠü»´╝łŠáçÚóś + ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŠĽ░ + ŔĚ│ŔŻČŠîëÚĺ«´╝ë\r\n// Telegram´╝ÜsendMessage API\r\n// Discord/Slack´╝Ü{ content: \"...\" }\r\n// ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą Ôćĺ warn´╝îńŞŹŠŐŤňç║\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 11. Šľ░ňó× Config ňşŚŠ«Á\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// src/heartbeat/config.ts\r\nreadonly locale: string              // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: 'en'\r\nreadonly gh_pages_branch: string     // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: ''´╝łńŞŹÚâĘšŻ▓´╝ë\r\nreadonly cname: string               // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: ''\r\nreadonly webhook_url: string         // Ú╗śŔ«Ą: ''\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 12. Šëęň▒Ľ BuildReportOptions\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// src/types/report.ts\r\nlocale?: string           // Ú╗śŔ«Ą 'en'\r\nghPagesBranch?: string    // Ú╗śŔ«Ą ''\r\ncname?: string            // Ú╗śŔ«Ą ''\r\nwebhookUrl?: string       // Ú╗śŔ«Ą ''\r\nnewSessionIds?: string[]  // ŠťČŠČíŠľ░ňó×šÜä session´╝łwebhook šöĘ´╝ë\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Ŕżôňç║šŤ«ňŻĽš╗ôŠ×ä´╝łŠŤ┤Šľ░ňÉÄ´╝ë\r\n\r\n```\r\nMemory/07_reports/\r\n  index.html              ÔćÉ Dashboard´╝łŠŤ┤Šľ░ňŞâň▒Ç´╝ë\r\n  graph.html              ÔćÉ ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łŠľ░ňó×´╝ë\r\n  projects/\r\n    index.html            ÔćÉ Úí╣šŤ«ňłŚŔíĘ´╝łŠľ░ňó×´╝ë\r\n  transcripts/\r\n    index.html            ÔćÉ Sessions´╝łňŐá Client tab´╝ë\r\n    claude/...\r\n    codex/...\r\n    gemini/...\r\n  goals/index.html\r\n  todos/index.html        ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×\r\n  knowledge/index.html\r\n  archive/index.html      ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×\r\n  search.html\r\n  CNAME                   ÔćÉ Šľ░ňó×´╝łif cname ÚůŹšŻ«ń║ć´╝ë\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## ŠÁőŔ»ĽŔ«íňłĺ\r\n\r\n| ŠÁőŔ»ĽŠľçń╗Â | ŔŽćšŤľňćůň«╣ |\r\n|---------|---------|\r\n| `tests/report/i18n.test.ts` | en/zh-CN ŠëÇŠťë key ňşśňťĘ´╝ŤŠť¬ščą locale ňŤ×ÚÇÇ en |\r\n| `tests/report/render/projects.test.ts` | extractProject()´╝Ťšę║ cwd´╝ŤŠîëÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš╗ä |\r\n| `tests/report/render/graph.test.ts` | ŔŐéšé╣/Ŕż╣šöčŠłÉ´╝Ť>500 ŔŐéšé╣Šł¬Šľş´╝Ťšę║ňŤżňĄäšÉć |\r\n| `tests/report/deploy/github-pages.test.ts` | CNAME Šľçń╗Â´╝Ťšę║ branch ŔĚ│Ŕ┐ç´╝Ťgit ňĹŻń╗ĄŠşúší« |\r\n| `tests/report/deploy/webhook.test.ts` | ň╣│ňĆ░Ŕ»ćňłź´╝ŤšŻĹš╗ťňĄ▒Ŕ┤ąńŞŹŠŐŤňç║´╝Ťpayload Šá╝ň╝Ć |\r\n| `tests/heartbeat/config.test.ts` | Šľ░ňó× 4 ńŞ¬ňşŚŠ«ÁšÜäŔ»╗ňĆľ/Ú╗śŔ«ĄňÇ╝/round-trip |\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## ň«×šÄ░Úí║ň║Ć\r\n\r\n1. i18n š│╗š╗č´╝ł`src/report/i18n/`´╝ë+ ŠÁőŔ»Ľ\r\n2. CSS ÚçŹŠ×ä´╝łńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ + ń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗Úóś + ňôŹň║öň╝Ć´╝ë\r\n3. layout.ts ňŹçš║ž´╝łhtmlShell Šľ░š╗ôŠ×ä´╝ŤrenderNav Šö╣ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ´╝ë\r\n4. config.ts + types/report.ts ňŐáŠľ░ňşŚŠ«Á\r\n5. todos.ts + archive.ts´╝łňĄŹšöĘ goals ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\r\n6. projects.ts´╝łŠľ░ÚíÁÚŁó´╝ë\r\n7. graph.ts´╝łščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝ë\r\n8. transcript-list.ts´╝łClient tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\r\n9. ŠëÇŠťëŠŞ▓ŠčôňçŻŠĽ░ń╝áňůą Translations\r\n10. deploy/github-pages.ts + webhook.ts + ŠÁőŔ»Ľ\r\n11. build.ts ŠĽ┤ňÉłŠëÇŠťëŠľ░ÚíÁÚŁó + deploy + webhook\r\n12. heartbeat.ts ń╝áŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Á\r\n13. ňůĘÚçĆŠ×äň╗║ + ŠÁőŔ»Ľ\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## ń║îŠťčňżůňüÜ´╝łŔ«░ňŻĽňşśŠíú´╝îŠťČŠČíńŞŹň«×šÄ░´╝ë\r\n\r\n- [ ] ŠľçšźášŤ«ňŻĽ TOC´╝łKnowledge / Goals ÚíÁÚŁóňćůÚöÜšé╣´╝ë\r\n- [ ] Breadcrumbs ň»╝Ŕł¬ŔĚ»ňżä\r\n- [ ] Reader Mode´╝łńŞôŠ│ĘÚśůŔ»╗ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ë\r\n- [ ] RSS Feed´╝łfeed.xml´╝ë\r\n- [ ] Mermaid ňŤżŔíĘŠŞ▓Ščô\r\n- [ ] SPA ň«óŠłĚšź»ŔĚ»šö▒´╝łhistory.pushState´╝îÚü┐ňůŹŠĽ┤ÚíÁňłĚŠľ░´╝ë\r\n- [ ] Callouts ŠáĚň╝Ć´╝ł`> [!note]`ŃÇü`> [!warning]`´╝ë\r\n- [ ] Social Preview Cards´╝łOpen Graph meta Šáçšşż´╝ë\r\n- [ ] Šľ╣Šíł B i18n´╝łňĄÜŔ»şŔĘÇň╣Âňşś + ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŔç¬ňŐĘŔ»ćňłź´╝ë\r\n- [ ] ŠÉťš┤óŠö»Šîü client/project Ŕ┐çŠ╗Ą\r\n- [ ] ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆŠŐśňĆášŐÂŠÇüŔ«░ň┐ć´╝łlocalStorage´╝ë\r\n- [ ] ń╝ÜŔ»Ł tag š│╗š╗č´╝łAI Ŕç¬ňŐĘŠĆÉňĆľňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź´╝ë\r\n- [ ] ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆňŤżŠáçŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ł768ÔÇô1024px š¬äšëł´╝ë\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Ú¬îŔ»üŠşąÚ¬Ą\r\n\r\n```bash\r\ncd C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow\r\n\r\n# 1. Š×äň╗║\r\nnpm run build\r\n\r\n# 2. ňůĘÚçĆŠÁőŔ»Ľ´╝łšŤ«Šáç 550+ ÚÇÜŔ┐ç´╝î0 ňĄ▒Ŕ┤ą´╝ë\r\nnpm test\r\n\r\n# 3. šöčŠłÉŠŐąňĹŐ´╝łńŞşŠľç´╝îńŞŹňÉ»šöĘ AI´╝ë\r\nnode dist/cli.js report build --root D:/demo1/openmnemo --no-ai\r\n\r\n# 4. ňÉ»ňŐĘÚóäŔžł\r\nnode dist/cli.js report serve --dir D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/07_reports --port 4321\r\n\r\n# 5. Ú¬îŔ»üŠŞůňŹĽ\r\n# Ôťů http://localhost:4321/              Ôćĺ ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆ´╝îńŞşŠľç UI\r\n# Ôťů šé╣ňç╗ ÔśÇ/Ôśż                          Ôćĺ ń║«/ŠÜŚňłçŠŹó´╝îňłĚŠľ░ń┐ŁšĽÖ\r\n# Ôťů ŠëőŠť║ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝ł<768px´╝ë                  Ôćĺ hamburger ŠśżšĄ║´╝îšé╣ňç╗ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆŠ╗Ĺňç║\r\n# Ôťů /graph.html                        Ôćĺ ŔŐéšé╣ňĆ»Ŕžü´╝îhover Úźśń║«´╝îclick ŔĚ│ŔŻČ\r\n# Ôťů /projects/index.html               Ôćĺ Šîë cwd ňłćš╗äÚí╣šŤ«ňłŚŔíĘ\r\n# Ôťů /transcripts/index.html            Ôćĺ Client tab šşŤÚÇëŠşúňŞŞ\r\n# Ôťů /todos/index.html, /archive/       Ôćĺ ŠşúňŞŞŠŞ▓Ščô´╝łŠłľšę║šŐÂŠÇü´╝ë\r\n# Ôťů CNAME Šľçń╗Â´╝łif cname ÚůŹšŻ«´╝ë\r\n# Ôťů Webhook ÚÇÜščą´╝łif webhook_url ÚůŹšŻ«´╝ë\r\n```\r\n",

# AGENTS.md

## Read Order
- Read this file first.
- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.
- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.

## Memory Rules
- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.
- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.
- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.

## Transcript Rules
- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.
- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.
- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.
- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.
- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.

## Git Rules
- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.
- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.
- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.

## Heartbeat Rules
- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.
- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.
- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.
- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.
- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.
- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.

{
  "name": "@openmnemo/cli",
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "type": "module",
  "description": "OpenMnemo unified CLI ÔÇö manage AI conversation memory",
  "bin": {
    "openmnemo": "./dist/main.js"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo.git",
    "directory": "packages/cli"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo#readme",
  "author": "OpenMnemo Contributors",
  "license": "MIT",
  "keywords": ["openmnemo", "memory", "cli", "transcript", "ai", "claude", "codex", "gemini"],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsup",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "lint": "eslint src tests",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@openmnemo/core": "workspace:*",
    "@openmnemo/sync": "workspace:*",
    "@openmnemo/types": "workspace:*",
    "commander": "^13.1.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^25.5.0",
    "tsup": "^8.4.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.3",
    "vitest": "^3.1.1"
  },
  "files": ["dist"]
}

Bash output=/** * MemoryTree CLI ÔÇö unified entry point. * Registers all subcommands via commander. */ import { Command } from 'commander' const program = new Command() program .name('memory...
Show output payload 
/**
 * MemoryTree CLI ÔÇö unified entry point.
 * Registers all subcommands via commander.
 */

import { Command } from 'commander'

const program = new Command()

program
  .name('memorytree')
  .description('MemoryTree ÔÇö transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity')
  .version('0.1.0')

// ÔöÇÔöÇ init ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('init')
  .description('Initialize a MemoryTree workspace in a repository')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
  .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Initial goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Template locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
  .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
  .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
  .option('--skip-agents', 'Deprecated ÔÇö use upgrade instead')
  .option('--force', 'Overwrite existing generated files')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdInit } = await import('./cmd-init.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdInit({
      root: opts.root,
      projectName: opts.projectName,
      goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
      locale: opts.locale,
      date: opts.date ?? '',
      time: opts.time ?? '',
      skipAgents: opts.skipAgents ?? false,
      force: opts.force ?? false,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ upgrade ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('upgrade')
  .description('Upgrade a repository to MemoryTree without overwriting existing policy')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
  .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Fallback goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
  .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
  .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdUpgrade } = await import('./cmd-upgrade.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdUpgrade({
      root: opts.root,
      projectName: opts.projectName,
      goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
      locale: opts.locale,
      date: opts.date ?? '',
      time: opts.time ?? '',
      format: opts.format,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ import ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('import')
  .description('Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives')
  .requiredOption('--source <path>', 'Raw transcript source file path')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--client <client>', 'Transcript client: auto, codex, claude, gemini', 'auto')
  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
  .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdImport } = await import('./cmd-import.js')
    process.exitCode = await cmdImport({
      root: opts.root,
      source: opts.source,
      client: opts.client,
      projectName: opts.projectName,
      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
      rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
      format: opts.format,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ discover ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('discover')
  .description('Discover and import local AI transcripts')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--client <client>', 'Client filter: all, codex, claude, gemini', 'all')
  .option('--scope <scope>', 'Scope: current-project or all-projects', 'all-projects')
  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
  .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
  .option('--limit <n>', 'Limit discovered sources', '0')
  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdDiscover } = await import('./cmd-discover.js')
    process.exitCode = await cmdDiscover({
      root: opts.root,
      client: opts.client,
      scope: opts.scope,
      projectName: opts.projectName,
      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
      rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
      limit: parseInt(opts.limit, 10) || 0,
      format: opts.format,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ locale ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('locale')
  .description('Detect the effective locale for a repository')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale value', 'auto')
  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdLocale } = await import('./cmd-locale.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdLocale({
      root: opts.root,
      locale: opts.locale,
      format: opts.format,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ recall ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

program
  .command('recall')
  .description('On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall')
  .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
  .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
  .option('--activation-time <time>', 'ISO timestamp of session activation')
  .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdRecall } = await import('./cmd-recall.js')
    process.exitCode = await cmdRecall({
      root: opts.root,
      projectName: opts.projectName,
      globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
      activationTime: opts.activationTime ?? '',
      format: opts.format,
    })
  })

// ÔöÇÔöÇ daemon ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ

const daemon = program
  .command('daemon')
  .description('Manage the MemoryTree heartbeat lifecycle')

daemon
  .command('install')
  .description('Register heartbeat with the OS scheduler')
  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override heartbeat interval (e.g., "5m")')
  .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Override auto_push setting (true/false)')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdInstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdInstall({
      interval: opts.interval,
      autoPush: opts.autoPush,
    })
  })

daemon
  .command('uninstall')
  .description('Remove the heartbeat scheduled task')
  .action(async () => {
    const { cmdUninstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdUninstall()
  })

daemon
  .command('run-once')
  .description('Execute a single heartbeat cycle now')
  .action(async () => {
    const { cmdRunOnce } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
    process.exitCode = await cmdRunOnce()
  })

daemon
  .command('watch')
  .description('Continuous heartbeat loop (development only)')
  .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override interval')
  .action(async (opts) => {
    const { cmdWatch } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
    process.exitCode = await cmdWatch({ interval: opts.interval })
  })

daemon
  .command('status')
  .description('Show heartbeat registration and lock state')
  .action(async () => {
    const { cmdStatus } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
    process.exitCode = cmdStatus()
  })

program.parse()
===
# Project Goal v001

## Metadata
- Version: v001
- Created: 2026-03-16
- Previous: none

## North Star
Build a cross-platform AI conversation memory tool that aggregates, searches, and version-controls coding sessions across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.

## Scope
- Define the stable objective.
- Define constraints and non-goals.

## Acceptance Signals
- Describe the observable project-level outcomes.
- Describe what success looks like.

## Change Log
- 2026-03-16: Initial goal version created.
===

- Status: active

- [ ] Milestone 2

## In Progress

## Done

## Pending

/**
 * Load, validate, and manage ~/.memorytree/config.toml.
 * Port of scripts/_config_utils.py
 */

import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'
import { homedir } from 'node:os'
import { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'

import { parse as parseToml } from 'smol-toml'

import { toPosixPath } from '@openmnemo/core'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Constants
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
const DEFAULT_AUTO_PUSH = true
const DEFAULT_LOG_LEVEL = 'info'
const VALID_LOG_LEVELS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error'])

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Types
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface ProjectEntry {
  readonly path: string
  readonly name: string
}

export interface Config {
  readonly heartbeat_interval: string
  readonly watch_dirs: readonly string[]
  readonly projects: readonly ProjectEntry[]
  readonly auto_push: boolean
  readonly log_level: string
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Path helpers
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function memorytreeRoot(): string {
  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree')
}

export function configPath(): string {
  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'config.toml')
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Load / Save
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function loadConfig(): Config {
  const path = configPath()
  if (!existsSync(path)) {
    return defaultConfig()
  }
===
/**
 * MemoryTree heartbeat ÔÇö single execution, stateless, idempotent.
 * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py
 */

import type { ParsedTranscript } from '@openmnemo/types'
import { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { parseTranscript } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { slugify } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '@openmnemo/core'
import type { Config } from './config.js'
import { loadConfig } from './config.js'
import { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'
import { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'
import type { LogLevel } from './log.js'
import { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'
import { git } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { toPosixPath } from '@openmnemo/core'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'
import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Sensitive pattern detection
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
  /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  /(?:secret|token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+/i,
  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\S{10,}/,
  /Bearer\s+\S{20,}/i,
]

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Main entry point
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export async function main(): Promise<number> {
  const config = loadConfig()

# OpenMnemo

[![CI](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![npm](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@openmnemo/cli)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@openmnemo/cli)

Cross-platform AI conversation memory ÔÇö aggregate, search, and version-control your coding sessions across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.

> Named after Mnemosyne, the Greek goddess of memory.

## Architecture

Monorepo powered by pnpm workspaces + Turborepo.

```
packages/
  types/    @openmnemo/types    ÔÇö shared TypeScript interfaces
  core/     @openmnemo/core     ÔÇö transcript parsing, import, dedup, indexing
  sync/     @openmnemo/sync     ÔÇö heartbeat daemon, config, lock, background sync
  cli/      @openmnemo/cli      ÔÇö unified CLI (openmnemo command)
```

## Package Dependency Graph

```
@openmnemo/types
    ÔćĹ
@openmnemo/core  (depends on types)
    ÔćĹ
@openmnemo/sync  (depends on types + core)
    ÔćĹ
@openmnemo/cli   (depends on types + core + sync)
```

## Supported Clients

| Client | Transcript Format | Status |
|--------|------------------|--------|
| Claude Code | JSONL | Planned |
| Codex | JSONL | Planned |
| Gemini CLI | JSON/JSONL | Planned |

## Install

```bash
npx @openmnemo/cli --help
# or
npm install -g @openmnemo/cli
```

## Features

- Multi-client transcript discovery and incremental import
- Deterministic cleaning (no model tokens spent)
- SQLite full-text search index (sql.js, zero native deps)
- Background heartbeat daemon with OS-native scheduling
- Git-based version control for conversation history
- Cross-session context recall
- Sensitive info detection (warn-only, no auto-redact)

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20
- pnpm >= 9

## Development

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm build
pnpm test
```

## Related

- [memorytree-workflow](https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow) ÔÇö the Skill that powers MemoryTree project memory (upstream source)

## License

MIT

  "content": "# OpenMnemo ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž\n\n> šëłŠťČ´╝Üv1.0 ┬Ě ŠŚąŠťč´╝Ü2026-03-17\n\n---\n\n## ńŞÇŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČňťĘŔžúňć│ń╗Çń╣łÚŚ«Úóś\n\n### ŠŚÂń╗úŔâîŠÖ»\n\nňĄžŠĘíň×őŠşúňťĘń╗Ä\"ŔüŐňĄęšÄęňůĚ\"ňĆśŠłÉń║║š▒╗ŠťÇÚçŹŔŽüšÜäšöčń║žňŐŤňĚąňůĚŃÇéňůĘšÉâŠĽ░ń║┐ń║║Š»ĆňĄęšöĘ ClaudeŃÇüChatGPTŃÇüGeminiŃÇüCopilot ňĚąńŻťŃÇüňşŽń╣áŃÇüňłŤńŻťŃÇé\n\nńŻćŠëÇŠťëń║║ÚâŻÚŁóńŞ┤ňÉîńŞÇńŞ¬šŚŤšé╣ÔÇöÔÇö\n\n### ŠáŞň┐âšŚŤšé╣\n\n**1. Ŕ«░ň┐ćšóÄšëçňîľ**\nšöĘŠłĚňťĘ VS Code ÚçîšöĘ Copilot ňćÖń╗úšáüŃÇüňťĘšŻĹÚíÁšöĘ ChatGPT ŔüŐŠľ╣ŠíłŃÇüňťĘŠëőŠť║šöĘ Gemini ÚŚ«ÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇüňťĘÚú×ń╣ŽÚçîŔ«ĘŔ«║ÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇéŔ┐Öń║Ťň»╣Ŕ»ŁŠĽúŔÉŻňťĘ N ńŞ¬ňĚąňůĚŃÇüN ńŞ¬ň╣│ňĆ░´╝îŠŚáŠ│Ľš╗čńŞÇš«íšÉć´╝îŠŚÂÚŚ┤ńŞÇÚĽ┐ňůĘÚâĘÚüŚň┐śŃÇé\n\n**2. ńŞŐńŞőŠľçňĄ▒ŠÄž**\nÚĽ┐ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŔÂŐŠŁąŔÂŐÚĽ┐´╝îňĄžŠĘíň×őšÜäŠ│ĘŠäĆňŐŤŠť║ňłÂń╝ÜŔ«ęŠŚęŠťčňćůň«╣Ŕóź\"ŠĚ╣Š▓í\"ŃÇéň╣│ňĆ░Šľ╣ňüÜÚ╗ĹšŤĺňÄőš╝ę´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹščąÚüôńŞóń║ćń╗Çń╣ł´╝îň»╝Ŕç┤ AI ňĆŹňĄŹň╣╗ŔžëŃÇüňĆŹňĄŹňüĆšŽ╗šŤ«Šáç´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹňżŚńŞŹńŞÇÚüŹÚüŹÚçŹŠľ░ŠŐĽňľéŔâîŠÖ»ŃÇé\n\n**3. ŔÁäń║žňŻĺÚŤÂ**\nšöĘŠłĚŔŐ▒ń║ćňĄžÚçĆŠŚÂÚŚ┤ňĺî AI ń║ĄŠÁü´╝îÚçîÚŁóŠťëŠâ│Š│ĽŃÇüŠťëňć│šşľŃÇüŠťëňłŤńŻťŔ┐çšĘőŃÇéńŻćŔ┐Öń║ŤňůĘÚâĘŠś»ň╣│ňĆ░šÜäŠĽ░ŠŹ«´╝îńŞŹň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚŃÇéň╣│ňĆ░ňů│ÚŚşŃÇüŔ┤ŽňĆĚň░üšŽü´╝îńŞÇňłçŠŞůÚŤÂŃÇé\n\n### ÚŚ«ÚóśŔžäŠĘí\n\n- ňůĘšÉâ AI ň»╣Ŕ»ŁňĚąňůĚŠťłŠ┤╗´╝Ü**ŔÂůŔ┐ç 5 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ**\n- Š»Ćń║║Š»ĆňĄęň╣│ňŁçňĆĹŔÁĚ AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝Ü**3-10 ŠČí**\n- šöĘŠłĚŔâŻŠëżňŤ×ńŞÇńŞ¬ŠťłňëŹŠčÉŠČíň»╣Ŕ»ŁšÜäŠŽéšÄç´╝Ü**< 5%**\n\nŔ┐ÖńŞŹŠś»ň░ĆÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇéŔ┐ÖŠś» AI ŠŚÂń╗úŠťÇňĄžšÜäń┐íŠü»ŠŹčŔÇŚŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ń║îŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČšÜäŔžúŠ│Ľ\n\n**OpenMnemo** ÔÇöÔÇö ń║║š▒╗ńŞÄ AI ń║Ąń║ĺšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćŠôŹńŻťš│╗š╗č\n\nŠáŞň┐âšÉćň┐Á´╝Ü**ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô**\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŠëÇŠťë AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n        Ôćô\nŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŠŞůŠ┤ŚŃÇüňłćš▒╗ŃÇüš┤óň╝Ľ\n        Ôćô\nňşśňůąšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Git ń╗ôň║ô´╝łŠťČňť░ń╝śňůł´╝ë\n        Ôćô\nš╗ôŠ×äňîľŔ«░ň┐ć + ňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ + ÚÜĆŠŚÂŠúÇš┤ó\n        Ôćô\nňŞŽšŁÇň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš╗žš╗şńŞőńŞÇŠČíň»╣Ŕ»Ł\nŠŚáň╣╗Ŕžë ┬Ě ńŞŹÚçŹňĄŹŠŐĽňľé ┬Ě ŔÁäń║žŠ░Şń╣ůň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚ\n```\n\n### ňĺîšÄ░Šťëń║žňôüšÜäŠťČŔ┤Ęňî║ňłź\n\n| š╗┤ň║Ž | šÄ░Šťë AI ňĚąňůĚ | OpenMnemo |\n|------|------------|-----------|\n| ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňŻĺň▒× | ň╣│ňĆ░ŠÄžňłÂ | šöĘŠłĚň«îňůĘŠőąŠťë |\n| ŔĚĘň╣│ňĆ░ | ňÉäŔç¬ň░üÚŚş | ňůĘň╣│ňĆ░š╗čńŞÇŠ▒çŔüÜ |\n| Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠîüń╣ůŠÇž | ń╝ÜŔ»Łš╗ôŠŁčňŹ│ŠÂłňĄ▒ | šëłŠťČňîľŠ░Şń╣ůń┐Łňşś |\n| ńŞŐńŞőŠľçš«íšÉć | Ú╗ĹšŤĺňÄőš╝ę | šÖŻšŤĺňĆ»ŠÄž´╝îšöĘŠłĚňć│ň«ÜňŐáŔŻŻń╗Çń╣ł |\n| ŔÁäń║žń╗ĚňÇ╝ | ŠÂłŔÇŚňôü | ňĆ»ŠúÇš┤óŃÇüňĆ»ňĄŹšöĘŃÇüňĆ»ňłćń║źšÜäŠĽ░ňşŚŔÁäń║ž |\n\n---\n\n## ńŞëŃÇüń║žňôüňŻóŠÇüńŞÄŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż\n\n### šČČńŞÇÚśÂŠ«Á´╝łňŻôňëŹ´╝ë´╝ÜCLI + Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐\n- ňĹŻń╗ĄŔíîňĚąňůĚ´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚ Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI šÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n- ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘő´╝î5 ňłćÚĺčňÉîŠşąńŞÇŠČí´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘ push ňł░ GitHub\n- šöčŠłÉňĆ»ŔžćňîľŔ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝îńŞÇÚö«ÚâĘšŻ▓ňł░ GitHub Pages\n- **šŤ«ŠáçšöĘŠłĚ**´╝ÜÚçŹň║Ž AI š╝ľšĘőšöĘŠłĚ´╝łňůĘšÉâš║Ž 500 ńŞçń║║´╝ë\n\n### šČČń║îÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â\n- ŠŹĽŔÄĚšŻĹÚíÁšëł AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łClaude.ai / ChatGPT / Gemini Web´╝ë\n- šöĘŠłĚŠÄłŠŁâňÉÄ´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘňŻĺŠíúňł░Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ô\n- **ŠëôÚÇÜÚŁ×ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůšöĘŠłĚ´╝îšöĘŠłĚŔžäŠĘíŔĚâňŹç 10 ňÇŹń╗ąńŞŐ**\n\n### šČČńŞëÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜIM ŠÄĘÚÇü\n- Úú×ń╣Ž / Telegram / Discord / Slack Šť║ňÖĘń║║\n- Šľ░Ŕ«░ň┐ćŔç¬ňŐĘŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščą´╝îÚÖäňŞŽŔĚ│ŔŻČÚôżŠÄą\n- Ŕ«ęŔ«░ň┐ć\"ńŞ╗ňŐĘŠëżňł░\"šöĘŠłĚ\n\n### šČČňŤŤÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜWeb šź» + ŠíîÚŁó App\n- ň«îŠĽ┤šÜäŔ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉćšĽîÚŁó\n- ŔĚĘÚí╣šŤ«ŠúÇš┤óŃÇüščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ŃÇüAI š╗şňćÖ\n- Windows / macOS / Linux ňÄčšöčň«óŠłĚšź»\n\n### šČČń║öÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜŠëőŠť║ App + šöčŠÇü\n- iOS / Android´╝îÚÜĆŠŚÂÚÜĆňť░ŠčąšťőŃÇüš╗žš╗şň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n- ňŤóÚśčňŹĆńŻťŃÇüń╗ôň║ôŠĘíŠŁ┐ňŞéňť║\n- šČČńŞëŠľ╣ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇů API\n\n---\n\n## ňŤŤŃÇüňĽćńŞÜŠĘíň╝Ć\n\n### ň╝ÇŠ║É + SaaS ňĆîŔŻĘ\n\n**Š░Şń╣ůňůŹŔ┤╣´╝łň╝ÇŠ║É´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ŠťČňť░ňşśňéĘ + Ŕç¬Šëśš«í\n- ŠëÇŠťëŠáŞň┐âňŐčŔâŻ\n- GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\n\n**ń╗śŔ┤╣šëł´╝łSaaS´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ń║Ĺšź»ňÉîŠşąńŞÄňĄçń╗Ż´╝łŔĚĘŔ«żňĄçŠŚáš╝ŁňłçŠŹó´╝ë\n- ňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║źń╗ôň║ô´╝łňŹĆńŻťňŐčŔâŻ´╝ë\n- AI ňó×ň╝║ŠúÇš┤ó´╝łňÉĹÚçĆŔ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó´╝ë\n- šžüŠťëňîľÚâĘšŻ▓Šö»Šîü´╝łń╝üńŞÜšëł´╝ë\n\n### ŠöÂŔ┤╣ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ\n- ńŞ¬ń║║ńŞôńŞÜšëł´╝Ü$9.9/Šťł\n- ňŤóÚśčšëł´╝Ü$29/Šťł´╝ł5ń║║ŔÁĚ´╝ë\n- ń╝üńŞÜšžüŠťëňîľ´╝ÜŠîëÚťÇň«ÜňłÂ\n\n---\n\n## ń║öŃÇüňŞéňť║ŔžäŠĘí\n\n| ňŞéňť║ň▒éŠČí | ŔžäŠĘí |\n|---------|------|\n| AI š╝ľšĘőňĚąňůĚšöĘŠłĚ´╝łTAM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 2,000 ńŞçň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇů |\n| Š│Ť AI ÚçŹň║ŽšöĘŠłĚ´╝łSAM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 1 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ |\n| 5 ň╣┤ňÉÄŠëÇŠťë AI šöĘŠłĚ´╝łSOM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 10 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ |\n\nŔ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉćŠś»Š»ĆńŞÇńŞ¬ AI šöĘŠłĚšÜäňłÜÚťÇ´╝îŔÇîńŞŹŠś»ň░Ćń╝ŚÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ňůşŃÇüšź×ń║ëń╝śňŐ┐ńŞÄŠŐĄňčÄŠ▓│\n\n**1. ńŞşšźőŠÇž**\nOpenMnemo ńŞŹš╗Ĺň«Üń╗╗ńŻĽ AI ňÄéňĽćŃÇüń╗╗ńŻĽň╣│ňĆ░ŃÇéŔ┐ÖŠś»ňĄžňÄéŠ░ŞŔ┐ťŠŚáŠ│ĽňüÜňł░šÜäÔÇöÔÇöňż«ŔŻ»ŔŽüš╗Ĺ Copilot´╝îOpenAI ŔŽüš╗Ĺ ChatGPT´╝îGoogle ŔŽüš╗Ĺ GeminiŃÇéŠłĹń╗ČŠś»ňö»ńŞÇšťčŠşúńŞşšźőšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň▒éŃÇé\n\n**2. ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâ**\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćňşśňťĘŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Git ń╗ôň║ô´╝îŠłĹń╗ČňĆ¬Šś»ňĚąňůĚŃÇéŔ┐ÖŔžúňć│ń║ćŠťÇŠĚ▒ň▒éšÜäń┐íń╗╗ÚŚ«Úóś´╝îń╣čŠś»ŠťÇň╝║šÜäšöĘŠłĚš▓śŠÇžÔÇöÔÇöšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćŔÂŐšž»š┤»´╝îŔ┐üšž╗ŠłÉŠťČŔÂŐÚźś´╝îšĽÖňşśšÄçŔÂŐÚźśŃÇé\n\n**3. ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšĄżňî║**\nň╝ÇŠ║Éň╗║šźőń┐íń╗╗´╝îšĄżňî║Úę▒ňŐĘń╝áŠĺşŃÇéŠ»ĆńŞ¬ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůÚâŻŠś»šžŹňşÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝îń╣čŠś»ń╝áŠĺşŔŐéšé╣ŃÇé\n\n**4. ňůłňĆĹń╝śňŐ┐**\nŔ«░ň┐ćŔÁäń║žńŞÇŠŚŽšž»š┤»´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹń╝ÜŔ┐üšž╗ŃÇéšČČńŞÇńŞ¬ŔóźšöĘŠłĚń┐íń╗╗šÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň╣│ňĆ░´╝îň░ćÚĽ┐Šťčń┐ŁŠîüÚóćňůłŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ńŞâŃÇüňŻôňëŹšŐÂŠÇü\n\n- **ń║žňôü**´╝ÜŠáŞň┐â CLI ňĚąňůĚňĚ▓ńŞŐš║┐ npm´╝îŠŐÇŠť»Ú¬îŔ»üň«îŠłÉ\n- **ň╝ÇŠ║É**´╝ÜGitHub ňůČň╝Ç´╝îMIT ňŹĆŔ««\n- **Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐**´╝Üň«îŠĽ┤ň«×šÄ░´╝łDashboard / ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ / ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó / GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓´╝ë\n- **Šö»Šîüň«óŠłĚšź»**´╝ÜClaude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI´╝łŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Âň╝ÇňĆĹńŞş´╝ë\n- **ŠŐÇŠť»Šáł**´╝ÜTypeScript / Node.js / SQLite / Git´╝îÚŤÂń║ĹńżŁŔÁľ´╝îň«îňůĘŠťČňť░ňîľ\n\n---\n\n## ňůźŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČÚťÇŔŽüń╗Çń╣ł\n\n**ň»╗Š▒éšžŹňşÉŔŻ«Ŕ×ŹŔÁä´╝îšöĘń║Ä´╝Ü**\n- ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Âň╝ÇňĆĹ´╝łŠëôÚÇÜŠťÇňĄžšöĘŠłĚšżĄńŻô´╝ë\n- ŠáŞň┐âňŤóÚśčŠëęňůů´╝łňůĘŠáł + šž╗ňŐĘšź»´╝ë\n- ňó×ÚĽ┐ńŞÄšĄżňî║Ŕ┐ÉŔÉą\n\n**ŠłĹń╗ČšŤŞń┐í´╝Ü**\nń║║š▒╗ňĺî AI šÜäń║Ąń║ĺŔ«░ň┐ć´╝îŠś»Šť¬ŠŁąŠťÇÚçŹŔŽüšÜäńŞ¬ń║║ŠĽ░ňşŚŔÁäń║žŃÇéOpenMnemo ŔŽüňüÜšÜä´╝îŠś»Ŕ«ęŠ»ĆńŞÇńŞ¬ń║║ÚâŻŔâŻŠőąŠťëŃÇüš«íšÉćŃÇüńŻ┐šöĘŔç¬ňĚ▒ńŞÄ AI ňů▒ňÉîňłŤÚÇášÜäŔ«░ň┐ćÔÇöÔÇöńŞŹŠś»ńŞÇŠŚÂ´╝îŔÇîŠś»ńŞÇšöčŃÇé\n"
}

Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠôŹńŻťš│╗š╗č**´╝îň║Ľň▒éŠś» Git ń╗ôň║ô´╝îńŞŐň▒éŠś»ŔĚĘň╣│ňĆ░Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüš╗ôŠ×äňîľš┤óň╝ĽŃÇüňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ŃÇüń╗ąňĆŐŠť¬ŠŁąšÜäŠÖ║ŔâŻŠúÇš┤óńŞÄš╗şňćÖŔâŻňŐŤŃÇé\n\nŠáŞň┐âŔ«żŔ«íňÄčňłÖ´╝Ü\n- **ŠťČňť░ń╝śňůł**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťëŠĽ░ŠŹ«Ú╗śŔ«ĄňşśňťĘšöĘŠłĚŠťČňť░´╝îń║Ĺšź»Šś»ňĆ»ÚÇëÚí╣\n- **šÖŻšŤĺÚÇĆŠśÄ**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťëňşśňéĘŠá╝ň╝ĆŠś» Markdown + JSONL´╝îń║║ňĆ»Ŕ»╗´╝îňĚąňůĚňĆ»ŔžúŠ×É\n- **ÚŤÂÚöüň«Ü**´╝ÜšöĘŠłĚńŞŹńżŁŔÁľ OpenMnemo ń╣čŔâŻŔ«┐ÚŚ«Ŕç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠĽ░ŠŹ«\n- **ŠŞÉŔ┐Ťňó×ň╝║**´╝Üń╗Ä CLI Ôćĺ ŠĆĺń╗Â Ôćĺ App´╝îŠ»ĆńŞÇň▒éÚâŻŠś»ň«îŠĽ┤ňĆ»šöĘšÜäń║žňôü\n\n---\n\n## ń║îŃÇüňŻôňëŹŠ×ÂŠ×ä\n\n### ń╗úšáüń╗ôň║ôš╗ôŠ×ä\n\n```\nopenmnemo/                    ÔćÉ pnpm monorepo + Turborepo\n  packages/\n    types/    @openmnemo/types   ÔćÉ ňů▒ń║ź TypeScript ŠÄąňĆú\n    core/     @openmnemo/core    ÔćÉ transcript ŔžúŠ×ÉŃÇüň»╝ňůąŃÇüňÄ╗ÚçŹŃÇüSQLite š┤óň╝Ľ\n    sync/     @openmnemo/sync    ÔćÉ ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘőŃÇüconfigŃÇülockŃÇüalert\n    cli/      @openmnemo/cli     ÔćÉ š╗čńŞÇ CLI´╝łopenmnemo ňĹŻń╗Ą´╝ë\n```\n\n### ńżŁŔÁľňů│š│╗\n\n```\n@openmnemo/types\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/core   ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types´╝ë\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/sync   ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types + core´╝ë\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/cli    ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types + core + sync´╝ë\n```\n\n### ŠŐÇŠť»Šáł\n\n| ň▒éŠČí | ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő |\n|------|---------|\n| Ŕ»şŔĘÇ | TypeScript 5.7´╝îstrict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes |\n| ŠĘíňŁŚš│╗š╗č | NodeNext ESM´╝îŠëÇŠťë import ÚťÇ `.js` Šëęň▒ĽňÉŹ |\n| Š×äň╗║ | tsup´╝łňÉäňîůšőČšźőŠ×äň╗║´╝ë + Turborepo´╝łňůĘń╗ôň║ôň╣ÂŔíîŠ×äň╗║´╝ë |\n| ŠÁőŔ»Ľ | Vitest |\n| ňîůš«íšÉć | pnpm workspaces |\n| ňşśňéĘ | SQLite´╝łsql.js´╝îÚŤÂ native ńżŁŔÁľ´╝ë |\n| ÚůŹšŻ« | `~/.memorytree/config.toml`´╝łsmol-toml ŔžúŠ×É´╝ë |\n| Git ŠôŹńŻť | šŤ┤ŠÄą spawn git Ŕ┐ŤšĘő´╝łŠŚá libgit2 ńżŁŔÁľ´╝ë |\n\n---\n\n## ńŞëŃÇüŔ«░ň┐ćňşśňéĘš╗ôŠ×ä\n\n```\nMemory/                         ÔćÉ Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôŠá╣šŤ«ňŻĽ´╝łgit š«íšÉć´╝ë\n  01_goals/                     ÔćÉ Úí╣šŤ«šŤ«ŠáçŠľçń╗Â´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  02_todos/                     ÔćÉ ňżůňŐ×ŠŞůňŹĽ´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  03_chat_logs/                 ÔćÉ ň«×ŠŚÂň»╣Ŕ»ŁŠŚąň┐Ś´╝łMarkdown append-only´╝ë\n  04_knowledge/                 ÔćÉ ščąŔ»ćŠ▓ëŠĚÇ´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  05_archive/                   ÔćÉ ňŻĺŠíúňćůň«╣´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  06_transcripts/\n    raw/{client}/{date}/        ÔćÉ ňÄčňžő transcript´╝łJSONL´╝îňĆ»ÚÇëńŞŐń╝á´╝ë\n    clean/{client}/{date}/      ÔćÉ ŠŞůŠ┤ŚňÉÄ Markdown´╝łŠŚáňĚąňůĚŔ░âšöĘń║őń╗Â´╝ë\n    manifests/{client}/{date}/  ÔćÉ š╗ôŠ×äňîľňůâŠĽ░ŠŹ« JSON´╝łsession š┤óň╝Ľ´╝ë\n  07_reports/                   ÔćÉ šöčŠłÉšÜäÚŁÖŠÇüšŻĹšźÖ´╝łgitignore´╝ë\n  .report-cache/                ÔćÉ AI ŠĹśŔŽüš╝ôňşś´╝łgitignore´╝ë\n```\n\n### ManifestEntry ŠáŞň┐âňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```typescript\ninterface ManifestEntry {\n  session_id: string      // ňůĘň▒Çňö»ńŞÇ ID\n  client: string          // codex | claude | gemini\n  started_at: string      // ISO 8601\n  title: string           // ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŠáçÚóś´╝łń╗ÄÚŽľŠŁíŠÂłŠü»ŠĆÉňĆľ´╝ë\n  message_count: number\n  tool_event_count: number\n  raw_sha256: string      // ňÄčňžőŠľçń╗ÂňôłňŞî´╝îšöĘń║Ä AI ŠĹśŔŽüš╝ôňşś key\n  cwd: string             // ňĚąńŻťšŤ«ňŻĽ´╝łšöĘń║ÄÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš▒╗´╝ë\n  branch: string          // git branch\n  repo_clean_path: string // šŤŞň»╣ń║Äń╗ôň║ôŠá╣šÜäŠŞůŠ┤ŚŠľçń╗ÂŔĚ»ňżä\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ňŤŤŃÇüňÉäÚśÂŠ«ÁŠŐÇŠť»ń╗╗ňŐí\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 1´╝ÜCLI + Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝łŔ┐ŤŔíîńŞş´╝ë\n\n**ňĚ▓ň«îŠłÉ´╝Ü**\n- Ôťů transcript ŔžúŠ×É´╝łClaude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI JSONL Šá╝ň╝Ć´╝ë\n- Ôťů ňó×ÚçĆň»╝ňůą + SHA256 ňÄ╗ÚçŹ\n- Ôťů SQLite FTS5 ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤óš┤óň╝Ľ\n- Ôťů ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘő´╝łWindows Task Scheduler / cron´╝ë\n- Ôťů Ŕç¬ňŐĘ git commit + push\n- Ôťů Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝łreport build ňĹŻń╗Ą´╝ë´╝Ü\n  - Dashboard + Š┤╗ňŐĘšâşňŐŤňŤż + ň«óŠłĚšź»ňłćňŞâňŤż\n  - Sessions ňłŚŔíĘ´╝łŠîë client tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\n  - Projects ÚíÁ´╝łŠîë cwd Ŕç¬ňŐĘňłćš╗ä´╝ë\n  - Knowledge / Goals / Todos / Archive ÚíÁ\n  - ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łforce-directed´╝îcanvas´╝îŠŚá CDN´╝ë\n  - ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó´╝łclient + project Ŕ┐çŠ╗Ą´╝ë\n  - ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆň»╝Ŕł¬ + ŠÜŚ/ń║«Ŕë▓ňłçŠŹó + ňôŹň║öň╝Ć + ŠëőŠť║šź»\n  - i18n´╝łen / zh-CN´╝ë\n  - GitHub Pages Ŕç¬ňŐĘÚâĘšŻ▓´╝łgit subtree push´╝ë\n  - Webhook ÚÇÜščą´╝łÚú×ń╣Ž / Telegram / Discord / Slack´╝ë\n  - AI ŠĹśŔŽü´╝łSHA256 š╝ôňşś´╝îclaude-haiku´╝ë\n  - AI ňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź Tag ŠĆÉňĆľ\n\n**ňżůň«îŠłÉ´╝łšž╗ŠĄŹ´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ÔŁî report ňŐčŔâŻň░ÜŠť¬ń╗Ä `memorytree-workflow` šž╗ŠĄŹňł░ `packages/` š╗ôŠ×ä\n- ÔŁî `packages/sync/src/config.ts` š╝║ň░ĹŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Á´╝łlocale / gh_pages_branch / webhook_url šşë´╝ë\n- ÔŁî `packages/cli/src/main.ts` š╝║ň░Ĺ šşëňĚąňůĚňçŻŠĽ░ňĚ▓ňťĘ core ŠłľšőČšźő\n    deploy/       ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    stats.ts      ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    summarize.ts  ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    tags.ts       ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    build.ts Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôŠÁĆŔžł´╝łŠáĹňŻóš╗ôŠ×ä + ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó´╝ë\n- ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ń║Ąń║ĺ´╝łŠ»öÚŁÖŠÇüšëłŠŤ┤ńŞ░ň»î´╝ë\n- AI š╗şňćÖ´╝łÚÇëńŞşńŞÇŠ«ÁňÄćňĆ▓ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝îš╗žš╗ş´╝ë\n- ňÉĹÚçĆŔ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó´╝ł\"ŠëżŠłĹńŞŐňĹĘŔ«ĘŔ«║Ŕ┐çšÜäŔ«ĄŔ»üŠľ╣Šíł\"´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 5´╝ÜŠíîÚŁó App + ŠëőŠť║ App\n\n**ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő´╝Ü**\n- ŠíîÚŁó´╝Ü**Tauri**´╝łRust + WebView´╝îŠ»ö Electron ŔŻ╗ 10 ňÇŹ´╝îňÄčšöčŔ«┐ÚŚ«ŠťČňť░Šľçń╗Âš│╗š╗č´╝ë\n- ŠëőŠť║´╝Ü**React Native** Šłľ **Flutter**´╝łÚťÇŔŽüŔ░âšáö´╝ë\n\n**ŠíîÚŁó App ŠáŞň┐âŔâŻňŐŤ´╝Ü**\n- Ŕ»╗ňĆľŠťČňť░ŠëÇŠťë AI ňĚąňůĚšÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łVS Code ŠĆĺń╗ÂšŤ«ňŻĽŃÇüCodex šŤ«ňŻĽšşë´╝ë\n- ŠťČňť░ daemon š«íšÉćšĽîÚŁó´╝łńŞŹÚťÇŔŽüňĹŻń╗ĄŔíî´╝ë\n- ň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉć´╝łňó×ňłáŠö╣Ščą´╝ë\n\n---\n\n## ń║öŃÇüÚťÇŔŽüŠľ░ňó×šÜä config ňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```toml\n# ~/.memorytree/config.toml´╝łň«îŠĽ┤šëł´╝ë\n\nheartbeat_interval = \"5m\"\nauto_push = true\nlog_level = \"info\"\n\n# ŠŐąňĹŐšŤŞňů│\ngenerate_report = true\nlocale = \"zh-CN\"\nai_summary_model = \"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\"\n\n# GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\ngh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\"\ncname = \"\"                    # Ŕç¬ň«Üń╣ëňččňÉŹ´╝îšĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹšöčŠłÉ CNAME\n\n# ÚÇÜščą\nwebhook_url = \"\" ňůşŃÇüňÉĹÚçĆŠúÇš┤óŔžäňłĺ´╝łńŞşŠťč´╝ë\n\nňŻôňëŹ´╝ÜSQLite FTS5´╝łňů│Úö«Ŕ»ŹňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó´╝ë\nšŤ«Šáç´╝ÜŔ»şń╣ëňÉĹÚçĆŠÉťš┤ó´╝ł\"ŠëżŠłĹŔ«ĘŔ«║Ŕ┐çŔ«ĄŔ»üŠľ╣ŠíłšÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\"´╝ë\n\n**Šľ╣Šíł´╝Ü**\n- ňÁîňůąŠĘíň×ő´╝Ü`text-embedding-3-small`´╝łOpenAI´╝ëŠłľŠťČňť░ŠĘíň×ő´╝ł`all-MiniLM-L6-v2`´╝ë\n- ňÉĹÚçĆňşśňéĘ´╝ÜSQLite + sqlite-vec Šëęň▒Ľ´╝łÚŤÂÚóŁňĄľŠťŹňŐí´╝îš╗žš╗şŠťČňť░ń╝śňůłňÄčňłÖ´╝ë\n- š┤óň╝ĽŠŚÂŠť║´╝Üň┐âŔĚ│ŔžŽňĆĹ Ôćĺ Šľ░ transcript Ôćĺ šöčŠłÉňÁîňůą Ôćĺ ňşśňůą SQLite\n\n---\n\n## ńŞâŃÇüŔ┐ĹŠťčń╝śňůłš║ž´╝łŠťČŠťł´╝ë\n\n```\nP0 - ň┐ůÚí╗ň«îŠłÉ´╝Ü\n  1. packages/report/ šž╗ŠĄŹ´╝łń╗Ä ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗ÂŠŐÇŠť»Šľ╣Šíłší«ň«Ü\n  9. ňÉĹÚçĆŠúÇš┤óŠľ╣ŠíłÚÇëň×ő\n```\n\n---\n\n## ňůźŃÇüň╝ÇňĆĹŔžäŔîâ\n\n- **ńŞŹňĆ»ňĆśŠĽ░ŠŹ«**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťëŠĽ░š╗ä/ň»╣Ŕ▒íŠŤ┤Šľ░Ŕ┐öňŤ×Šľ░ňë»ŠťČ´╝îńŞŹšöĘ `.push()` ňÄčňť░ń┐«Šö╣\n- **ÚöÖŔ»»ňĄäšÉć**´╝ÜŠ»Ćň▒éŠśżň╝ĆňĄäšÉć´╝îńŞŹňÉ×ŠÄëÚöÖŔ»»´╝îUI ň▒éš╗ÖňĆőňąŻŠĆÉšĄ║´╝îŠťŹňŐíň▒éŔ«░Ŕ»Žš╗ćŠŚąň┐Ś\n- **ŔżôňůąŠáíÚ¬î**´╝ÜňťĘš│╗š╗čŔż╣šĽî´╝łšöĘŠłĚŔżôňůąŃÇüňĄľÚâĘ API Ŕ┐öňŤ×ŃÇüŠľçń╗Âňćůň«╣´╝ëňüÜÚ¬îŔ»ü´╝îňćůÚâĘńŞŹŔ┐çň║ŽŠáíÚ¬î\n- **ň░ĆŠľçń╗ÂňÄčňłÖ**´╝ÜňŹĽŠľçń╗Â 200-400 ŔíîńŞ║ň«ť´╝îŠťÇňĄžńŞŹŔÂůŔ┐ç 800 Ŕíî\n- **ŠÁőŔ»ĽŔŽćšŤľšÄç**´╝ÜÔëą 80%´╝îTDD ń╝śňůł´╝îňůłňćÖŠÁőŔ»ĽňćŹňćÖň«×šÄ░\n- **ň«ëňůĘ**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťë HTML Ŕżôňç║ň┐ůÚí╗ `escHtml()`´╝îJSON ňÁîňůą `<script>` ÚťÇŔŻČń╣ë `</`´╝îńŞŹšíČš╝ľšáüň»ćÚĺą\n"

   128Ôćĺ
   129Ôćĺ---
   130Ôćĺ
   131Ôćĺ## ňůşŃÇüšź×ń║ëń╝śňŐ┐ńŞÄŠŐĄňčÄŠ▓│
   132Ôćĺ
   133Ôćĺ**1. ńŞşšźőŠÇž**
   134ÔćĺOpenMnemo ńŞŹš╗Ĺň«Üń╗╗ńŻĽ AI ňÄéňĽćŃÇüń╗╗ńŻĽň╣│ňĆ░ŃÇéŔ┐ÖŠś»ňĄžňÄéŠ░ŞŔ┐ťŠŚáŠ│ĽňüÜňł░šÜäÔÇöÔÇöňż«ŔŻ»ŔŽüš╗Ĺ Copilot´╝îOpenAI ŔŽüš╗Ĺ ChatGPT´╝îGoogle ŔŽüš╗Ĺ GeminiŃÇéŠłĹń╗ČŠś»ňö»ńŞÇšťčŠşúńŞşšźőšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň▒éŃÇé
