   137ÔćĺšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćňşśňťĘŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Git ń╗ôň║ô´╝îŠłĹń╗ČňĆ¬Šś»ňĚąňůĚŃÇéŔ┐ÖŔžúňć│ń║ćŠťÇŠĚ▒ň▒éšÜäń┐íń╗╗ÚŚ«Úóś´╝îń╣čŠś»ŠťÇň╝║šÜäšöĘŠłĚš▓śŠÇžÔÇöÔÇöšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćŔÂŐšž»š┤»´╝îŔ┐üšž╗ŠłÉŠťČŔÂŐÚźś´╝îšĽÖňşśšÄçŔÂŐÚźśŃÇé
   138Ôćĺ
   139Ôćĺ**3. ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšĄżňî║**
   140Ôćĺň╝ÇŠ║Éň╗║šźőń┐íń╗╗´╝îšĄżňî║Úę▒ňŐĘń╝áŠĺşŃÇéŠ»ĆńŞ¬ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůÚâŻŠś»šžŹňşÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝îń╣čŠś»ń╝áŠĺşŔŐéšé╣ŃÇé
   141Ôćĺ
   142Ôćĺ**4. ňůłňĆĹń╝śňŐ┐**
   143ÔćĺŔ«░ň┐ćŔÁäń║žńŞÇŠŚŽšž»š┤»´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹń╝ÜŔ┐üšž╗ŃÇéšČČńŞÇńŞ¬ŔóźšöĘŠłĚń┐íń╗╗šÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň╣│ňĆ░´╝îň░ćÚĽ┐Šťčń┐ŁŠîüÚóćňůłŃÇé
   144Ôćĺ
   145Ôćĺ---
   146Ôćĺ

   148Ôćĺ
   149Ôćĺ- **ń║žňôü**´╝ÜŠáŞň┐â CLI ňĚąňůĚňĚ▓ńŞŐš║┐ npm´╝îŠŐÇŠť»Ú¬îŔ»üň«îŠłÉ

   153Ôćĺ- **ŠŐÇŠť»Šáł**´╝ÜTypeScript / Node.js / SQLite / Git´╝îÚŤÂń║ĹńżŁŔÁľ´╝îň«îňůĘŠťČňť░ňîľ

Edit input={"file_path":"D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐĽŔÁäń║║.md","new_string":"ŠáŞň┐âšÉćň┐Á´╝Ü**ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô**\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŠëÇŠťë AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n Ôćô\nŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŠŞůŠ┤ŚŃÇüňłćš▒╗ŃÇüš┤óň╝Ľ\n Ôćô\nňşśňůąšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Gitea ń╗ôň║ô\n ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜšŤ┤ŠÄąšöĘ Git...

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐĽŔÁäń║║.md",
  "old_string": "ŠáŞň┐âšÉćň┐Á´╝Ü**ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô**\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŠëÇŠťë AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n        Ôćô\nŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŠŞůŠ┤ŚŃÇüňłćš▒╗ŃÇüš┤óň╝Ľ\n        Ôćô\nňşśňůąšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Git ń╗ôň║ô´╝łŠťČňť░ń╝śňůł´╝ë\n        Ôćô\nš╗ôŠ×äňîľŔ«░ň┐ć + ňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ + ÚÜĆŠŚÂŠúÇš┤ó\n        Ôćô\nňŞŽšŁÇň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš╗žš╗şńŞőńŞÇŠČíň»╣Ŕ»Ł\nŠŚáň╣╗Ŕžë ┬Ě ńŞŹÚçŹňĄŹŠŐĽňľé ┬Ě ŔÁäń║žŠ░Şń╣ůň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚ\n```",
  "new_string": "ŠáŞň┐âšÉćň┐Á´╝Ü**ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô**\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŠëÇŠťë AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n        Ôćô\nŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŠŞůŠ┤ŚŃÇüňłćš▒╗ŃÇüš┤óň╝Ľ\n        Ôćô\nňşśňůąšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Gitea ń╗ôň║ô\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜšŤ┤ŠÄąšöĘ GitHub´╝łÚŤÂÚŚĘŠžŤ´╝ë\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ń╝üńŞÜ/ÚÜÉšžüšöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea´╝łň«îňůĘŔç¬ńŞ╗´╝ë\n        Ôćô\nš╗ôŠ×äňîľŔ«░ň┐ć + ňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ + ÚÜĆŠŚÂŠúÇš┤ó\n        Ôćô\nňŞŽšŁÇň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš╗žš╗şńŞőńŞÇŠČíň»╣Ŕ»Ł\nŠŚáň╣╗Ŕžë ┬Ě ńŞŹÚçŹňĄŹŠŐĽňľé ┬Ě ŔÁäń║žŠ░Şń╣ůň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚ\n```\n\n### ńŞ║ń╗Çń╣łŠś» Gitea´╝îŔÇîńŞŹňĆ¬Šś» Git\n\nGit ňĆ¬Šś»šëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂňŹĆŔ««ŃÇé**Gitea** Šś»ň«îŠĽ┤šÜäń╗úšáüŠëśš«íň╣│ňĆ░ÔÇöÔÇöň╝ÇŠ║ÉŃÇüŔŻ╗ÚçĆŃÇüňĆ»Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓´╝îŠĆÉńżŤń╗ôň║ôš«íšÉćŃÇüIssuesŃÇüWikiŃÇüActionsŃÇüPackages šşëň«îŠĽ┤ŔâŻňŐŤ´╝îŠś» GitHub šÜäň╝ÇŠ║ÉŠŤ┐ń╗úňôüŃÇé\n\nOpenMnemo ń╗ą Gitea ńŞ║ň║Ľň║ž´╝îŠäĆňĹ│šŁÇ´╝Ü\n- šöĘŠłĚňĆ»ń╗ąšöĘ **GitHub**´╝łŠťÇš«ÇňŹĽ´╝îň╝Çš«▒ňŹ│šöĘ´╝ë\n- šöĘŠłĚňĆ»ń╗ą**Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea**´╝łŠĽ░ŠŹ«ň«îňůĘńŞŹšŽ╗ň╝ÇŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ´╝ë\n- ńŞĄšžŹŠľ╣ň╝Ćň»╣šöĘŠłĚň«îňůĘÚÇĆŠśÄ´╝îňŐčŔâŻň«îňůĘńŞÇŔç┤\n- Šť¬ŠŁąŠö»Šîü GitLabŃÇüForgejo šşëń╗╗ńŻĽ Gitea ňů╝ň«╣ň╣│ňĆ░"
}

## ňů│Úö«Ŕ«żŔ«íÚŚ«Úóś´╝Üń╗ôň║ôš▓ĺň║ŽŠÇÄń╣łň«Ü

šöĘŠłĚŔ»┤"ňĚąńŻťńŞşÚóćň»╝ň«ëŠÄĺńŞÇńŞ¬ń║őŠâů"Ôćĺ Ŕ┐ÖÚçîŠťëńŞĄň▒é´╝Ü

Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ/š╗äš╗ç
  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňĚąńŻť´╝łňĄžš▒╗ń╗ôň║ô´╝ë
       ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ Úí╣šŤ«A´╝łňşÉń╗ôň║ô´╝čŠłľňşÉšŤ«ňŻĽ´╝č´╝ë
            ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ń╗╗ňŐí1

Šľ╣Šíł A´╝ÜńŞÇńŞ¬ňĄžš▒╗ = ńŞÇńŞ¬ Gitea ń╗ôň║ô
- ňĚąńŻť Ôćĺ ńŞÇńŞ¬ repo´╝îÚçîÚŁóŠîëÚí╣šŤ«ňłćšŤ«ňŻĽ
- ň«Âň║ş Ôćĺ ńŞÇńŞ¬ repo
- ňşŽń╣á Ôćĺ ńŞÇńŞ¬ repo
- ń╝śšé╣´╝Üš«íšÉćš«ÇňŹĽ´╝îńŞÇńŞ¬ URL´╝îň«╣ŠśôŔĚĘÚí╣šŤ«ŠÉťš┤ó
- š╝║šé╣´╝ÜňĚąńŻťÚçîšÜäńŞťŔą┐ňůĘňťĘńŞÇńŞ¬ repo´╝îŠŁâÚÖÉš▓ĺň║Žš▓Ś

Šľ╣Šíł B´╝ÜŠ»ĆńŞ¬ňůĚńŻôÚí╣šŤ« = ńŞÇńŞ¬ń╗ôň║ô
- šťčŠşúšÜä"ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô"´╝îňĺîň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůšöĘ GitHub šÜäŠľ╣ň╝Ćň«îňůĘńŞÇŔç┤
- ń╝śšé╣´╝Üš▓ĺň║Žš╗ć´╝îňĆ»ń╗ąŠŐŐŠčÉńŞ¬ń╗ôň║ôňŹĽšőČňłćń║źš╗ÖňÉîń║ő
- š╝║šé╣´╝Üń╗ôň║ôŠĽ░ÚçĆňĄÜ´╝îŔĚĘń╗ôň║ôŠÉťš┤óÚťÇŔŽüÚóŁňĄľŠť║ňłÂ

Šľ╣Šíł C´╝ÜŠĚĚňÉł´╝łŠÄĘŔŹÉŔ«ĘŔ«║Šľ╣ňÉĹ´╝ë

# Gitea Features Overview

Based on the documentation page provided, I can only offer limited information since the content shown is primarily a navigation menu rather than detailed feature documentation.

## What the Page Reveals

The documentation structure indicates Gitea covers several key areas:

- **Repository management** ("Repository" section with 11 items)
- **Collaboration tools** ("Issues & Pull Requests" with 6 items)
- **Automation** ("Actions" with 9 items)
- **Package management** ("Packages" with 24 items)
- **Permission systems** ("Access Control" with 4 items)
- **User configuration** ("User Setting" with 1 item)

## Limitation

The actual page content doesn't contain the comprehensive details you're requesting about:
- Account types (personal vs. organizational)
- Repository visibility options
- Team and permission hierarchies
- Fork/collaboration models
- Feature comparisons with GitHub

**Recommendation**: To get the detailed information you need, you should visit the actual documentation sections linked on this page, particularly:
- `/usage/repository` (for repository types and structure)
- `/usage/access-control` (for permission and organizational hierarchy)
- `/usage/issues-prs` (for collaboration features)

These sections would contain the comprehensive hierarchy documentation you're seeking.

Web search results for query: "Gitea features organization personal account repository visibility internal teams permissions 2025"

Links: [{"title":"Permissions | Gitea Documentation","url":"https://docs.gitea.com/usage/permissions"},{"title":"Team access to private organisation repositories - Install/Maintain/Configure - Gitea","url":"https://forum.gitea.com/t/team-access-to-private-organisation-repositories/1152"},{"title":"Add visibility at the team or org level ┬Ě Issue #13210 ┬Ě go-gitea/gitea","url":"https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/13210"},{"title":"User and Organization Management | go-gitea/gitea | DeepWiki","url":"https://deepwiki.com/go-gitea/gitea/7-user-and-organization-management"},{"title":"Gitea - Caascad Documentation","url":"https://docs.caascad.com/en/git/gitea.html"},{"title":"Basic Gitea Information - HackTricks Cloud","url":"https://cloud.hacktricks.xyz/pentesting-ci-cd/gitea-security/basic-gitea-information"},{"title":"What is Gitea? | Gitea Documentation","url":"https://docs.gitea.com/"},{"title":"[FEATURE] Allow changing team permissions per repository ┬Ě Issue #14717 ┬Ě go-gitea/gitea","url":"https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/14717"},{"title":"Definig permissions/token on organization repos - Gitea Usages - Gitea","url":"https://forum.gitea.com/t/definig-permissions-token-on-organization-repos/10403"},{"title":"FAQ | Gitea Documentation","url":"https://docs.gitea.com/next/help/faq"}]

Here is a comprehensive summary of Gitea's features related to organizations, personal accounts, repository visibility, internal teams, and permissions, based on the search results:

---

## ­čž▒ Gitea: Organizations, Accounts, Visibility & Permissions

### ­čöĚ What is Gitea?
Gitea is a painless, self-hosted, all-in-one software development service. It includes Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry, and CI/CD ÔÇö similar to GitHub, Bitbucket, and GitLab.

---

### ­čĹĄ Personal vs. Organization Repositories
The basic Gitea environment structure is to group repos by organization(s), each of which may contain several repositories and several teams. However, just like in GitHub, users can have repos outside of the organization, and a user can be a member of different organizations.

- For individual repositories, the owner is the user who created it.
- For organization repositories, the owners are the members of the owner team on that organization.
- For individual repositories, the creators are the only owners and have no limits to change anything or delete the repository. Repository owners can add collaborators to help maintain them. Collaborators can have Read, Write, and Admin permissions.

---

### ­čĆó Organizations & Teams
When an organization is created, a team called **Owners** is created and the creator is placed inside it. This team grants admin access over the organization; those permissions and the name of the team cannot be modified.

When creating teams, there are two types: **admin teams** and **general teams**. An admin team can be created to manage some of the repositories, and its members can do anything with those repositories.

Only members of the owner or admin team can create a new team. A general team in an organization has unit permission settings, and it can have members and repositories scope. A team can access all the repositories in the organization or only specific repositories.

Within the organization, a user may have different permissions over each repository. A user may also be part of different teams with different permissions over different repos. Repositories may also have special protection mechanisms.

---

### ­čöĺ Repository Visibility
Repositories are either owned by a user or by an organization, and they can either be **private** (to their owner) or **completely public**.

If you set public visibility on an organization, every user that is authenticated in Gitea will be able to see your organization/code.

Org admins (owners) can select the visibility of the organization and can also indicate if the repo admins can add or remove access for teams.

A community feature request highlights a gap: adding an option "visible to these teams" or "visible to members of this organization" would make Gitea more useful when self-hosting. Additionally, one could add a configuration to the team or organization so that new repositories created by members automatically inherit a default visibility value.

---

### ­čöĹ Write & Collaborator Permissions
If you have **Write** permission, you can push code to specific branches of the repository (provided it's permitted by branch protection rules), and you can also make changes to wiki pages.

---

### ­čÜź Restricted Users
**Restricted users** are limited to a subset of the content based on their organization/team memberships and collaborations, ignoring the public flag on organizations/repos.

If a customer or third party needs access to a specific repo and only that repo, making such a customer account restricted and granting needed access using team membership(s) and/or collaboration(s) is a simple way to achieve that without the need to make everything private.

---

### ­čöÉ Security & Access Control
Gitea places a strong emphasis on security, offering features such as **user permission management**, **access control lists**, and more to ensure the security of code and data.

To improve management of a Gitea instance, it is important to create a high-level context (called an organization) where you can give users specific permissions using teams or roles.

---

In summary, Gitea provides a robust and flexible permission system centered around **organizations**, **teams**, and **individual collaborators**, with visibility controls at both the repository and organization levels, and support for restricted user accounts for fine-grained access control.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
Tool Call #519 WebFetch toolu_01R9FRPcKAFkTBwnRPsduALy 06:53:28

  "prompt": "What are all the features Gitea provides beyond just git hosting? Include: Issues, Pull Requests, Projects/Kanban, Wiki, Actions/CI, Packages registry, Releases, Milestones, Labels, webhooks, API. Also explain what \"internal\" visibility means in Gitea (visible to all logged-in users of the instance). I want to understand Gitea as a complete platform not just git storage.",
  "url": "https://docs.gitea.com/"
}
Tool Result #520 WebFetch toolu_01R9FRPcKAFkTBwnRPsduALy 06:53:36
WebFetch output=# Gitea as a Complete Platform Based on the documentation provided, Gitea extends far beyond basic Git hosting: ## Core Features Beyond Git Storage **Code Review & Collaboration...
Show output payload 
# Gitea as a Complete Platform

Based on the documentation provided, Gitea extends far beyond basic Git hosting:

## Core Features Beyond Git Storage

**Code Review & Collaboration**: Gitea supports "both the Pull Request workflow and AGit workflow. Reviewers can browse code online and provide review comments or feedback."

**Project Management**: The platform "tracks project requirements, features, and bugs through columns and issues. Issues support features like branches, tags, milestones, assignments, time tracking, due dates, dependencies, and more."

**CI/CD Integration**: "Gitea Actions supports CI/CD functionality, compatible with GitHub Actions. Users can write workflows in familiar YAML format and reuse a variety of existing Actions plugins."

**Package Management**: Gitea encompasses "over 20 different types of public or private software package management, including Cargo, Chef, Composer, Conan, Conda, Container, Helm, Maven, npm, NuGet, Pub, PyPI, RubyGems, Vagrant, and more."

## Notable Limitations

The provided documentation does **not** explicitly mention webhooks, API capabilities, releases, labels, or explain "internal" visibility settings. While these features likely exist in Gitea (given its GitHub-like positioning), they aren't detailed in this introductory documentation excerpt.

The content positions Gitea as "a painless, self-hosted, all-in-one software development service" comparable to GitHub and GitLab, emphasizing its lightweight, self-contained nature for teams and organizations.

## Gitea šÜäŠáŞň┐âš╗ôŠ×ä´╝łšťčň«×šÉćŔžú´╝ë

## Gitea ň«îŠĽ┤ŔâŻňŐŤň»╣ OpenMnemo šÜäń╗ĚňÇ╝

| Gitea ňŐčŔâŻ | OpenMnemo šÜäšöĘÚÇö |
|-----------|----------------|
| ń╗ôň║ô´╝łRepository´╝ë | Ŕ«░ň┐ćŔ»şňóâň«╣ňÖĘ´╝îńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô |
| š╗äš╗ç´╝łOrganization´╝ë | ňĚąńŻťňŤóÚśč / ň«Âň║ş / šĄżňî║ |
| ňŤóÚśč´╝łTeams´╝ë | ň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹśŠŁâÚÖÉŃÇüňÉîń║őŔ«┐ÚŚ«ŠŁâÚÖÉ |
| Issues | ń╗╗ňŐíŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬´╝îÚóćň»╝ňłćÚůŹšÜäń║őÚí╣ |
| Wiki | ÚĽ┐ŠťčščąŔ»ćŠ▓ëŠĚÇ´╝łKnowledge šŤ«ňŻĽšÜä Web šëł´╝ë|
| Projects / Kanban | ňżůňŐ×ń║őÚí╣ňĆ»Ŕžćňîľ |
| Actions / CI | ŔžŽňĆĹň┐âŔĚ│ŃÇüŔç¬ňŐĘŠ×äň╗║ŠŐąňĹŐ |
| Releases | Ŕ«░ň┐ćň┐źšůž´╝îŠáçŔ«░ÚçŹŔŽüÚçîšĘőšóĹ |
| Webhooks | ŔžŽňĆĹ IM ŠÄĘÚÇüŃÇüňĄľÚâĘš│╗š╗čÚÇÜščą |
| API | OpenMnemo ň«óŠłĚšź»ŃÇüŠëőŠť║ App Ŕ░âšöĘ |
| Internal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž | ň«Âň║ş/ňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║ź´╝îńŞŹň»╣ňĄľňůČň╝Ç |

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation. Summary: 1. Primary Request and Intent: - **Immediate**: Update b...

Expand full message

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
- Immediate: Update both knowledge documents (ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐĽŔÁäń║║.md and ŠŐÇŠť»ŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐÇŠť»ňŤóÚśč.md) to incorporate the full Gitea architecture discussion ÔÇö specifically: Gitea's personal account + organization + team structure, "Everything is a Repository" mapped to Gitea namespaces, onboarding flow with preset repo categories, dual-timing AI classification (during + after conversation), cross-repo search via local SQLite index, privacy model (default private + per-repo override), and complete Gitea feature mapping to OpenMnemo use cases.
- Background context: The session continued from a prior context where memorytree report v1 was already implemented. During this session: fixed a Windows path bug (/ vs \) in the serve command, committed all changes, discussed Report v2 (Quartz-inspired), confirmed v2 was already fully implemented (611 tests passing, 32 test files), discussed what openmnemo really is, wrote two initial knowledge documents, corrected terminology from "Gitń╗ôň║ô" to "Giteań╗ôň║ô", and had a full architecture discussion.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
- Gitea: Open-source self-hosted Git platform. Structure: Personal Account Ôćĺ creates personal repos (public/private); Organizations Ôćĺ contain Teams + repos; Teams Ôćĺ control member permissions per-repo or all-repos; Visibility: private / public / internal (internal = visible to all logged-in users on the instance)
- "ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô" (Everything is a Repository): Gitea's own namespace IS the semantic classification system. Personal repos = personal life domains; Organizations = work/family/community contexts; Teams = access control for collaborators
- OpenMnemo vision: Personal AI memory OS ÔÇö captures ALL AI conversations from all platforms, stores in user-owned Gitea/GitHub repos, provides structured retrieval, reduces hallucinations by providing proper context
- Onboarding: First launch Ôćĺ user selects preset repo categories (ňĚąńŻť/ňşŽń╣á/ň«Âň║ş/ŠâůŠäč/ňşÉňą│/ňüąň║Ě/Ŕ┤óňŐí) + optional org creation (family org, work org)
- AI classification: Dual timing ÔÇö soft UI indicator during conversation + push notification after with 24h undo window + "ňżůňłćš▒╗ŠöÂń╗Âš«▒" for cancelled/unclassified items
- Cross-repo search: OpenMnemo's heartbeat indexes ALL repos into unified SQLite; Gitea's own search is per-repo only
- Privacy model: Default = private (user sets once globally), per-repo override, org repos inherit org default, internal visibility = ideal for family/team shared content
- Product roadmap: CLI skill (done) Ôćĺ openmnemo CLI + GitHub Pages Ôćĺ Browser extension Ôćĺ IM push Ôćĺ Web client Ôćĺ Desktop app (Tauri) Ôćĺ Mobile app (React Native/Flutter)
- memorytree-workflow vs openmnemo: skill = free experimental prototype; openmnemo = production npm monorepo product
- Report v2: Fully implemented ÔÇö sidebar nav, i18n (en/zh-CN), knowledge graph (canvas force-directed), Projects page, client tab filtering, dark/light mode, responsive, GitHub Pages deploy, webhook notifications, TOC, breadcrumbs, callouts, RSS, AI tags, search filters, OG meta, Mermaid, reader mode, view transitions

3. Files and Code Sections:
- D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐĽŔÁäń║║.md
- Business plan for investors. Already updated once to change "Gitń╗ôň║ô" Ôćĺ "Giteań╗ôň║ô" with explanation of GitHub vs self-hosted Gitea options. Needs further update with full Gitea architecture discussion (org structure, onboarding flow, privacy model, complete feature mapping).
- D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/ŠŐÇŠť»ŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐÇŠť»ňŤóÚśč.md
- Technical roadmap for engineering team. Already updated once to add "GiteańŞ║ň║Ľň║ž" as first design principle and new sections on Gitea. Needs further update with: complete Gitea namespace mapping, onboarding flow, AI classification dual-timing design, cross-repo search architecture, privacy model, Gitea feature Ôćĺ OpenMnemo use case table.
- C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-report.ts
- Fixed Windows path separator bug: changed root + '/' to root + sep (imported sep from node:path). This caused every request to get 403 Forbidden on Windows because path.join uses \ but the containment check used /.
- C:/Users/ai/.claude/plans/wobbly-wishing-goose.md
- Plan file updated with full Phase 1 + Phase 2 specs for Report v2. Phase 1 complete (committed as 97ae58d). Phase 2 complete (committed as c753bbe). Contains detailed design decisions D1-D9 for Phase 2 features.
- C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/css.ts
- Fully updated with: sidebar layout, light theme variables ([data-theme="light"]), tab bar, popover, graph canvas, project cards, responsive breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop), sidebar collapse, breadcrumb, TOC, callouts, Mermaid, reader mode, view transitions, tag badges, search filter dropdowns.

4. Errors and fixes:
- Windows Forbidden error (403) on http://localhost:4321/: Root cause was root + '/' in path containment check ÔÇö on Windows path.join produces \ separators but check used /. Fixed by importing sep from node:path and using root + sep.
- User correction on Gitea terminology: Initial documents said "Gitń╗ôň║ô" (git repository). User corrected: the storage layer is specifically Gitea (the open-source platform), not just git. Open source users use GitHub; enterprise/privacy users self-deploy Gitea. Updated documents accordingly.
- User correction on A/B classification discussion: Initial attempt to discuss repo granularity as "Šľ╣ŠíłA/B" was confusing to user ("ŠłĹÚâŻšťőńŞŹŠçé"). User asked me to properly understand Gitea's features first. Researched Gitea properly ÔÇö understood that personal account + organization + teams IS the classification system, not something we need to design separately.

5. Problem Solving:
- Windows path separator: Diagnosed from reading cmd-report.ts ÔÇö saw root + '/' hardcoded. Fixed with path.sep.
- Gitea architecture understanding: User pointed out my A/B classification was wrong approach. After researching Gitea properly: understood that Gitea's own namespace (personal repos + orgs + teams) naturally maps to "Everything is a Repository" ÔÇö no additional classification layer needed. Personal repos = personal life domains; Orgs = work/family/community.
- Document accuracy: Two rounds of corrections ÔÇö first changing "Git" to "Gitea", second (pending) adding full Gitea architecture with org/account hierarchy, onboarding flow, AI classification timing, cross-repo search, privacy model.

6. All user messages:

The full Gitea architecture that needs to be incorporated includes:
- Personal account Ôćĺ personal life repos (learning/health/personal)
- Organizations Ôćĺ work org (company creates, Alice joins) + family org (family members each have accounts)
- Teams within org Ôćĺ different permission levels
- Visibility: private / public / internal (internal = all instance members, perfect for family sharing)
- Onboarding: connect Gitea/GitHub Ôćĺ select preset repo categories Ôćĺ optional org creation Ôćĺ set default privacy
- AI classification: soft indicator during conversation + push notification after with [Ščąšťő][šž╗ňŐĘ][ŠĺĄÚöÇ] + ňżůňłćš▒╗ŠöÂń╗Âš«▒ for cancelled items
- Cross-repo search: OpenMnemo's heartbeat indexes all repos into unified SQLite (Gitea's native search is per-repo only)
- Full Gitea feature Ôćĺ OpenMnemo use case table (Issues=task tracking, Wiki=knowledge, Actions=CI trigger, Webhooks=IM push, API=client/app calls, Internal=family sharing)

  "content": "# OpenMnemo ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž\n\n> šëłŠťČ´╝Üv1.1 ┬Ě ŠŚąŠťč´╝Ü2026-03-17\n\n---\n\n## ńŞÇŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČňťĘŔžúňć│ń╗Çń╣łÚŚ«Úóś\n\n### ŠŚÂń╗úŔâîŠÖ»\n\nňĄžŠĘíň×őŠşúňťĘń╗Ä\"ŔüŐňĄęšÄęňůĚ\"ňĆśŠłÉń║║š▒╗ŠťÇÚçŹŔŽüšÜäšöčń║žňŐŤňĚąňůĚŃÇéňůĘšÉâŠĽ░ń║┐ń║║Š»ĆňĄęšöĘ ClaudeŃÇüChatGPTŃÇüGeminiŃÇüCopilot ňĚąńŻťŃÇüňşŽń╣áŃÇüňłŤńŻťŃÇé\n\nńŻćŠëÇŠťëń║║ÚâŻÚŁóńŞ┤ňÉîńŞÇńŞ¬šŚŤšé╣ÔÇöÔÇö\n\n### ŠáŞň┐âšŚŤšé╣\n\n**1. Ŕ«░ň┐ćšóÄšëçňîľ**\nšöĘŠłĚňťĘ VS Code ÚçîšöĘ Copilot ňćÖń╗úšáüŃÇüňťĘšŻĹÚíÁšöĘ ChatGPT ŔüŐŠľ╣ŠíłŃÇüňťĘŠëőŠť║šöĘ Gemini ÚŚ«ÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇüňťĘÚú×ń╣ŽÚçîŔ«ĘŔ«║ÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇéŔ┐Öń║Ťň»╣Ŕ»ŁŠĽúŔÉŻňťĘ N ńŞ¬ňĚąňůĚŃÇüN ńŞ¬ň╣│ňĆ░´╝îŠŚáŠ│Ľš╗čńŞÇš«íšÉć´╝îŠŚÂÚŚ┤ńŞÇÚĽ┐ňůĘÚâĘÚüŚň┐śŃÇé\n\n**2. ńŞŐńŞőŠľçňĄ▒ŠÄž**\nÚĽ┐ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŔÂŐŠŁąŔÂŐÚĽ┐´╝îňĄžŠĘíň×őšÜäŠ│ĘŠäĆňŐŤŠť║ňłÂń╝ÜŔ«ęŠŚęŠťčňćůň«╣Ŕóź\"ŠĚ╣Š▓í\"ŃÇéň╣│ňĆ░Šľ╣ňüÜÚ╗ĹšŤĺňÄőš╝ę´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹščąÚüôńŞóń║ćń╗Çń╣ł´╝îň»╝Ŕç┤ AI ňĆŹňĄŹň╣╗ŔžëŃÇüňĆŹňĄŹňüĆšŽ╗šŤ«Šáç´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹňżŚńŞŹńŞÇÚüŹÚüŹÚçŹŠľ░ŠŐĽňľéŔâîŠÖ»ŃÇé\n\n**3. ŔÁäń║žňŻĺÚŤÂ**\nšöĘŠłĚŔŐ▒ń║ćňĄžÚçĆŠŚÂÚŚ┤ňĺî AI ń║ĄŠÁü´╝îÚçîÚŁóŠťëŠâ│Š│ĽŃÇüŠťëňć│šşľŃÇüŠťëňłŤńŻťŔ┐çšĘőŃÇéńŻćŔ┐Öń║ŤňůĘÚâĘŠś»ň╣│ňĆ░šÜäŠĽ░ŠŹ«´╝îńŞŹň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚŃÇéň╣│ňĆ░ňů│ÚŚşŃÇüŔ┤ŽňĆĚň░üšŽü´╝îńŞÇňłçŠŞůÚŤÂŃÇé\n\n### ÚŚ«ÚóśŔžäŠĘí\n\n- ňůĘšÉâ AI ň»╣Ŕ»ŁňĚąňůĚŠťłŠ┤╗´╝Ü**ŔÂůŔ┐ç 5 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ**\n- Š»Ćń║║Š»ĆňĄęň╣│ňŁçňĆĹŔÁĚ AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝Ü**3-10 ŠČí**\n- šöĘŠłĚŔâŻŠëżňŤ×ńŞÇńŞ¬ŠťłňëŹŠčÉŠČíň»╣Ŕ»ŁšÜäŠŽéšÄç´╝Ü**< 5%**\n\nŔ┐ÖńŞŹŠś»ň░ĆÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇéŔ┐ÖŠś» AI ŠŚÂń╗úŠťÇňĄžšÜäń┐íŠü»ŠŹčŔÇŚŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ń║îŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČšÜäŔžúŠ│Ľ\n\n**OpenMnemo** ÔÇöÔÇö ń║║š▒╗ńŞÄ AI ń║Ąń║ĺšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćŠôŹńŻťš│╗š╗č\n\nŠáŞň┐âšÉćň┐Á´╝Ü**ńŞÇňłçšÜćń╗ôň║ô**\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŠëÇŠťë AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n        Ôćô\nŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŠŞůŠ┤ŚŃÇüňłćš▒╗ŃÇüš┤óň╝Ľ\n        Ôćô\nňşśňůąšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Gitea ń╗ôň║ô\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜšŤ┤ŠÄąšöĘ GitHub´╝łÚŤÂÚŚĘŠžŤ´╝ë\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ń╝üńŞÜ/ÚÜÉšžüšöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea´╝łň«îňůĘŔç¬ńŞ╗´╝ë\n        Ôćô\nš╗ôŠ×äňîľŔ«░ň┐ć + ňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ + ÚÜĆŠŚÂŠúÇš┤ó\n        Ôćô\nňŞŽšŁÇň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš╗žš╗şńŞőńŞÇŠČíň»╣Ŕ»Ł\nŠŚáň╣╗Ŕžë ┬Ě ńŞŹÚçŹňĄŹŠŐĽňľé ┬Ě ŔÁäń║žŠ░Şń╣ůň▒×ń║ÄšöĘŠłĚ\n```\n\n### ńŞ║ń╗Çń╣łŠś» Gitea´╝îŔÇîńŞŹňĆ¬Šś» Git\n\nGit ňĆ¬Šś»šëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂňŹĆŔ««ŃÇé**Gitea** Šś»ň«îŠĽ┤šÜäń╗úšáüŠëśš«íň╣│ňĆ░ÔÇöÔÇöň╝ÇŠ║ÉŃÇüŔŻ╗ÚçĆŃÇüňĆ»Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓´╝îŠĆÉńżŤń╗ôň║ôš«íšÉćŃÇüIssuesŃÇüWikiŃÇüActionsŃÇüWebhooksŃÇüAPI šşëň«îŠĽ┤ŔâŻňŐŤ´╝îŠś» GitHub šÜäň╝ÇŠ║ÉŠŤ┐ń╗úňôüŃÇé\n\nOpenMnemo ń╗ą Gitea ńŞ║ň║Ľň║ž´╝îŠäĆňĹ│šŁÇ´╝Ü\n- šöĘŠłĚňĆ»ń╗ąšöĘ **GitHub**´╝łŠťÇš«ÇňŹĽ´╝îň╝Çš«▒ňŹ│šöĘ´╝ë\n- šöĘŠłĚňĆ»ń╗ą**Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea**´╝łŠĽ░ŠŹ«ň«îňůĘńŞŹšŽ╗ň╝ÇŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ´╝ë\n- ńŞĄšžŹŠľ╣ň╝Ćň»╣šöĘŠłĚň«îňůĘÚÇĆŠśÄ´╝îňŐčŔâŻň«îňůĘńŞÇŔç┤\n- Šť¬ŠŁąŠö»Šîü GitLabŃÇüForgejo šşëń╗╗ńŻĽ Gitea ňů╝ň«╣ň╣│ňĆ░\n\n### Gitea šÜäŔ┤ŽňĆĚńŻôš│╗ = ňĄęšäÂšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćňłćš▒╗š│╗š╗č\n\nGitea ŠťëńŞĄšžŹńŞ╗ńŻô´╝Ü**ńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ** ňĺî **š╗äš╗ç´╝łOrganization´╝ë**ŃÇé\n\n```\nńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ @alice\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ńŞ¬ń║║ń╗ôň║ô´╝łšžüŠťë´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ learning/        ÔćÉ ňşŽń╣áŠłÉÚĽ┐š▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ health/          ÔćÉ ňüąň║Ěňî╗šľŚš▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ personal/        ÔćÉ ńŞ¬ń║║šöčŠ┤╗š▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ finance/         ÔćÉ Ŕ┤óňŐíŔžäňłĺš▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ňŐáňůąň«Âň║şš╗äš╗ç @alice-family´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ň«Âń║║ň»╣Ŕ»ŁŔ«░ňŻĽ´╝łňŻ╝ŠşĄňĆ»Ščą´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňşęňşÉŠĽÖŔé▓´╝łń╗ůň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹśňĆ»Ŕžü´╝ë\n  Ôöé\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňŐáňůąňůČňĆŞš╗äš╗ç @my-company´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n        ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ňĚąńŻťÚí╣šŤ«ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║ź´╝ë\n        ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ŠŐÇŠť»Šľ╣ŠíłŔ«ĘŔ«║\n```\n\n**š╗äš╗ç´╝łOrganization´╝ë** ňĆ»ń╗ąňłŤň╗║ňŤóÚśč´╝łTeam´╝ë´╝îš▓żš╗ćŠÄžňłÂŠ»ĆńŞ¬ŠłÉňĹśň»╣Š»ĆńŞ¬ń╗ôň║ôšÜäŠŁâÚÖÉ´╝łňĆ¬Ŕ»╗ / Ŕ»╗ňćÖ / š«íšÉćňĹś´╝ëŃÇéŔ┐ÖŔ«ę\"ň«Âň║şňů▒ń║źŔ«░ň┐ć\"ňĺî\"ňĚąńŻťňŤóÚśčňŹĆńŻť\"ÚâŻŠťëňÄčšöčŠö»ŠîüŃÇé\n\n**Gitea šÜäňĹŻňÉŹšę║ÚŚ┤ň░▒Šś»Ŕ»şń╣ëňłćš▒╗š│╗š╗č**ÔÇöÔÇöńŞŹÚťÇŔŽüÚóŁňĄľŔ«żŔ«í´╝îGitea ňĚ▓š╗ĆŠťëň«îŠĽ┤šÜäšşöŠíłŃÇé\n\n### ÚÜÉšžüŠĘíň×ő\n\n| ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž | ňÉźń╣ë | ÚÇéšöĘňť║ŠÖ» |\n|--------|------|---------|\n| `private` | ń╗ůŔç¬ňĚ▒ňĆ»Ŕžü | ńŞ¬ń║║ÚÜÉšžüŔ«░ň┐ć´╝łÚ╗śŔ«Ą´╝ë |\n| `internal` | ňÉîńŞÇ Gitea ň«×ńżőŠëÇŠťëšÖ╗ňŻĽšöĘŠłĚňĆ»Ŕžü | ň«Âň║ş/ňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║źňćůň«╣ |\n| `public` | ňůĘšŻĹňĆ»Ŕžü | ščąŔ»ćŔżôňç║ŃÇüňůČň╝Çňłćń║ź |\n\n**Ú╗śŔ«ĄÚÜÉšžüŔ«żšŻ«**´╝ÜšöĘŠłĚňťĘ OpenMnemo ńŞşŔ«żšŻ«ńŞÇŠČíňůĘň▒ÇÚ╗śŔ«Ą´╝łŠÄĘŔŹÉ `private`´╝ë´╝îŠ»ĆńŞ¬ń╗ôň║ôňĆ»ňŹĽšőČŔŽćšŤľŃÇéń╝üńŞÜšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea ňÉÄ´╝î`internal` ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇžšşëń║Ä\"ń╗ůŠťČňůČňĆŞňĹśňĚąňĆ»Ŕžü\"´╝îň«îšżÄŠ╗íŔÂ│ń╝üńŞÜÚÜÉšžüÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇé\n\n### Gitea ň╣│ňĆ░ŔâŻňŐŤňŽéńŻĽŠťŹňŐí OpenMnemo\n\n| Gitea ňŐčŔâŻ | OpenMnemo šöĘÚÇö |\n|-----------|---------------|\n| ń╗ôň║ô + šëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂ | ŠëÇŠťëň»╣Ŕ»ŁšÜäšëłŠťČňîľňşśňéĘ´╝îňĆ»ňŤ×Š║»ń╗╗ŠäĆňÄćňĆ▓ |\n| Issues | ń╗Äň»╣Ŕ»ŁńŞşŠĆÉňĆľń╗╗ňŐí´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘňłŤň╗║ Issue ŔĚčŔŞ¬ |\n| Wiki | ščąŔ»ćŠ▓ëŠĚÇňî║´╝ł04_knowledge/ ň»╣ň║ö Wiki´╝ë |\n| Actions´╝łCI/CD´╝ë | ň┐âŔĚ│ŔžŽňĆĹŔç¬ňŐĘŠ×äň╗║ŠŐąňĹŐŃÇüŠÄĘÚÇü Pages |\n| Webhooks | ň«×ŠŚÂŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščąňł░Úú×ń╣Ž/Telegram/Discord/Slack |\n| API´╝łňů╝ň«╣ GitHub API´╝ë | CLI / ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â / App šÜäš╗čńŞÇŠĽ░ŠŹ«ŠÄąňůąň▒é |\n| Gitea Pages | Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐ÚŁÖŠÇüÚâĘšŻ▓´╝łńŞÄ GitHub Pages šşëń╗Ě´╝ë |\n| š╗äš╗ç + ňŤóÚśč | ň«Âň║ş/ń╝üńŞÜšÜäňĄÜń║║ňŹĆńŻťńŞÄŠŁâÚÖÉš«íšÉć |\n| `internal` ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž | ň«Âň║ş/ňŤóÚśčňćůÚâĘňů▒ń║ź´╝îńŞŹň»╣ňĄľŠÜ┤Úť▓ |\n\n### ňĺîšÄ░Šťëń║žňôüšÜäŠťČŔ┤Ęňî║ňłź\n\n| š╗┤ň║Ž | šÄ░Šťë AI ňĚąňůĚ | OpenMnemo |\n|------|------------|-----------|\n| ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňŻĺň▒× | ň╣│ňĆ░ŠÄžňłÂ | šöĘŠłĚň«îňůĘŠőąŠťë´╝îňşśňťĘŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Gitea/GitHub ń╗ôň║ô |\n| ŔĚĘň╣│ňĆ░ | ňÉäŔç¬ň░üÚŚş | ňůĘň╣│ňĆ░š╗čńŞÇŠ▒çŔüÜ |\n| Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠîüń╣ůŠÇž | ń╝ÜŔ»Łš╗ôŠŁčňŹ│ŠÂłňĄ▒ | šëłŠťČňîľŠ░Şń╣ůń┐Łňşś´╝îňĆ»ňŤ×Š║»ń╗╗ŠäĆňÄćňĆ▓ |\n| ńŞŐńŞőŠľçš«íšÉć | Ú╗ĹšŤĺňÄőš╝ę | šÖŻšŤĺňĆ»ŠÄž´╝îšöĘŠłĚňć│ň«ÜňŐáŔŻŻń╗Çń╣ł |\n| ŔÁäń║žń╗ĚňÇ╝ | ŠÂłŔÇŚňôü | ňĆ»ŠúÇš┤óŃÇüňĆ»ňĄŹšöĘŃÇüňĆ»ňłćń║źšÜäŠĽ░ňşŚŔÁäń║ž |\n| ňłćš▒╗ńŻôš│╗ | ň╣│ňĆ░ň░üÚŚşňłćš▒╗ | Gitea ňĹŻňÉŹšę║ÚŚ┤´╝ÜńŞ¬ń║║ń╗ôň║ô + š╗äš╗ç + ňŤóÚśč´╝îŔ»şń╣ëňĄęšäÂŠŞůŠÖ░ |\n| ň«Âň║ş/ňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║ź | ŠŚá | Gitea š╗äš╗ç + internal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝îňÄčšöčŠö»Šîü |\n| ÚâĘšŻ▓Šľ╣ň╝Ć | š╗Ĺň«Üň╣│ňĆ░ŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ | GitHub´╝łň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝ëŠłľŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea´╝łń╝üńŞÜ/ÚÜÉšžüšöĘŠłĚ´╝ë|\n\n---\n\n## ńŞëŃÇüń║žňôüňŻóŠÇüńŞÄŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż\n\n### šČČńŞÇÚśÂŠ«Á´╝łňŻôňëŹ´╝ë´╝ÜCLI + Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐\n- ňĹŻń╗ĄŔíîňĚąňůĚ´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚ Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI šÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n- ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘő´╝î5 ňłćÚĺčňÉîŠşąńŞÇŠČí´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘ push ňł░ Gitea/GitHub\n- šöčŠłÉňĆ»ŔžćňîľŔ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝îńŞÇÚö«ÚâĘšŻ▓ňł░ GitHub Pages ŠłľŔç¬Šëśš«í Gitea Pages\n- **šŤ«ŠáçšöĘŠłĚ**´╝ÜÚçŹň║Ž AI š╝ľšĘőšöĘŠłĚ´╝łňůĘšÉâš║Ž 500 ńŞçń║║´╝ë\n\n### šČČń║îÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â\n- ŠŹĽŔÄĚšŻĹÚíÁšëł AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łClaude.ai / ChatGPT / Gemini Web´╝ë\n- šöĘŠłĚŠÄłŠŁâňÉÄ´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘňŻĺŠíúňł░Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ô\n- **ŠëôÚÇÜÚŁ×ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůšöĘŠłĚ´╝îšöĘŠłĚŔžäŠĘíŔĚâňŹç 10 ňÇŹń╗ąńŞŐ**\n\n### šČČńŞëÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜIM ŠÄĘÚÇü\n- Úú×ń╣Ž / Telegram / Discord / Slack Šť║ňÖĘń║║\n- Šľ░Ŕ«░ň┐ćŔç¬ňŐĘŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščą´╝îÚÖäňŞŽŔĚ│ŔŻČÚôżŠÄą\n- Ŕ«ęŔ«░ň┐ć\"ńŞ╗ňŐĘŠëżňł░\"šöĘŠłĚ\n\n### šČČňŤŤÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜWeb šź» + ŠíîÚŁó App\n- ň«îŠĽ┤šÜäŔ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉćšĽîÚŁó\n- ŔĚĘÚí╣šŤ«ŠúÇš┤óŃÇüščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ŃÇüAI š╗şňćÖ\n- Windows / macOS / Linux ňÄčšöčň«óŠłĚšź»´╝łTauri´╝ë\n\n### šČČń║öÚśÂŠ«Á´╝ÜŠëőŠť║ App + šöčŠÇü\n- iOS / Android´╝îÚÜĆŠŚÂÚÜĆňť░ŠčąšťőŃÇüš╗žš╗şň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n- ňŤóÚśčňŹĆńŻťŃÇüń╗ôň║ôŠĘíŠŁ┐ňŞéňť║\n- šČČńŞëŠľ╣ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇů API\n\n---\n\n## ňŤŤŃÇüšöĘŠłĚńŞŐŠëőńŻôÚ¬î\n\n**ÚŽľŠČíňÉ»ňŐĘ Ôćĺ 3 Šşąň«îŠłÉÚůŹšŻ«´╝Ü**\n\n```\nŠşąÚ¬Ą 1´╝ÜŔ┐×ŠÄąńŻášÜä Gitea/GitHub Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ Ŕżôňůą Personal Access Token´╝îOpenMnemo ŔÄĚňżŚń╗ôň║ôŔ»╗ňćÖŠŁâÚÖÉ\n\nŠşąÚ¬Ą 2´╝ÜÚÇëŠőęńŻášÜäŔ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôňłćš▒╗´╝łňĆ»ňĄÜÚÇë´╝îń╣čňĆ»Ŕç¬ň«Üń╣ë´╝ë\n  ÔöîÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ\n  Ôöé  ńŞ║ńŻáŔç¬ňŐĘňłŤň╗║ń╗ąńŞőń╗ôň║ô´╝łÚ╗śŔ«ĄšžüŠťë´╝ë´╝Ü         Ôöé\n  Ôöé                                         Ôöé\n  Ôöé  Ôťů ňĚąńŻť´╝łwork´╝ë     Ôťů ňşŽń╣á´╝łlearning´╝ë  Ôöé\n  Ôöé  Ôťů ňüąň║Ě´╝łhealth´╝ë   Ôťů ńŞ¬ń║║´╝łpersonal´╝ë  Ôöé\n  Ôöé  ÔśÉ ň«Âň║ş´╝łfamily´╝ë   ÔśÉ ňşÉňą│´╝łchildren´╝ë  Ôöé\n  Ôöé  ÔśÉ Ŕ┤óňŐí´╝łfinance´╝ë  ÔśÉ ŠâůŠäč´╝łemotions´╝ë  Ôöé\n  Ôöé                                         Ôöé\n  Ôöé  [Ŕç¬ň«Üń╣ëń╗ôň║ôňÉŹ...]                        Ôöé\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś\n\nŠşąÚ¬Ą 3´╝ÜŔ«żšŻ«Ú╗śŔ«ĄÚÜÉšžüš║žňłź\n  ÔŚő šžüŠťë´╝łń╗ůŔç¬ňĚ▒ňĆ»Ŕžü´╝ë  ÔćÉ ŠÄĘŔŹÉ\n  ÔŚő ňŤóÚśčňćůÚâĘňĆ»Ŕžü\n  ÔŚő ňůČň╝Ç\n```\n\n**ń╣őňÉÄ´╝îOpenMnemo ň«îňůĘŔç¬ňŐĘŔ┐ÉŔíî**ÔÇöÔÇöńŻáňĆ¬š«íňĺî AI ŔüŐ´╝îŔ«░ň┐ćŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüŔç¬ňŐĘňłćš▒╗ŃÇüŔç¬ňŐĘňŻĺŠíúŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ń║öŃÇüňĽćńŞÜŠĘíň╝Ć\n\n### ň╝ÇŠ║É + SaaS ňĆîŔŻĘ\n\n**Š░Şń╣ůňůŹŔ┤╣´╝łň╝ÇŠ║É´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ŠťČňť░ňşśňéĘ + GitHub ŠłľŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea\n- ŠëÇŠťëŠáŞň┐âňŐčŔâŻ\n- GitHub Pages / Gitea Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\n\n**ń╗śŔ┤╣šëł´╝łSaaS´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ń║Ĺšź»ňÉîŠşąńŞÄňĄçń╗Ż´╝łŔĚĘŔ«żňĄçŠŚáš╝ŁňłçŠŹó´╝ë\n- ňŤóÚśčňů▒ń║źń╗ôň║ô´╝łňŹĆńŻťňŐčŔâŻ´╝ë\n- AI ňó×ň╝║ŠúÇš┤ó´╝łňÉĹÚçĆŔ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó´╝ë\n- šžüŠťëňîľÚâĘšŻ▓Šö»Šîü´╝łń╝üńŞÜšëł´╝ë\n\n### ŠöÂŔ┤╣ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ\n- ńŞ¬ń║║ńŞôńŞÜšëł´╝Ü$9.9/Šťł\n- ňŤóÚśčšëł´╝Ü$29/Šťł´╝ł5ń║║ŔÁĚ´╝ë\n- ń╝üńŞÜšžüŠťëňîľ´╝ÜŠîëÚťÇň«ÜňłÂ\n\n---\n\n## ňůşŃÇüňŞéňť║ŔžäŠĘí\n\n| ňŞéňť║ň▒éŠČí | ŔžäŠĘí |\n|---------|------|\n| AI š╝ľšĘőňĚąňůĚšöĘŠłĚ´╝łTAM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 2,000 ńŞçň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇů |\n| Š│Ť AI ÚçŹň║ŽšöĘŠłĚ´╝łSAM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 1 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ |\n| 5 ň╣┤ňÉÄŠëÇŠťë AI šöĘŠłĚ´╝łSOM´╝ë | ňůĘšÉâ 10 ń║┐šöĘŠłĚ |\n\nŔ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉćŠś»Š»ĆńŞÇńŞ¬ AI šöĘŠłĚšÜäňłÜÚťÇ´╝îŔÇîńŞŹŠś»ň░Ćń╝ŚÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ńŞâŃÇüšź×ń║ëń╝śňŐ┐ńŞÄŠŐĄňčÄŠ▓│\n\n**1. ńŞşšźőŠÇž**\nOpenMnemo ńŞŹš╗Ĺň«Üń╗╗ńŻĽ AI ňÄéňĽćŃÇüń╗╗ńŻĽň╣│ňĆ░ŃÇéŔ┐ÖŠś»ňĄžňÄéŠ░ŞŔ┐ťŠŚáŠ│ĽňüÜňł░šÜäÔÇöÔÇöňż«ŔŻ»ŔŽüš╗Ĺ Copilot´╝îOpenAI ŔŽüš╗Ĺ ChatGPT´╝îGoogle ŔŽüš╗Ĺ GeminiŃÇéŠłĹń╗ČŠś»ňö»ńŞÇšťčŠşúńŞşšźőšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň▒éŃÇé\n\n**2. ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâ**\nšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćňşśňťĘŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä Gitea/GitHub ń╗ôň║ô´╝îŠłĹń╗ČňĆ¬Šś»ňĚąňůĚŃÇéň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚšöĘ GitHub ÚŤÂÚŚĘŠžŤŔÁĚŠşą´╝Ťň»╣ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâŔŽüŠ▒éŠŤ┤ÚźśšÜäń╝üńŞÜšöĘŠłĚ´╝îňĆ»ń╗ąŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea´╝îŠĽ░ŠŹ«ň«îňůĘńŞŹš╗ĆŔ┐çń╗╗ńŻĽšČČńŞëŠľ╣ŠťŹňŐíňÖĘŃÇéŔ┐ÖŔžúňć│ń║ćŠťÇŠĚ▒ň▒éšÜäń┐íń╗╗ÚŚ«Úóś´╝îń╣čŠś»ŠťÇň╝║šÜäšöĘŠłĚš▓śŠÇžÔÇöÔÇöšöĘŠłĚšÜäŔ«░ň┐ćŔÂŐšž»š┤»´╝îŔ┐üšž╗ŠłÉŠťČŔÂŐÚźś´╝îšĽÖňşśšÄçŔÂŐÚźśŃÇé\n\n**3. Gitea šöčŠÇüšÜäň«îŠĽ┤ŠÇž**\nŠłĹń╗ČńŞŹňĆ¬Šś»ňşśňéĘň▒é´╝îŔÇîŠś»ň«îŠĽ┤ň╣│ňĆ░ŔâŻňŐŤšÜäńŻ┐šöĘŔÇů´╝ÜšëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂŃÇüIssues ń╗╗ňŐíŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬ŃÇüWiki ščąŔ»ćň║ôŃÇüActions Ŕç¬ňŐĘňîľŃÇüWebhooks ÚÇÜščąŃÇüš╗äš╗çňŹĆńŻťÔÇöÔÇöŔ┐Öń║ŤÚâŻŠś» Gitea/GitHub ňĚ▓š╗ĆŔžúňć│ňąŻšÜäÚŚ«Úóś´╝îŠłĹń╗ČšźÖňťĘńŞŐÚŁóŠ×äň╗║´╝îŔÇîńŞŹŠś»ÚçŹÚÇáŔŻ«ňşÉŃÇé\n\n**4. ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšĄżňî║**\nň╝ÇŠ║Éň╗║šźőń┐íń╗╗´╝îšĄżňî║Úę▒ňŐĘń╝áŠĺşŃÇéŠ»ĆńŞ¬ň╝ÇňĆĹŔÇůÚâŻŠś»šžŹňşÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝îń╣čŠś»ń╝áŠĺşŔŐéšé╣ŃÇé\n\n**5. ňůłňĆĹń╝śňŐ┐**\nŔ«░ň┐ćŔÁäń║žńŞÇŠŚŽšž»š┤»´╝îšöĘŠłĚńŞŹń╝ÜŔ┐üšž╗ŃÇéšČČńŞÇńŞ¬ŔóźšöĘŠłĚń┐íń╗╗šÜäŔ«░ň┐ćň╣│ňĆ░´╝îň░ćÚĽ┐Šťčń┐ŁŠîüÚóćňůłŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## ňůźŃÇüňŻôňëŹšŐÂŠÇü\n\n- **ń║žňôü**´╝ÜŠáŞň┐â CLI ňĚąňůĚňĚ▓ńŞŐš║┐ npm´╝îŠŐÇŠť»Ú¬îŔ»üň«îŠłÉ\n- **ň╝ÇŠ║É**´╝ÜGitHub ňůČň╝Ç´╝îMIT ňŹĆŔ««\n- **Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐**´╝Üň«îŠĽ┤ň«×šÄ░´╝łDashboard / ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ / ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó / GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓ / ŠÜŚń║«Ŕë▓ńŞ╗Úóś / ňĄÜŔ»şŔĘÇ / ňôŹň║öň╝Ć´╝ë\n- **Šö»Šîüň«óŠłĚšź»**´╝ÜClaude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI´╝łŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Âň╝ÇňĆĹńŞş´╝ë\n- **ŠŐÇŠť»Šáł**´╝ÜTypeScript / Node.js / SQLite / Gitea´╝îÚŤÂń║ĹńżŁŔÁľ´╝îň«îňůĘŠťČňť░ňîľ\n\n---\n\n## ń╣ŁŃÇüŠłĹń╗ČÚťÇŔŽüń╗Çń╣ł\n\n**ň»╗Š▒éšžŹňşÉŔŻ«Ŕ×ŹŔÁä´╝îšöĘń║Ä´╝Ü**\n- ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Âň╝ÇňĆĹ´╝łŠëôÚÇÜŠťÇňĄžšöĘŠłĚšżĄńŻô´╝ë\n- ŠáŞň┐âňŤóÚśčŠëęňůů´╝łňůĘŠáł + šž╗ňŐĘšź»´╝ë\n- ňó×ÚĽ┐ńŞÄšĄżňî║Ŕ┐ÉŔÉą\n\n**ŠłĹń╗ČšŤŞń┐í´╝Ü**\nń║║š▒╗ňĺî AI šÜäń║Ąń║ĺŔ«░ň┐ć´╝îŠś»Šť¬ŠŁąŠťÇÚçŹŔŽüšÜäńŞ¬ń║║ŠĽ░ňşŚŔÁäń║žŃÇéOpenMnemo ŔŽüňüÜšÜä´╝îŠś»Ŕ«ęŠ»ĆńŞÇńŞ¬ń║║ÚâŻŔâŻŠőąŠťëŃÇüš«íšÉćŃÇüńŻ┐šöĘŔç¬ňĚ▒ńŞÄ AI ňů▒ňÉîňłŤÚÇášÜäŔ«░ň┐ćÔÇöÔÇöńŞŹŠś»ńŞÇŠŚÂ´╝îŔÇîŠś»ńŞÇšöčŃÇé\n"
}

  "file_path": "D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/04_knowledge/ŠŐÇŠť»ŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż-ÚŁóňÉĹŠŐÇŠť»ňŤóÚśč.md",

Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠôŹńŻťš│╗š╗č**´╝îň║Ľň▒éŠś» Gitea ń╗ôň║ôň╣│ňĆ░´╝îńŞŐň▒éŠś»ŔĚĘň╣│ňĆ░Ŕ«░ň┐ćŠŹĽŔÄĚŃÇüš╗ôŠ×äňîľš┤óň╝ĽŃÇüňĆ»ŔžćňîľšťőŠŁ┐ŃÇüń╗ąňĆŐŠť¬ŠŁąšÜäŠÖ║ŔâŻŠúÇš┤óńŞÄš╗şňćÖŔâŻňŐŤŃÇé\n\nŠáŞň┐âŔ«żŔ«íňÄčňłÖ´╝Ü\n- **Gitea ńŞ║ň║Ľň║ž**´╝Üń╗ôň║ôňşśňéĘň▒éňč║ń║Ä Gitea´╝łň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚšöĘ GitHub´╝îń╝üńŞÜšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea´╝îńŞĄŔÇů API ňů╝ň«╣´╝ë\n- **ŠťČňť░ń╝śňůł**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťëŠĽ░ŠŹ«Ú╗śŔ«ĄňşśňťĘšöĘŠłĚŠťČňť░´╝îń║Ĺšź»Šś»ňĆ»ÚÇëÚí╣\n- **šÖŻšŤĺÚÇĆŠśÄ**´╝ÜŠëÇŠťëňşśňéĘŠá╝ň╝ĆŠś» Markdown + JSONL´╝îń║║ňĆ»Ŕ»╗´╝îňĚąňůĚňĆ»ŔžúŠ×É\n- **ÚŤÂÚöüň«Ü**´╝ÜšöĘŠłĚńŞŹńżŁŔÁľ OpenMnemo ń╣čŔâŻŔ«┐ÚŚ«Ŕç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠĽ░ŠŹ«\n- **ŠŞÉŔ┐Ťňó×ň╝║**´╝Üń╗Ä CLI Ôćĺ ŠĆĺń╗Â Ôćĺ App´╝îŠ»ĆńŞÇň▒éÚâŻŠś»ň«îŠĽ┤ňĆ»šöĘšÜäń║žňôü\n\n---\n\n## ń║îŃÇüňŻôňëŹŠ×ÂŠ×ä\n\n### ń╗úšáüń╗ôň║ôš╗ôŠ×ä\n\n```\nopenmnemo/                    ÔćÉ pnpm monorepo + Turborepo\n  packages/\n    types/    @openmnemo/types   ÔćÉ ňů▒ń║ź TypeScript ŠÄąňĆú\n    core/     @openmnemo/core    ÔćÉ transcript ŔžúŠ×ÉŃÇüň»╝ňůąŃÇüňÄ╗ÚçŹŃÇüSQLite š┤óň╝Ľ\n    sync/     @openmnemo/sync    ÔćÉ ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘőŃÇüconfigŃÇülockŃÇüalert\n    cli/      @openmnemo/cli     ÔćÉ š╗čńŞÇ CLI´╝łopenmnemo ňĹŻń╗Ą´╝ë\n```\n\n### ńżŁŔÁľňů│š│╗\n\n```\n@openmnemo/types\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/core   ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types´╝ë\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/sync   ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types + core´╝ë\n       ÔćĹ\n@openmnemo/cli    ´╝łńżŁŔÁľ types + core + sync´╝ë\n```\n\n### ŠŐÇŠť»Šáł\n\n| ň▒éŠČí | ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő |\n|------|---------|\n| Ŕ»şŔĘÇ | TypeScript 5.7´╝îstrict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes |\n| ŠĘíňŁŚš│╗š╗č | NodeNext ESM´╝îŠëÇŠťë import ÚťÇ `.js` Šëęň▒ĽňÉŹ |\n| Š×äň╗║ | tsup´╝łňÉäňîůšőČšźőŠ×äň╗║´╝ë + Turborepo´╝łňůĘń╗ôň║ôň╣ÂŔíîŠ×äň╗║´╝ë |\n| ŠÁőŔ»Ľ | Vitest |\n| ňîůš«íšÉć | pnpm workspaces |\n| ňşśňéĘň╣│ňĆ░ | Gitea´╝łŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓´╝ëŠłľ GitHub´╝łň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝ë´╝îAPI ňů╝ň«╣ |\n| ÚůŹšŻ« | `~/.memorytree/config.toml`´╝łsmol-toml ŔžúŠ×É´╝ë |\n| ŠťČňť░š┤óň╝Ľ | SQLite´╝łsql.js´╝îÚŤÂ native ńżŁŔÁľ´╝ë |\n| Git ŠôŹńŻť | šŤ┤ŠÄą spawn git Ŕ┐ŤšĘő´╝łŠŚá libgit2 ńżŁŔÁľ´╝ë´╝îňů╝ň«╣ Gitea/GitHub/GitLab Ŕ┐ťšź» |\n\n---\n\n## ńŞëŃÇüGitea ň║Ľň║žŠ×ÂŠ×ä\n\n### Gitea Šś»ń╗Çń╣ł\n\nGitea Šś»ň╝ÇŠ║ÉŃÇüŔŻ╗ÚçĆŃÇüňĆ»Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓šÜäň«îŠĽ┤ Git Šëśš«íň╣│ňĆ░´╝îŠĆÉńżŤń╗ôň║ôŃÇüIssuesŃÇüWikiŃÇüActionsŃÇüWebhooksŃÇüAPI šşëňůĘňąŚŔâŻňŐŤŃÇéň«âŠś» GitHub šÜäň╝ÇŠ║ÉŠŤ┐ń╗úňôü´╝îńŞĄŔÇů API Úźśň║Žňů╝ň«╣ŃÇé\n\n```\nšöĘŠłĚÚÇëŠőęŠľ╣ň╝Ć´╝łńŞĄŔÇůňŐčŔâŻň«îňůĘńŞÇŔç┤´╝ë´╝Ü\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ GitHub          ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚÚŽľÚÇë´╝îÚŤÂÚůŹšŻ«´╝îšŤ┤ŠÄąšöĘ\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea    ń╝üńŞÜ/ÚÜÉšžüšöĘŠłĚ´╝îŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞŹšŽ╗ň╝ÇŔç¬ňĚ▒ŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ\n                      Šť¬ŠŁąŔ┐śŠö»Šîü´╝ÜGitLabŃÇüForgejo šşëňů╝ň«╣ň╣│ňĆ░\n```\n\n### Gitea Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚńŻôš│╗ = Ŕ«░ň┐ćšÜäŔ»şń╣ëňĹŻňÉŹšę║ÚŚ┤\n\nGitea ŠťëńŞĄšžŹńŞ╗ńŻô´╝Ü**ńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ** ňĺî **š╗äš╗ç´╝łOrganization´╝ë**ŃÇéŔ┐ÖňąŚńŻôš│╗ňĄęšäÂň░▒Šś»Ŕ«░ň┐ćšÜäňłćš▒╗š│╗š╗č´╝îńŞŹÚťÇŔŽüÚóŁňĄľŔ«żŔ«íŃÇé\n\n```\nńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ @alice\n  Ôöé\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ńŞ¬ń║║ń╗ôň║ô´╝łšžüŠťë´╝îňĆ¬ŠťëŔç¬ňĚ▒ňĆ»Ŕžü´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ learning/        ÔćÉ ňşŽń╣áŠłÉÚĽ┐š▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ health/          ÔćÉ ňüąň║Ěňî╗šľŚš▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ personal/        ÔćÉ ńŞ¬ń║║šöčŠ┤╗š▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé     ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ finance/         ÔćÉ Ŕ┤óňŐíŔžäňłĺš▒╗ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  Ôöé\n  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ ňŐáňůą/ňłŤň╗║ ň«Âň║şš╗äš╗ç @alice-family\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ Team: ň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹś´╝łŔ»╗ňćÖ´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ household/       ÔćÉ ň«Âň║şń║őňŐíň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ children/        ÔćÉ ňşęňşÉŠĽÖŔé▓šŤŞňů│´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n  Ôöé     ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ health-shared/   ÔćÉ ň«Âň║şňüąň║ĚŔ«░ňŻĽ´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n  Ôöé\n  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňŐáňůą/ňłŤň╗║ ňůČňĆŞš╗äš╗ç @my-company\n        ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ Team: ňĚąšĘőňŞł´╝łŔ»╗ňćÖ´╝ë\n        ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ Team: ňĆ¬Ŕ»╗´╝łń╗ůŠčąšťő´╝ë\n        ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇ project-alpha/   ÔćÉ ňĚąńŻťÚí╣šŤ«ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n        ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ tech-research/   ÔćÉ ŠŐÇŠť»Ŕ░âšáöň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝ë\n```\n\n**ňů│Úö«Ŕ«żŔ«íňć│šşľ´╝ÜGitea šÜäňĹŻňÉŹšę║ÚŚ┤ň░▒Šś»Ŕ»şń╣ëňłćš▒╗š│╗š╗čŃÇé**\n- ńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚńŞőšÜäń╗ôň║ô = ńŞ¬ń║║šöčŠ┤╗ňčč\n- š╗äš╗çńŞőšÜäń╗ôň║ô = ňĚąńŻť/ň«Âň║ş/šĄżňî║ńŞŐńŞőŠľç\n- ňŤóÚśč´╝łTeam´╝ë= ňŹĆńŻťŔÇůŠŁâÚÖÉš«íšÉć\n\n### Gitea ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇžŠĘíň×ő\n\n| ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇžš║žňłź | ňÉźń╣ë | OpenMnemo ňť║ŠÖ» |\n|-----------|------|---------------|\n| `private` | ń╗ůń╗ôň║ôŠłÉňĹśňĆ»Ŕžü | Ú╗śŔ«Ą´╝îńŞ¬ń║║ÚÜÉšžüŔ«░ň┐ć |\n| `internal` | ňÉîńŞÇ Gitea ň«×ńżőŠëÇŠťëšÖ╗ňŻĽšöĘŠłĚňĆ»Ŕžü | ň«Âň║şš╗äš╗çňćůňů▒ń║źŃÇüňůČňĆŞňćůÚâĘňů▒ń║ź |\n| `public` | ňůĘšŻĹňĆ»Ŕžü´╝îŠŚáÚťÇšÖ╗ňŻĽ | ščąŔ»ćŔżôňç║ŃÇüňůČň╝Çňłćń║ź |\n\n**Š│ĘŠäĆ**´╝Ü`internal` ňťĘ GitHub ńŞŐšž░ńŞ║ `private`´╝łGitHub Š▓íŠťë internal ŠŽéň┐Á´╝îń╗ůňťĘ Organization ńŞşŠťëš▒╗ń╝╝ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ´╝ëŃÇéŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea šÜä `internal` šşëń║Ä\"ń╗ůŠťČň«×ńżőšöĘŠłĚ\"´╝îŠś»ń╝üńŞÜÚâĘšŻ▓šÜäŠáŞň┐âń╝śňŐ┐ŃÇé\n\n### Gitea ňŐčŔâŻ Ôćĺ OpenMnemo šöĘÚÇöŠśáň░ä\n\n| Gitea ňŐčŔâŻ | OpenMnemo šöĘÚÇö |\n|-----------|---------------|\n| ń╗ôň║ô + šëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂ | ŠëÇŠťëň»╣Ŕ»ŁšÜäšëłŠťČňîľňşśňéĘ´╝îňĆ»ňŤ×Š║»ń╗╗ŠäĆ commit |\n| Issues | ń╗Äň»╣Ŕ»ŁńŞşŠĆÉňĆľń╗╗ňŐí´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘňłŤň╗║ Issue Ŕ┐ŻŔŞ¬ |\n| Wiki | ščąŔ»ćŠ▓ëŠĚÇňî║´╝ł`04_knowledge/` ň»╣ň║ö Wiki´╝ë |\n| Actions´╝łCI/CD´╝ë | ň┐âŔĚ│ŔžŽňĆĹŔç¬ňŐĘŠ×äň╗║ŠŐąňĹŐŃÇüŠÄĘÚÇü Pages |\n| Webhooks | ň«×ŠŚÂŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščąňł░Úú×ń╣Ž/Telegram/Discord/Slack |\n| REST API´╝łňů╝ň«╣ GitHub API´╝ë | CLI / ŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â / App šÜäš╗čńŞÇŠĽ░ŠŹ«ŠÄąňůąň▒é |\n| Gitea Pages | Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐ÚŁÖŠÇüÚâĘšŻ▓´╝łńŞÄ GitHub Pages šşëń╗Ě´╝ë |\n| š╗äš╗ç + ňŤóÚśč | ň«Âň║ş/ń╝üńŞÜšÜäňĄÜń║║ňŹĆńŻťńŞÄš▓żš╗ćŠŁâÚÖÉš«íšÉć |\n| `internal` ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž | ň«Âň║ş/ňŤóÚśčňćůÚâĘňů▒ń║ź´╝îńŞŹň»╣ňĄľŠÜ┤Úť▓ |\n| Packages´╝łŠť¬ŠŁą´╝ë | ň»╝ňç║Ŕ«░ň┐ćň┐źšůžŃÇüŠĘíň×ő fine-tune ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ÚŤć |\n\n---\n\n## ňŤŤŃÇüŔ«░ň┐ćňşśňéĘš╗ôŠ×ä\n\n### ń╗ôň║ôšŤ«ňŻĽš║Žň«Ü\n\n```\nMemory/                         ÔćÉ Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôŠá╣šŤ«ňŻĽ´╝łgit š«íšÉć´╝ë\n  01_goals/                     ÔćÉ Úí╣šŤ«šŤ«ŠáçŠľçń╗Â´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  02_todos/                     ÔćÉ ňżůňŐ×ŠŞůňŹĽ´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  03_chat_logs/                 ÔćÉ ň«×ŠŚÂň»╣Ŕ»ŁŠŚąň┐Ś´╝łMarkdown append-only´╝ë\n  04_knowledge/                 ÔćÉ ščąŔ»ćŠ▓ëŠĚÇ´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  05_archive/                   ÔćÉ ňŻĺŠíúňćůň«╣´╝łMarkdown´╝ë\n  06_transcripts/\n    raw/{client}/{date}/        ÔćÉ ňÄčňžő transcript´╝łJSONL´╝îňĆ»ÚÇëńŞŐń╝á´╝ë\n    clean/{client}/{date}/      ÔćÉ ŠŞůŠ┤ŚňÉÄ Markdown´╝łŠŚáňĚąňůĚŔ░âšöĘń║őń╗Â´╝ë\n    manifests/{client}/{date}/  ÔćÉ š╗ôŠ×äňîľňůâŠĽ░ŠŹ« JSON´╝łsession š┤óň╝Ľ´╝ë\n  07_reports/                   ÔćÉ šöčŠłÉšÜäÚŁÖŠÇüšŻĹšźÖ´╝łgitignore´╝ë\n  .report-cache/                ÔćÉ AI ŠĹśŔŽüš╝ôňşś´╝łgitignore´╝ë\n```\n\n### ManifestEntry ŠáŞň┐âňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```typescript\ninterface ManifestEntry {\n  session_id: string      // ňůĘň▒Çňö»ńŞÇ ID\n  client: string          // codex | claude | gemini\n  started_at: string      // ISO 8601\n  title: string           // ń╝ÜŔ»ŁŠáçÚóś´╝łń╗ÄÚŽľŠŁíŠÂłŠü»ŠĆÉňĆľ´╝ë\n  message_count: number\n  tool_event_count: number\n  raw_sha256: string      // ňÄčňžőŠľçń╗ÂňôłňŞî´╝îšöĘń║Ä AI ŠĹśŔŽüš╝ôňşś key\n  cwd: string             // ňĚąńŻťšŤ«ňŻĽ´╝łšöĘń║ÄÚí╣šŤ«ňłćš▒╗´╝ë\n  branch: string          // git branch\n  repo_clean_path: string // šŤŞň»╣ń║Äń╗ôň║ôŠá╣šÜäŠŞůŠ┤ŚŠľçń╗ÂŔĚ»ňżä\n  tags?: string[]         // AI ŠĆÉňĆľšÜäňů│Úö«Ŕ»ŹŠáçšşż´╝łňĆ»ÚÇë´╝ë\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ń║öŃÇüšöĘŠłĚńŞŐŠëőŠÁüšĘő´╝łOnboarding´╝ë\n\nÚŽľŠČíŔ┐ÉŔíî `openmnemo init` ŠŚÂ´╝îň╝Ľň»╝šöĘŠłĚň«îŠłÉń╗ąńŞőŠşąÚ¬Ą´╝Ü\n\n```\n1. Ŕ┐×ŠÄą Gitea/GitHub Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚ\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ Ŕżôňůą Personal Access Token´╝łPAT´╝ë\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ OpenMnemo ŔÄĚňżŚń╗ôň║ôňłŤň╗║ŃÇüŔ»╗ňćÖŠŁâÚÖÉ\n\n2. ÚÇëŠőęÚóäŔ«żŔ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôňłćš▒╗´╝łňĆ»ňĄÜÚÇë´╝îń╣čňĆ»Ŕç¬ň«Üń╣ë´╝ë\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňĆ»ÚÇë´╝ÜňĚąńŻťŃÇüňşŽń╣áŃÇüň«Âň║şŃÇüŠâůŠäčŃÇüňşÉňą│ŃÇüňüąň║ĚŃÇüŔ┤óňŐí\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ OpenMnemo ňťĘšöĘŠłĚŔ┤ŽňĆĚńŞőŔç¬ňŐĘňłŤň╗║ň»╣ň║öšÜäšžüŠťëń╗ôň║ô\n\n3. ňĆ»ÚÇë´╝ÜňłŤň╗║/ňŐáňůąš╗äš╗ç\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ň«Âň║şš╗äš╗ç´╝ÜÚéÇŔ»Ěň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹś´╝îń╗ôň║ôŔ«żńŞ║ internal\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňĚąńŻťš╗äš╗ç´╝Üšö▒ń╝üńŞÜš«íšÉćňĹśňłŤň╗║´╝îňĹśňĚąňŐáňůą\n\n4. Ŕ«żšŻ«Ú╗śŔ«ĄÚÜÉšžüš║žňłź\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ŠÄĘŔŹÉ´╝Üprivate´╝łń╗ůŔç¬ňĚ▒ňĆ»Ŕžü´╝ë\n   ÔööÔöÇÔöÇ ňŹĽń╗ôň║ôňĆ»ÚÜĆŠŚÂŔŽćšŤľ\n\n5. OpenMnemo ň╝ÇňžőňÉÄňĆ░ň┐âŔĚ│´╝îŔç¬ňŐĘŠŹĽŔÄĚ AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n```\n\n---\n\n## ňůşŃÇüAI ňłćš▒╗š│╗š╗čŔ«żŔ«í\n\n### ňĆîÚśÂŠ«Áňłćš▒╗ŠŚÂŠť║\n\n**ÚśÂŠ«ÁńŞÇ´╝Üň»╣Ŕ»ŁŔ┐ŤŔíîńŞş´╝łŔŻ»ŠĆÉšĄ║´╝ë**\n\n```\nÔöîÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ\nÔöé  AI ŠşúňťĘňłćŠ×Éň»╣Ŕ»Łš▒╗ň×ő...                        Ôöé\nÔöé  ň╗║Ŕ««ňŻĺŠíúňł░´╝Ü­čôü work / project-alpha           Ôöé\nÔöé  [š╗žš╗ş] [šĘŹňÉÄňć│ň«Ü]                             Ôöé\nÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś\n```\n- ńŞŹŠëôŠľşšöĘŠłĚ´╝îňĆ¬Šś»ÚŁ×ńżÁňůąň╝ĆŠĆÉšĄ║\n- šöĘŠłĚňĆ»ń╗ąň┐ŻšĽą´╝îš│╗š╗čňťĘň»╣Ŕ»Łš╗ôŠŁčňÉÄňćŹňĄäšÉć\n\n**ÚśÂŠ«Áń║î´╝Üň»╣Ŕ»Łš╗ôŠŁčňÉÄ´╝łŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščą´╝ë**\n\n```\n­čôę Šľ░Ŕ«░ň┐ćňĚ▓ŠŹĽŔÄĚ\n   \"Ŕ«ĘŔ«║ń║ć React šŐÂŠÇüš«íšÉćŠľ╣Šíł\"\n   ň╗║Ŕ««´╝Ü­čôü work / project-alpha\n\n   [Ščąšťő] [šž╗ňŐĘňł░ňůÂń╗ľń╗ôň║ô] [ŠĺĄÚöÇ´╝ł24h ňćůŠťëŠĽł´╝ë]\n```\n- ÚÇÜŔ┐ç IM Šť║ňÖĘń║║´╝łÚú×ń╣Ž/Telegram´╝ëŠłľš│╗š╗čÚÇÜščąŠÄĘÚÇü\n- 24 ň░ĆŠŚÂňćůňĆ»ŠĺĄÚöÇňŻĺŠíúňć│ň«Ü\n\n**ňżůňłćš▒╗ŠöÂń╗Âš«▒´╝łInbox´╝ë**\n\n```\nMemory/00_inbox/\n  ÔćÉ šöĘŠłĚŠĺĄÚöÇňŻĺŠíúšÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  ÔćÉ ŠŚáŠ│ĽŔç¬ňŐĘňłćš▒╗šÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n  ÔćÉ šöĘŠłĚÚÇëŠőę\"šĘŹňÉÄňć│ň«Ü\"šÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł\n```\n- ň«ÜŠťčŠĆÉÚćĺšöĘŠłĚňĄäšÉćŠöÂń╗Âš«▒\n- ňĆ»ŠëőňŐĘŠőľŠőŻ´╝łCLI ňĹŻń╗Ą `openmnemo move <session-id> <repo>`´╝ë\n\n### AI ňłćš▒╗ÚÇ╗ŔżĹ\n\n```typescript\n// ňłćš▒╗ŠÁüšĘő\n1. Ŕ»╗ňĆľ ManifestEntry.cwd´╝łňĚąńŻťšŤ«ňŻĽ´╝ëÔćĺ ňî╣ÚůŹňĚ▓ščąÚí╣šŤ«ń╗ôň║ô\n2. Ŕ»╗ňĆľň»╣Ŕ»ŁÚŽľŠŁíŠÂłŠü» + ŠťÇňÉÄńŞÇŠŁíŠÂłŠü» Ôćĺ ÚÇüňůą AI ŠĆÉňĆľńŞ╗Úóś\n3. ńŞÄšöĘŠłĚňĚ▓Šťëń╗ôň║ôňÉŹňüÜŔ»şń╣ëňî╣ÚůŹ´╝łembedding šŤŞń╝╝ň║Ž´╝ë\n4. šŻ«ń┐íň║Ž > 0.8 Ôćĺ Ŕç¬ňŐĘňŻĺŠíú + ŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščą\n5. šŻ«ń┐íň║Ž 0.5-0.8 Ôćĺ ŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščąŔ»ĚšöĘŠłĚší«Ŕ«Ą\n6. šŻ«ń┐íň║Ž < 0.5 Ôćĺ ňŻĺňůą 00_inbox/´╝îŠĆÉÚćĺšöĘŠłĚňĄäšÉć\n```\n\n---\n\n## ńŞâŃÇüŔĚĘń╗ôň║ôŠÉťš┤óŠ×ÂŠ×ä\n\n### ÚŚ«ÚóśŔâîŠÖ»\n\nGitea/GitHub šÜäňÄčšöčŠÉťš┤óŠś»**ń╗ôň║ôš║žňłź**šÜäÔÇöÔÇöšöĘŠłĚň┐ůÚí╗Ŕ┐ŤňůąŠčÉńŞ¬ń╗ôň║ôŠëŹŔâŻŠÉťš┤óňůÂńŞşňćůň«╣´╝îŠŚáŠ│ĽŔĚĘń╗ôň║ôňůĘŠľçŠúÇš┤óŃÇé\n\n### OpenMnemo šÜäŔžúŠ│Ľ´╝Üš╗čńŞÇŠťČňť░ SQLite š┤óň╝Ľ\n\n```\nň┐âŔĚ│ŔžŽňĆĹ´╝łŠ»Ć 5 ňłćÚĺč´╝ë\n        Ôćô\nŠëźŠĆĆŠëÇŠťëń╗ôň║ôšÜä manifests/ šŤ«ňŻĽ\n        Ôćô\nŠľ░ session Ôćĺ ŔžúŠ×É clean Markdown Ôćĺ ňćÖňůąŠťČňť░ SQLite FTS5 š┤óň╝Ľ\n        Ôćô\nopenmnemo search \"Ŕ«ĄŔ»üŠľ╣Šíł\"\n        Ôćô\nSQLite FTS5 ňůĘŠľçŠúÇš┤ó Ôćĺ ŔĚĘń╗ôň║ôŃÇüŔĚĘň«óŠłĚšź»š╗čńŞÇš╗ôŠ×ť\n        Ôćô´╝łŠť¬ŠŁą´╝ë\nňÉĹÚçĆňÁîňůąš┤óň╝Ľ Ôćĺ Ŕ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó´╝ł\"ŠëżŠłĹŔ«ĘŔ«║Ŕ┐çšÜäšŐÂŠÇüš«íšÉćŠľ╣Šíł\"´╝ë\n```\n\n**SQLite š┤óň╝Ľ schema´╝łŠáŞň┐âňşŚŠ«Á´╝ë´╝Ü**\n\n```sql\nCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE sessions_fts USING fts5(\n  session_id,\n  repo,          -- ŠëÇň▒×ń╗ôň║ô´╝ł@alice/workŃÇü@alice-family/household´╝ë\n  client,        -- codex | claude | gemini\n  title,\n  content,       -- clean markdown ňůĘŠľç\n  started_at,\n  tags\n);\n```\n\n**ňů│Úö«ń╝śňŐ┐´╝Ü**\n- ň«îňůĘŠťČňť░´╝îÚŤÂšŻĹš╗ťň╗ÂŔ┐č\n- ŔĚĘń╗ôň║ô´╝łńŞ¬ń║║ń╗ôň║ô + š╗äš╗çń╗ôň║ôňůĘÚâĘš┤óň╝Ľ´╝ë\n- ŔĚĘň«óŠłĚšź»´╝łClaude / Codex / Gemini š╗čńŞÇŠúÇš┤ó´╝ë\n- Šť¬ŠŁąňĆ»ňŐá sqlite-vec ň«×šÄ░ňÉĹÚçĆŔ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó\n\n---\n\n## ňůźŃÇüňÉäÚśÂŠ«ÁŠŐÇŠť»ń╗╗ňŐí\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 1´╝ÜCLI + Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝łŔ┐ŤŔíîńŞş´╝ë\n\n**ňĚ▓ň«îŠłÉ´╝Ü**\n- Ôťů transcript ŔžúŠ×É´╝łClaude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI JSONL Šá╝ň╝Ć´╝ë\n- Ôťů ňó×ÚçĆň»╝ňůą + SHA256 ňÄ╗ÚçŹ\n- Ôťů SQLite FTS5 ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤óš┤óň╝Ľ\n- Ôťů ň┐âŔĚ│ň«łŠŐĄŔ┐ŤšĘő´╝łWindows Task Scheduler / cron´╝ë\n- Ôťů Ŕç¬ňŐĘ git commit + push\n- Ôťů Ŕ«░ň┐ćšťőŠŁ┐´╝łreport build ňĹŻń╗Ą´╝ë´╝Ü\n  - Dashboard + Š┤╗ňŐĘšâşňŐŤňŤż + ň«óŠłĚšź»ňłćňŞâňŤż\n  - Sessions ňłŚŔíĘ´╝łŠîë client tab šşŤÚÇë´╝ë\n  - Projects ÚíÁ´╝łŠîë cwd Ŕç¬ňŐĘňłćš╗ä´╝ë\n  - Knowledge / Goals / Todos / Archive ÚíÁ\n  - ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒´╝łforce-directed´╝îcanvas´╝îŠŚá CDN´╝ë\n  - ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó´╝łclient + project Ŕ┐çŠ╗Ą´╝ë\n  - ńżžŔż╣ŠáĆň»╝Ŕł¬ + ŠÜŚ/ń║«Ŕë▓ňłçŠŹó + ňôŹň║öň╝Ć + ŠëőŠť║šź»\n  - i18n´╝łen / zh-CN´╝ë\n  - GitHub Pages Ŕç¬ňŐĘÚâĘšŻ▓´╝łgit subtree push´╝ë\n  - Webhook ÚÇÜščą´╝łÚú×ń╣Ž / Telegram / Discord / Slack´╝ë\n  - AI ŠĹśŔŽü´╝łSHA256 š╝ôňşś´╝îclaude-haiku´╝ë\n  - AI ňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź Tag ŠĆÉňĆľ\n  - TOC šŤ«ňŻĽ + ÚŁóňîůň▒Ĺň»╝Ŕł¬ + Callout Ŕ»şŠ│Ľ\n  - RSS Feed + OG meta + Mermaid ňŤżŔíĘ\n  - Reader Mode + View Transitions\n\n**ňżůň«îŠłÉ´╝łšž╗ŠĄŹ´╝ë´╝Ü**\n- ÔŁî report ňŐčŔâŻň░ÜŠť¬ń╗Ä `memorytree-workflow` šž╗ŠĄŹňł░ `packages/` š╗ôŠ×ä\n- ÔŁî `packages/sync/src/config.ts` š╝║ň░ĹŠľ░ config ňşŚŠ«Á´╝łlocale / gh_pages_branch / webhook_url šşë´╝ë\n- ÔŁî `packages/cli/src/main.ts` š╝║ň░Ĺ `report` ňşÉňĹŻń╗Ą\n\n**šž╗ŠĄŹŠľ╣Šíł´╝Ü**\n```\nŠľ░ňó× packages/report/\n  src/\n    i18n/         ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ´╝îŠŚáńżŁŔÁľňĆśŠŤ┤\n    render/       ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ´╝îescHtml šşëňĚąňůĚňçŻŠĽ░ňĚ▓ňťĘ core ŠłľšőČšźő\n    deploy/       ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    stats.ts      ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    summarize.ts  ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    tags.ts       ÔćÉ šŤ┤ŠÄąšž╗ŠĄŹ\n    build.ts      ÔćÉ šž╗ŠĄŹ´╝îimport ŔĚ»ňżäń╗ÄšŤŞň»╣ŔĚ»ňżäŠö╣ńŞ║ @openmnemo/core\n```\n\n---\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 2´╝ÜŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â´╝łńŞőńŞÇńŞ¬ÚçŹšé╣´╝ë\n\n**šŤ«Šáç´╝Ü** ŠŹĽŔÄĚšŻĹÚíÁšëł AI ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝îňćÖňůąŔ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ô\n\n**ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő´╝Ü** Chrome Extension Manifest V3 + TypeScript\n\n**Š×ÂŠ×ä´╝Ü**\n```\nŠÁĆŔžłňÖĘŠĆĺń╗Â´╝łcontent script´╝ë\n    Ôćô ŠőŽŠł¬ / Ŕ»╗ňĆľ DOM\nClaude.ai / ChatGPT / Gemini Web šÜäň»╣Ŕ»Łňćůň«╣\n    Ôćô ň║ĆňłŚňîľńŞ║Šáçňçć JSONL´╝łńŞÄ CLI ňĚąňůĚŠá╝ň╝ĆšŤŞňÉî´╝ë\n    Ôćô\nňÉÄňĆ░ Service Worker\n    Ôćô ÚÇÜŔ┐ç Native Messaging Šłľ HTTP\nŠťČňť░ openmnemo daemon´╝łňĚ▓ňťĘŔ┐ÉŔíî´╝ë\n    Ôćô\nňćÖňůą Memory/06_transcripts/raw/browser/{date}/\n    Ôćô ŔÁ░šÄ░Šťëň┐âŔĚ│ŠÁüšĘő\nŠŞůŠ┤Ś Ôćĺ manifests Ôćĺ report Ôćĺ push\n```\n\n**Šö»ŠîüšÜäň╣│ňĆ░´╝łŠîëń╝śňůłš║ž´╝ë´╝Ü**\n1. Claude.ai\n2. ChatGPT´╝łchat.openai.com´╝ë\n3. Gemini Web´╝łgemini.google.com´╝ë\n4. Ŕ▒ćňîůŃÇüKimiŃÇüŠľçň┐âńŞÇŔĘÇ´╝łńŞşŠľçňŞéňť║´╝ë\n\n**ňů│Úö«ŠîĹŠłś´╝Ü**\n- ňÉäň╣│ňĆ░ DOM š╗ôŠ×äńŞŹňÉî´╝îÚťÇŔŽüňŹĽšőČÚÇéÚůŹ selector\n- ŠÁüň╝ĆŔżôňç║šÜäŠŹĽŔÄĚŠŚÂŠť║´╝łÚťÇŔŽüšşë AI ňŤ×ňĄŹň«îŠłÉ´╝ë\n- šöĘŠłĚŠÄłŠŁâńŞÄÚÜÉšžüŠĆÉšĄ║´╝łň┐ůÚí╗ŠśÄší«ňĹŐščąŠŹĽŔÄĚŔîâňŤ┤´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 3´╝ÜIM ŠÄĘÚÇü\n\n**ňĚ▓Šťëňč║šíÇ´╝Ü** webhook.ts ňĚ▓ň«×šÄ░Úú×ń╣Ž / Telegram / Discord / Slack šÜä HTTP ŠÄĘÚÇü\n\n**ÚťÇŔŽüŠľ░ňó×´╝Ü**\n- IM Bot´╝łňĆîňÉĹń║Ąń║ĺ´╝îńŞŹňĆ¬Šś»ŠÄĘÚÇü´╝ë´╝ÜšöĘŠłĚňťĘÚú×ń╣Ž/Telegram ÚçîňĆ»ń╗ąŠčąŔ»óŔ«░ň┐ć\n- ŠčąŔ»óňĹŻń╗Ą´╝Ü`/search <ňů│Úö«Ŕ»Ź>`ŃÇü`/latest`ŃÇü`/session <id>`\n- ňŤ×ňĄŹŠá╝ň╝Ć´╝ÜŠĹśŔŽüňŹíšëç + ŔĚ│ŔŻČÚôżŠÄą´╝łŠîçňÉĹ GitHub Pages ŠłľŔç¬Šëśš«í Gitea Pages´╝ë\n- ňłćš▒╗ÚÇÜščą´╝ÜŠľ░ session ŠŹĽŔÄĚňÉÄŠÄĘÚÇüň╗║Ŕ««ňłćš▒╗´╝îÚÖäňŞŽ [Ščąšťő][šž╗ňŐĘ][ŠĺĄÚöÇ] ŠîëÚĺ«\n\n**ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő´╝Ü**\n- Telegram Bot API´╝łň«śŠľ╣´╝îňŤŻÚÖůšöĘŠłĚ´╝ë\n- Úú×ń╣Žň╝ÇŠöżň╣│ňĆ░Šť║ňÖĘń║║´╝łňŤŻňćůšöĘŠłĚ´╝ë\n- š╗čńŞÇ adapter ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝łńŞÄ webhook.ts Šëęň▒ĽňĄŹšöĘ´╝ë\n\n---\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 4´╝ÜWeb šź»\n\n**ň«ÜńŻŹ´╝Ü** Š»ö GitHub Pages ŠŤ┤ň«îŠĽ┤šÜäń║Ąń║ĺšĽîÚŁó´╝îŠö»Šîüš╝ľŔżĹŃÇüŠúÇš┤óŃÇüš╗şňćÖ\n\n**ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×őŔ«ĘŔ«║´╝Ü**\n\n| Šľ╣Šíł | ń╝śňŐ┐ | ňŐúňŐ┐ |\n|------|------|------|\n| Next.js´╝łŠÄĘŔŹÉ´╝ë | šöčŠÇüŠłÉšćč´╝îSSG + SSR šüÁŠ┤╗ | ÚťÇŔŽüŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ´╝łŠłľ Vercel´╝ë|\n| SvelteKit | ŔŻ╗ÚçĆ´╝îŠÇžŔâŻňąŻ | šĄżňî║šŤŞň»╣ň░Ć |\n| š║»ÚŁÖŠÇü´╝łň╗Âń╝ŞšÄ░ŠťëŠľ╣Šíł´╝ë | ÚŤÂŠťŹňŐíňÖĘŠłÉŠťČ | ń║Ąń║ĺŔâŻňŐŤňĆŚÚÖÉ |\n\n**ŠáŞň┐âňŐčŔâŻ´╝Ü**\n- Ŕ«░ň┐ćń╗ôň║ôŠÁĆŔžł´╝łŠáĹňŻóš╗ôŠ×ä + ňůĘŠľçŠÉťš┤ó´╝ë\n- ščąŔ»ćňŤżŔ░▒ń║Ąń║ĺ´╝łŠ»öÚŁÖŠÇüšëłŠŤ┤ńŞ░ň»î´╝ë\n- AI š╗şňćÖ´╝łÚÇëńŞşńŞÇŠ«ÁňÄćňĆ▓ň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝îš╗žš╗ş´╝ë\n- ňÉĹÚçĆŔ»şń╣ëŠÉťš┤ó´╝ł\"ŠëżŠłĹńŞŐňĹĘŔ«ĘŔ«║Ŕ┐çšÜäŔ«ĄŔ»üŠľ╣Šíł\"´╝ë\n- ŔĚĘń╗ôň║ô´╝łńŞ¬ń║║ń╗ôň║ô + š╗äš╗çń╗ôň║ô´╝ëš╗čńŞÇŔžćňŤż\n\n---\n\n### ÚśÂŠ«Á 5´╝ÜŠíîÚŁó App + ŠëőŠť║ App\n\n**ŠŐÇŠť»ÚÇëň×ő´╝Ü**\n- ŠíîÚŁó´╝Ü**Tauri**´╝łRust + WebView´╝îŠ»ö Electron ŔŻ╗ 10 ňÇŹ´╝îňÄčšöčŔ«┐ÚŚ«ŠťČňť░Šľçń╗Âš│╗š╗č´╝ë\n- ŠëőŠť║´╝Ü**React Native** Šłľ **Flutter**´╝łÚťÇŔŽüŔ░âšáö´╝ë\n\n**ŠíîÚŁó App ŠáŞň┐âŔâŻňŐŤ´╝Ü**\n- Ŕ»╗ňĆľŠťČňť░ŠëÇŠťë AI ňĚąňůĚšÜäň»╣Ŕ»Ł´╝łVS Code ŠĆĺń╗ÂšŤ«ňŻĽŃÇüCodex šŤ«ňŻĽšşë´╝ë\n- ŠťČňť░ daemon š«íšÉćšĽîÚŁó´╝łńŞŹÚťÇŔŽüňĹŻń╗ĄŔíî´╝ë\n- ň«îŠĽ┤Ŕ«░ň┐ćš«íšÉć´╝łňó×ňłáŠö╣Ščą´╝ë\n- Gitea/GitHub Ŕ┤ŽňĆĚš«íšÉć´╝łňĄÜŔ┤ŽňĆĚŃÇüňĄÜš╗äš╗çňłçŠŹó´╝ë\n\n---\n\n## ń╣ŁŃÇüÚťÇŔŽüŠľ░ňó×šÜä config ňşŚŠ«Á\n\n```toml\n# ~/.memorytree/config.toml´╝łň«îŠĽ┤šëł´╝ë\n\nheartbeat_interval = \"5m\"\nauto_push = true\nlog_level = \"info\"\n\n# ŠŐąňĹŐšŤŞňů│\ngenerate_report = true\nlocale = \"zh-CN\"\nai_summary_model = \"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001\"\n\n# Gitea/GitHub Pages ÚâĘšŻ▓\n# ň╝ÇŠ║ÉšöĘŠłĚ´╝Ügh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\" ŠÄĘÚÇüňł░ GitHub Pages\n# Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea šöĘŠłĚ´╝ÜňÉîŠáĚŔ«żšŻ«´╝îŠÄĘÚÇüňł░ Gitea Pages\ngh_pages_branch = \"gh-pages\"\ncname = \"\"                    # Ŕç¬ň«Üń╣ëňččňÉŹ´╝îšĽÖšę║ňłÖńŞŹšöčŠłÉ CNAME\n\n# ÚÇÜščą\nwebhook_url = \"\"              # Úú×ń╣Ž/Telegram/Discord/Slack webhook\n\n# RSS ňĺî OG meta´╝łÚťÇŔŽüš╗Łň»╣ URL´╝ë\n# GitHub Pages šöĘŠłĚňíź´╝Ühttps://{username}.github.io/{repo}\n# Ŕç¬Šëśš«í Gitea     "text": "Based on my thorough reading of all files in `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/` and its subdirectories, here is a comprehensive summary:\n\n## Complete File Listing\n\n**Root Level Documents (5 files):**\n1. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/ňĚąňůĚň»╝Ŕł¬šŻĹšźÖń║║š▒╗šöĘŠłĚńŻ┐šöĘŠëőňćî.md`\n2. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/ňĚąňůĚň»╝Ŕł¬šŻĹšźÖňůĘÚôżŔĚ»ŠĽ░ŠŹ«Šľ╣Šíł.md`\n3. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/ňĚąňůĚň»╝Ŕł¬šŻĹšźÖŠëžŔíîSOP.md`\n4. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/ňĚąňůĚň»╝Ŕł¬šŻĹšźÖŠĽ┤ńŻôŠ×ÂŠ×äŔôŁňŤż.md`\n5. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/ňĚąňůĚň»╝Ŕł¬šŻĹšźÖÚççÚŤćŠÁüšĘőňĄŹšŤśńŞÄŠ│ĘŠäĆń║őÚí╣.md`\n\n**Plan11 Directory (4 files):**\n1. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/plan11/INDEX.md`\n2. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/plan11/ňĽćńŞÜŔ«íňłĺń╣Ž.md`\n3. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/plan11/ŠŐÇŠť»Š×ÂŠ×äšÖŻšÜ«ń╣Ž.md`\n4. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/plan11/ŠëžŔíîŔĚ»š║┐ňŤż.md`\n5. `/d/demo1/agentree/plan/plan11/ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ÚççÚŤćŠĆĺń╗ÂŔžäŔîâ.md`\n\n**Archive Directory: Multiple plans (Plan 0-10)** with additional Gitea-focused documents\n\n---\n\n## 1. GITEA-RELATED IDEAS (Major Focus)\n\n### **Core Vision: Gitea as Universal Office Collaboration Platform**\n\nThe most significant concept emerging from these documents is transforming **Gitea** (a lightweight Git platform) into a **non-technical user-friendly office collaboration platform**. Key ideas:\n\n#### **A. Gitea Functionality Mapping to Office Needs**\n\n| Office Need | Traditional Tool | Gitea Feature | User View |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| Project Space | Google Drive | Repository | \"My Project\" |\n| Task Management | Trello | Issues + Projects | \"Task Board\" |\n| Knowledge Base | Notion | Wiki | \"Knowledge Center\" |\n| Document Collaboration | Google Docs | Markdown + PR | \"Document Editor\" |\n| Approval Workflow | Approval Systems | Pull Request | \"Approval Request\" |\n| File Storage | Dropbox | Repository Files + Git LFS | \"File Management\" |\n| Team Discussion | Slack | Issue + Labels | \"Team Chat\" |\n| Version Control | None | Git | \"History & Versions\" |\n| Permissions | Scattered | Teams + Permissions | \"Access Control\" |\n\n#### **B. Architecture Design: \"Everything is a Repository\"**\n\nEvery feature, plugin, workflow, and project is stored as an independent Git repository:\n- Price monitoring plugin = repository with docker-compose, config, scripts\n- Data analysis skill = repository with code, examples, tests  \n- Personal workspace = dedicated repository for daily memories in Markdown format\n- Team project = repository with branches for different people's work\n\n**Key Advantages:**\n- Complete version control (who changed what, when, why)\n- Easy one-click deployment via Docker\n- Data completely isolated per user/project\n- Full Git merge/diff/rollback capabilities\n- Team collaboration without conflicts\n\n#### **C. Gitea + OpenClaw (AI Brain) Integration**\n\n**OpenClaw's Role:** Translate natural language to Gitea operations\n\n```\nUser: \"Help me create a competitor analysis project\"\nÔćô\nOpenClaw (AI):\n  1. Create repository: project-competitor-analysis\n  2. Initialize folder structure\n  3. Clone relevant plugins (price-monitor, news-aggregator, data-analyzer)\n  4. Create Issues for setup tasks\n  5. Notify team members\n  \nUser sees: Clean interface with project ready to use\n(No Git, branches, commits, or technical terms visible)\n```\n\n#### **D. PR (Pull Request) + Branch System for Non-Technical Collaboration**\n\nTransform Git's powerful collaboration model into office scenarios:\n\n**Scenario 1: Document Review**\n- Employee creates \"draft\" version in personal workspace\n- Submits for approval (= Pull Request)\n- Manager reviews with inline comments, version comparison\n- Once approved, changes merge to official version\n- Complete audit trail: who approved, when, what changed\n\n**Scenario 2: Task Completion**\n- Task assigned to employee\n- Employee completes work in personal branch\n- Submits for verification (= PR)\n- Manager reviews attached deliverables\n- If approved, automatically marks task complete and archives result\n\n**Scenario 3: Personal Memory Archival**\n- Daily OpenClaw conversations auto-save to \"draft\" branch\n- OpenClaw summarizes valuable items\n- Creates PR to \"official memory\" branch\n- User confirms Ôćĺ merges permanently into personal archive\n\n#### **E. Server Requirements**\n\n**Excellent news:** Gitea is extremely lightweight\n- Minimum: 256MB RAM, can run on Raspberry Pi\n- MVP: 2 cores, 4GB RAM, 50GB SSD = all you need for 10-20 person team\n- 100-300MB base memory usage (vs GitLab's 4GB+)\n- Private deployment possible (data under your control)\n\n---\n\n## 2. NOVEL/FICTION WRITING PLATFORM (Minor Concept)\n\n**Status:** Not a primary focus, but mentioned in context\n\nThe documents briefly reference this as a potential expansion:\n- Using Gitea for versioning novel chapters\n- PR system for editor feedback\n- Wiki for story worldbuilding documentation\n- Issue tracking for plot threads and character arcs\n- However, **no detailed novel platform spec exists** ÔÇö it's noted as \"future Phase 3\"\n\n---\n\n## 3. AI-DRIVEN TOOL DISCOVERY PLATFORM (Web Crawler Navigation)\n\nA **complete secondary product** is documented in detail:\n\n### **Tool Navigation Website System**\n\n**What:** An AI tool discovery and comparison website that automatically collects, verifies, and displays information about software tools\n\n**Full Pipeline:**\n1. **Discovery Layer:** Automatically crawl 20-50 tool directory websites\n2. **Collection:** Extract tool names, URLs, pricing, features from official pages\n3. **Cleaning:** Deduplicate, normalize, resolve conflicts\n4. **Verification:** Two-stage validation with evidence chains (source URL + timestamp + screenshot)\n5. **Database:** Store with coverage scores and confidence ratings\n6. **Presentation:** Web UI with filtering, comparison, sorting\n7. **Iteration:** Continuous re-crawling every 3-30 days\n\n**MVP Requirements:**\n- 1000+ tools with 70%+ key field coverage\n- Evidence chain for pricing/free tier/card requirement\n- Table view with filtering, sorting, comparison\n- All in 4 weeks of implementation\n\n**Tech Stack:**\n- `crawler/src/collect.mjs` ÔÇö main scraper\n- `crawler/src/clean.mjs` ÔÇö deduplication\n- Pinchtab (JavaScript rendering for dynamic sites)\n- Crawlab (task scheduling)\n- Scrapy (optional framework)\n\n**Three Execution Phases:**\n1. **Phase A:** Single site deep sampling (200 records per site)\n2. **Phase B:** 3-site parallel collection with quality gates\n3. **Phase C:** Full loop (180-min intervals, continuous)\n\n---\n\n## 4. AgentCrawl Platform Overview (Main Product)\n\n**Positioning:** \"AI-native office collaboration platform with Git-powered data sovereignty\"\n\n### **Core Concept (Plan11 - Final Version)**\n\nA unified platform combining:\n- **Bottom:** Gitea (Git version control, issue tracking, permissions)\n- **Middle:** OpenClaw (AI task orchestration & code generation)\n- **Top:** Custom web front-end (non-technical user interface)\n- **Deployment:** Full private control (your own server)\n\n### **Key Differentiators**\n\n| Feature | AgentCrawl | Notion/Flybook | GitHub/GitLab |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| **Data Control** | 100% private | Vendor-locked | Vendor-locked |\n| **Technical Skill Required** | Minimal | Minimal | High |\n| **Version History** | Git (industrial) | Basic snapshots | Full Git |\n| **Resource Cost** | $1,020/mo (20 people) | ~$5K/mo | $7K/mo |\n| **Customization** | Unlimited | Constrained | Code-heavy |\n| **Price Model** | SaaS $19-$240/mo/person | SaaS | SaaS/On-prem |\n\n### **Financial Projections (Year 1-3)**\n\n| Metric | Year 1 | Year 2 | Year 3 |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| Free Users | 1,000 | 4,000 | 10,000 |\n| Paid Users | 75 | 300 | 750 |\n| ARR | $45K | $180K | $450K |\n| Total Revenue | $60K | $260K | $730K |\n| Total Costs | $394K | $712K | $1,296K |\n| Cumulative Profit | -$334K | -$786K | -$1,352K |\n| Breakeven | ÔÇö | ÔÇö | Year 4 Q3 |\n\n### **Team Size Evolution**\n\n- **Year 1:** 3.5 people ($276K): Tech Lead, Backend, Frontend, DevOps (part-time)\n- **Year 2:** 5.5 people ($432K): Add more Backend + Product Manager\n- **Year 3:** 8.5 people ($780K): Add Frontend + Security Engineer\n\n### **Three Business Phases**\n\n**Phase 1 (0-3 months):** Core platform\n- Gitea deployment + Adapter Gateway\n- Web front-end (React + Vite)\n- Lightweight mode (direct API calls)\n- Validation: \"new repo Ôćĺ new session Ôćĺ chat Ôćĺ generate README\" works\n\n**Phase 2 (3-6 months):** Advanced features\n- Plugin system with security CI/CD\n- Official data collection plugin\n- High-level mode (OpenClaw integration)\n- Validation: \"Switch between modes, 30+ plugins available\"\n\n**Phase 3 (6-12 months):** Enterprise\n- IM integration (Feishu, DingTalk, WeChat)\n- Multi-user real-time collaboration\n- Payment system (Stripe, WeChat Pay, Alipay)\n- Validation: \"3+ enterprise customers, SOC 2 certification\"\n\n### **Plugin Architecture**\n\n**Every feature is an optional plugin:**\n- Data collection plugin (Phase 2)\n- Price monitoring plugin\n- News aggregation plugin\n- CRM integration plugin\n- Financial approval plugin\n- Custom plugins from community\n\n**Safety First:** Complete CI/CD validation pipeline\n- Docker image signature verification\n- Dependency vulnerability scanning (Trivy + Snyk)\n- Permission auditing (custom rule engine)\n- README + test coverage checks\n- Automatic PR rejection on failures\n\n---\n\n## 5. Key Technical Insights\n\n### **Why Gitea Over Alternatives?**\n\n**vs. SpringŔőąńżŁ Framework:**\n- ŔőąńżŁ = bare skeleton, need to build everything from zero\n- Gitea = complete product, just needs UI wrapper\n- Gitea saves 6+ months of development for core features\n\n**vs. Notion/Flybook:**\n- Notion: Self-hosted? No. Customizable? No. Version control? Basic.\n- Gitea: All three yes. Data is yours. Can modify everything.\n\n**vs. Open Source:**\n- OpenClaw supplier risk lowered (made optional in Phase 2)\n- Gitea is MIT licensed, fully commercial-friendly\n- No vendor lock-in\n\n### **Data Persistence Model**\n\nAll information stored as Markdown in Git repositories:\n- Conversations Ôćĺ Markdown files in personal repo\n- Tasks Ôćĺ Gitea Issues (stored in Git)\n- Documents Ôćĺ Wiki or README files\n- Approvals Ôćĺ Pull Request history\n- Everything: Permanent, versioned, auditable\n\n**OpenClaw's Daily Routine:**\n1. Collect all user conversations\n2. Store in temporary \"draft\" branch\n3. Summarize valuable content\n4. Create PR to \"official memory\"\n5. Auto-clean temporary files\n\n---\n\n## SUMMARY: Three Main Product Ideas\n\n1. **AgentCrawl:** Gitea-based office collaboration platform (Primary)\n   - Complete planning, architecture, financial models, 18-month roadmap\n   - Ready for execution\n\n2. **Tool Navigation Website:** AI-powered tool discovery crawler (Secondary)\n   - Complete data pipeline design\n   - MVP achievable in 4 weeks\n   - Currently being implemented\n\n3. **Fiction Writing Platform:** (Tertiary/Future)\n   - Not extensively detailed\n   - Would leverage Gitea for chapter versioning\n   - Listed as Phase 3 expansion\n\nAll documents show sophisticated product thinking, market research, technical architecture, and financial modeling. The Gitea-based collaboration platform is the most thoroughly developed concept.",
    "type": "text"
  },

    "text": "agentId: af82f34931cad41b2 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)\n<usage>total_tokens: 15521\ntool_uses: 14\nduration_ms: 93510</usage>"
  }
]

ňťĘň▒Ľň╝Çń╣őňëŹ´╝îňůłšÉćŔžú Gitea ŔâŻŠĆÉńżŤń╗Çń╣łÔÇöÔÇöŠ»ĆńŞ¬ niche ÚâŻŠś»ňťĘŔ┐Öń║ŤŔâŻňŐŤńŞŐ"ňąŚńŞÇň▒éÚóćňččňú│"´╝Ü

| Gitea ŔâŻňŐŤ | ŠŐŻŔ▒íňÉźń╣ë |
|-----------|---------|
| ń╗ôň║ô | ń╗╗ńŻĽńŞÇńŞ¬Úóćňččšę║ÚŚ┤ |

  "content": "# šĽ¬ňĄľš»ç´╝Üń╗ą Gitea ńŞ║ň║Ľň║žšÜä Niche ń║žňôüščęÚśÁ\n\n> šëłŠťČ´╝Üv1.0 ┬Ě ŠŚąŠťč´╝Ü2026-03-17\n> ň«ÜńŻŹ´╝ÜOpenMnemo šöčŠÇüŠëęň▒ĽŠľ╣ňÉĹ´╝îňÉäń║žňôüňů▒ń║źňÉîńŞÇŠŐÇŠť»ň║Ľň║ž\n\n---\n\n## ŠáŞň┐âŠÇŁŔĚ»\n\nOpenMnemo Ú¬îŔ»üń║ćńŞÇńŞ¬ŠĘíň╝Ć´╝Ü**Gitea šÜäňÄčšöčŔâŻňŐŤ´╝łń╗ôň║ôŃÇüIssuesŃÇüPRŃÇüWikiŃÇüOrgŃÇüActions´╝ë+ AI š┐╗Ŕ»Ĺň▒é**´╝îňĆ»ń╗ąŠŤ┐ń╗úŠčÉńŞ¬ň×éšŤ┤ÚóćňččÚçîŠśéŔ┤ÁŃÇüň░üÚŚşŃÇüňë▓ŔúéšÜäšÄ░ŠťëňĚąňůĚŃÇé\n\nŔ┐ÖńŞ¬ŠĘíň╝ĆňĆ»ń╗ąňĄŹňłÂňł░ń╗╗ŠäĆÚóćňččŃÇéňĆśšÜäňĆ¬Šś»Úóćňččňú│ňĺî AI Prompt´╝îńŞŹňĆśšÜäŠś»ň║Ľň║žŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## Gitea ŠáŞň┐âŔâŻňŐŤŠśáň░ä\n\n| Gitea ŔâŻňŐŤ | ŠŐŻŔ▒íňÉźń╣ë | ňĆ»ŠŤ┐ń╗úšÜäń╝áš╗čňĚąňůĚ |\n|-----------|---------|----------------|\n| ń╗ôň║ô | ń╗╗ńŻĽńŞÇńŞ¬Úóćňččšę║ÚŚ┤ | Šľçń╗ÂňĄ╣ŃÇüÚí╣šŤ«šę║ÚŚ┤ |\n| šëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂ | ňćůň«╣šÜäň«îŠĽ┤ń┐«Šö╣ňÄćňĆ▓´╝łŠŚÂÚŚ┤Šť║ňÖĘ´╝ë | ŠëőňŐĘňĄçń╗ŻŃÇüň┐źšůž |\n| Issues | ń╗╗ňŐí / ÚŚ«ÚóśŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬ | TrelloŃÇüJiraŃÇüńż┐ňłęŔ┤┤ |\n| PR + Review | ň«íŠë╣ / ňŹĆńŻťŠÁü | Úé«ń╗ÂňżÇŔ┐öŃÇüň«íŠë╣š│╗š╗č |\n| Wiki | ňĆéŔÇâščąŔ»ćň║ô | NotionŃÇüConfluence |\n| Org + Team | ňĄÜń║║ňŹĆńŻť + ŠŁâÚÖÉŠÄžňłÂ | ń╝üńŞÜOAŃÇüÚĺëÚĺë |\n| Internal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž | šžüň»ćňů▒ń║ź´╝łň«Âň║ş / ňŤóÚśč´╝ë | šžüŠťëšżĄš╗ä |\n| Actions | Ŕç¬ňŐĘňîľŔžŽňĆĹ | ZapierŃÇün8n |\n| Webhooks | ń║őń╗ÂŠÄĘÚÇüÚÇÜščą | ňÉäň╣│ňĆ░ Bot |\n| Ŕç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea | ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâ´╝îÚÜÉšžüŠĽĆŠäčňť║ŠÖ» | ŠŚáňĆ»ŠŤ┐ń╗ú |\n\n---\n\n## ÚÇëňôüňłĄŠľşŠíćŠ×Â\n\nńŞÇńŞ¬ Niche Šś»ňÉŽňÇ╝ňżŚňüÜ´╝îšťőń║öńŞ¬š╗┤ň║Ž´╝Ü\n\n```\nÔťů šÄ░ŠťëňĚąňůĚňżłšâéŠłľňżłŔ┤Á´╝łšŚŤšé╣ňĄčŠĚ▒´╝ë\nÔťů ňćůň«╣ňĄęšäÂŠś»ŠľçŠťČ / Markdown´╝łŠŐÇŠť»ŠłÉŠťČńŻÄ´╝ë\nÔťů Šťëň«íŠë╣ / ňŹĆńŻťŠÁüÚťÇŠ▒é´╝łPR ŔâŻŠŤ┐ń╗úŠśéŔ┤ÁŠÁüšĘő´╝ë\nÔťů ÚÜÉšžüŠĽĆŠäč´╝łŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓Šś»šź×ń║ëňúüň×ĺ´╝ë\nÔťů ň░ĆňŤóÚśč / ńŞ¬ń║║ŔâŻŔŽćšŤľšÜäňŞéňť║´╝łniche´╝îńŞŹÚťÇŔŽüŠëôňĄžňÄé´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n## Tier 1 ÔÇö ń╝śňůłš║žŠťÇÚźś\n\n### 1. Š│ĽňżőŠľçń╣Žš«íšÉćň╣│ňĆ░\n\n**šŚŤšé╣´╝Ü** ňżőŠëÇšöĘ Word + Úé«ń╗ÂňżÇŔ┐öň«íňÉłňÉî´╝îŠ▓íŠťëšëłŠťČŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬´╝îŠ▓íŠťëňŹĆńŻťŠÁü´╝îŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňťĘšČČńŞëŠľ╣ŠťŹňŐíňÖĘŃÇé\n\n```\nňÉłňÉîŠľçŠťČ  Ôćĺ Markdown Šľçń╗Â´╝îň«îŠĽ┤ń┐«Šö╣ňÄćňĆ▓ = Š│Ľňżőň«íŔ«íÚôż\nPR       Ôćĺ ňżőňŞł / ň«óŠłĚÚÇÉŠŁíň«íÚśůŃÇüŠë╣Š│ĘŃÇüŠÄąňĆŚŠłľŠőĺš╗ŁŠ»ĆňĄäń┐«Šö╣\nIssues   Ôćĺ ňÉłŔžäÚŚ«ÚóśŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬ŃÇüŠŁíŠČżń║ëŔ««ŃÇüňżůňĄäšÉćń║őÚí╣\nWiki     Ôćĺ ňÉłňÉîŠĘíŠŁ┐ň║ôŃÇüŠ│ĽňżőŠť»Ŕ»şŔíĘŃÇüŠíłńżőňĆéŔÇâ\nActions  Ôćĺ ňÉłňÉîňł░ŠťčŔç¬ňŐĘŠĆÉÚćĺŃÇüšşżšŻ▓šŐÂŠÇüňĆśŠŤ┤ÚÇÜščą\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ŔŹëŠőčŠáçňçćňÉłňÉîňłŁšĘ┐\n  - Ŕ»ćňłźÚźśÚúÄÚÖęŠŁíŠČżň╣ÂÚźśń║«ŠĆÉšĄ║\n  - ň╗║Ŕ««šČŽňÉłňŻôňť░Š│ĽŔžäšÜäŠáçňçćŔ»şŔĘÇ\n  - ńŞşŔő▒ŠľçňÉłňÉîňĆîŔ»şň»╣šůžŠúÇŠčą\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** šÄ░ŠťëŠ│Ľňżő SaaS´╝łDocuSignŃÇüContractPodAi´╝ëń╗ĚŠá╝Š×üÚźśńŞöŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňťĘń║Ĺšź»´╝îńŞşň░ĆňżőŠëÇňĺîńŞ¬ń║║šöĘŠłĚň«îňůĘŠ▓íŠťëňąŻÚÇëŠőęŃÇéŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea Ŕžúňć│ňżőŠëÇŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâÚíżŔÖĹŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 2. ńŞ¬ń║║ CRM / ń║║Ŕäëš«íšÉć\n\n**šŚŤšé╣´╝Ü** Š▓íŠťëšťčŠşúňąŻšöĘšÜäńŞ¬ń║║ CRMŃÇéšÄ░Šťëń║žňôüŔŽüń╣łňĄ¬ń╝üńŞÜňîľ´╝îŔŽüń╣łňĄ¬š«ÇÚÖő´╝îÚÜÉšžüŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňůĘňťĘňÄéňĽćŠťŹňŐíňÖĘŃÇé\n\n```\nŠ»ĆńŞ¬Ŕüöš│╗ń║║ Ôćĺ šőČšźő Markdown Šľçń╗Â´╝łŔâîŠÖ»ŃÇüňů│š│╗Ŕäëš╗ťŃÇüŔüŐňĄęŠĹśŔŽüŃÇüŔĚčŔ┐ŤŔ«░ňŻĽ´╝ë\nIssues    Ôćĺ \"ńŞëńŞ¬ŠťłňÉÄŔĚčŔ┐Ť Alice ňů│ń║ÄŔ×ŹŔÁäšÜäń║ő\" / ň«ÜŠťčš╗┤š│╗ŠĆÉÚćĺ\nWiki      Ôćĺ ŔíîńŞÜňť░ňŤżŃÇüňů│Úö«ń║║Ŕäëňů│š│╗šŻĹš╗ťŃÇüňťłňşÉňłćŠ×É\nOrg       Ôćĺ ŠîëňťłňşÉňłćš╗ä´╝łŠŐĽŔÁäňťłŃÇüŔÇüňÉîňşŽŃÇüňÉłńŻťń╝Öń╝┤´╝ë\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ňů│š│╗ň╝║ň║ŽŔ»äňłć´╝łŠťÇŔ┐ĹŔüöš│╗ÚóĹšÄç + ń║ĺňŐĘŠĚ▒ň║Ž´╝ë\n  - Ŕç¬ňŐĘń╗Äň»╣Ŕ»ŁŔ«░ňŻĽŠĆÉňĆľňů│Úö«ń┐íŠü»ŠŤ┤Šľ░Ŕüöš│╗ń║║ŠíúŠíł\n  - ŔĚčŔ┐ŤŠŚÂŠť║ŠÄĘŔŹÉ´╝ł\"Alice ńŞŐŠČíŠĆÉňł░ňą╣ 4 ŠťłŠťëŔ×ŹŔÁäÚťÇŠ▒é\"´╝ë\n  - ń║║ŔäëŔĚ»ňżäňłćŠ×É´╝ł\"Ŕ«ĄŔ»ć Bob ŠťÇščşŔĚ»ňżäŠś»ÚÇÜŔ┐ç Alice\"´╝ë\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** MonicaŃÇüClay šşëńŞ¬ń║║ CRM ňĚąňůĚŠĽ░ŠŹ«ňťĘń║Ĺšź»´╝îŠŚáŠ│ĽŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓´╝îňŐčŔâŻń╣čŠťëÚÖÉŃÇéŔ┐ÖńŞ¬Šľ╣ňÉĹŠťëŠ×üň╝║šÜäńŞ¬ń║║šöĘŠłĚšŚŤšé╣ŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 3. ňşŽŠť»šáöšęÂ / Ŕ«║Šľçš«íšÉć\n\n**šŚŤšé╣´╝Ü** šáöšęÂŔÇůšöĘ Zotero š«íŠľçšî«ŃÇüWord ňćÖšČöŔ«░ŃÇüÚé«ń╗Âń╝ášĘ┐ŃÇüGitHub š«íń╗úšáü´╝îňŤŤńŞ¬ňĚąňůĚň«îňůĘňë▓ŔúéŃÇé\n\n```\nŠ»Ćš»çŔ«║ŠľçšČöŔ«░ Ôćĺ Markdown´╝łŠĹśŔŽüŃÇüŠáŞň┐âŔ«║šé╣ŃÇüň╝ĽšöĘŃÇüŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠë╣Š│Ę´╝ë\nPR          Ôćĺ ň»╝ňŞłŠë╣Šö╣ňşŽšöčŔ«║ŠľçŔŹëšĘ┐´╝îÚÇÉŠ«Á Review\nIssues      Ôćĺ ňżůŔžúňć│šÜäšáöšęÂÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇüň«×Ú¬îŔ«żŔ«íš╝║ÚÖĚŃÇüŠľçšî«š╝║ňĆú\nWiki        Ôćĺ Šľçšî«š╗╝Ŕ┐░ŃÇüšáöšęÂŠľ╣Š│ĽŔ«║ŃÇüň«×Ú¬îŠŚąň┐Ś\nActions     Ôćĺ Ŕ«║ŠľçŠł¬ŠşóŠŚąňëŹŔç¬ňŐĘŠĆÉÚćĺ´╝îarXiv ŠŤ┤Šľ░ŠÄĘÚÇü\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - Ŕ«║ŠľçŔç¬ňŐĘŠĹśŔŽü´╝łš▓śŔ┤┤ PDF´╝îŔżôňç║š╗ôŠ×äňîľšČöŔ«░´╝ë\n  - ňĆĹšÄ░ščąŔ»ćň║ôňćůŔ«║Šľçń╣őÚŚ┤šÜäÚÜÉŠÇžňů│Ŕüö\n  - ŠÄĘŔŹÉšŤŞňů│Šť¬Ŕ»╗Šľçšî«\n  - ň╝ĽšöĘŠá╝ň╝ĆŠúÇŠčą´╝łAPA / MLA / Chicago´╝ë\n  - šáöšęÂšę║šÖŻŔ»ćňłź´╝ł\"Ŕ┐ÖńŞ¬Šľ╣ňÉĹŔ┐śŠ▓íń║║šáöšęÂŔ┐ç\"´╝ë\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** ÚźśŠáíňĺîšáöšęÂŠť║Š×äň»╣ŠĽ░ŠŹ«ńŞ╗ŠŁâŔŽüŠ▒éŠ×üÚźś´╝îň╝ÇŠ║ÉŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓Šś»ňö»ńŞÇňĆ»ŠÄąňĆŚšÜäŠľ╣ŠíłŃÇéšÄ░ŠťëňĚąňůĚ´╝łNotionŃÇüObsidian´╝ëŠ▓íŠťëňŹĆńŻťň«íšĘ┐ŠÁüŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 4. ňłŤŠäĆňćÖńŻť / ň░ĆŔ»┤ň╣│ňĆ░\n\n**šŚŤšé╣´╝Ü** Scrivener Š▓íŠťëňŹĆńŻť´╝îWord Š▓íŠťëšëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂ´╝îŠ▓íŠťëňĚąňůĚŠö»Šîüš╝ľŔżĹńŞÄńŻťŔÇůń╣őÚŚ┤šÜäš╗ôŠ×äňîľň«íšĘ┐ŠÁüšĘőŃÇé\n\n```\nŠ»Ćšźá        Ôćĺ šőČšźő Markdown Šľçń╗Â´╝îň«îŠĽ┤ń┐«Šö╣ňÄćňĆ▓ňĆ»ňŤ×Š║»ń╗╗ŠäĆšëłŠťČ\nPR          Ôćĺ š╝ľŔżĹ / Beta Reader šÜäń┐«Šö╣ň╗║Ŕ««´╝îńŻťŔÇůňĆ»ÚÇÉŔíî accept / reject\nIssues      Ôćĺ ŠâůŔŐéŠ╝ĆŠ┤×ŃÇüń║║šëęň╝žš║┐ňżůňĄäšÉćÚŚ«ÚóśŃÇüŔ»╗ŔÇůňĆŹÚŽł\nWiki        Ôćĺ ńŞľšĽîŔžéŔ«żň«ÜŃÇüń║║šëęňŹí´╝łňĄľŔ▓î/ŠÇžŠá╝/ňů│š│╗´╝ëŃÇüŠŚÂÚŚ┤š║┐ŃÇüňť░ňŤż\nOrg         Ôćĺ ňç║šëłšĄżš╗äš╗ç´╝îňĄÜńŻťŔÇůňŹĆňÉîńŞÇńŞ¬š│╗ňłŚ\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ŠľçÚúÄńŞÇŔç┤ŠÇžŠúÇŠčą´╝ł\"šČČńŞëšźášÜäŔ»şŠ░öňĺîňëŹńŞĄšźáńŞŹńŞÇŠáĚ\"´╝ë\n  - ŠâůŔŐéŔ┐×Ŕ┤»ŠÇžŠúÇŠčą´╝łń║║šëęňëŹňÉÄščŤšŤżŃÇüŠŚÂÚŚ┤š║┐ÚöÖŔ»»´╝ë\n  - Šá╣ŠŹ«ńŞľšĽîŔžéŔ«żň«Üš╗şňćÖ\n  - Ŕç¬ňŐĘšöčŠłÉń║║šëęňů│š│╗ňŤżŃÇüŠŚÂÚŚ┤š║┐ňĆ»Ŕžćňîľ\n  - ňĄÜŔ»şŔĘÇšëłŠťČš«íšÉć´╝łňÄčŔĹŚ + š┐╗Ŕ»ĹšëłŠťČň»╣šůž´╝ë\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** šŻĹŠľçň╣│ňĆ░Úöüň«ÜňłŤńŻťŔÇůňćůň«╣´╝îń╝áš╗čňćÖńŻťňĚąňůĚš╝║ń╣ĆňŹĆńŻťŔâŻňŐŤ´╝îšőČšźőńŻťŔÇůňĺîň░Ćňç║šëłšĄżŠ▓íŠťëňąŻšÜäňćůň«╣š«íšÉćŠľ╣ŠíłŃÇé\n\n---\n\n## Tier 2 ÔÇö ńŞşŠťčŠť║ń╝Ü\n\n### 5. ň«Âň║şŔ┤óňŐí / ňů▒ňÉîŔ«░Ŕ┤Ž\n\n```\nň«Âň║şš╗äš╗ç @family´╝łinternal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇž´╝îň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹśňĆ»Ŕžü´╝ë\nŠ»ĆŠťłŔ┤ŽňŹĽ  Ôćĺ YAML / CSV š╗ôŠ×äňîľŔ«░ňŻĽ´╝îšëłŠťČňĆ»ňŤ×Š║»\nIssues   Ôćĺ ňĄžÚóŁÚççŔ┤şŔ«ĘŔ«║ŃÇüÚóäš«Śń║ëŔ««ŃÇüšÉćŔ┤óŔ«íňłĺ\nWiki     Ôćĺ ň«Âň║şŔ┤óňŐíŔžäňłÖŃÇüń┐ŁÚÖęŠŞůňŹĽŃÇüŔÁäń║žšÖ╗Ŕ«░ŃÇüš┤žŠÇąŔüöš│╗\nActions  Ôćĺ ŠťłŠťźŔç¬ňŐĘŠ▒çŠÇ╗ŠŐąňĹŐŃÇüŔ┤ŽňŹĽňł░ŠťčŠĆÉÚćĺ\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - Šö»ňç║ŔÂőňŐ┐ňłćŠ×ÉńŞÄň╝éňŞŞŠúÇŠÁő\n  - ňéĘŔôäšŤ«ŠáçŔ┐Ťň║ŽŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬\n  - ň╣┤ň║ŽŔ┤óňŐíňüąň║ĚŠŐąňĹŐŔç¬ňŐĘšöčŠłÉ\n  - šĘÄňŐíšŤŞňů│Šö»ňç║Ŕç¬ňŐĘňłćš▒╗ňŻĺŠíú\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** ň«Âň║şŔ┤óňŐíŔŻ»ń╗ÂńŞĄňĄ┤ńŞŹŔ«ĘňąŻÔÇöÔÇöńŞ¬ń║║Ŕ«░Ŕ┤Ž App ńŞŹŠö»Šîüň«Âň║şňů▒ń║ź´╝îń╝üńŞÜŔ┤óňŐíŔŻ»ń╗ÂňĄ¬ňĄŹŠŁéŃÇéGitea Family Org + Internal ňĆ»ŔžüŠÇžňĄęšäÂÚÇéÚůŹŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 6. ňî╗šľŚňüąň║ĚŔ«░ňŻĽ\n\n```\nŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ Gitea = ňî╗šľŚŠĽ░ŠŹ«ň«îňůĘńŞŹš╗ĆŔ┐çń╗╗ńŻĽšČČńŞëŠľ╣ŠťŹňŐíňÖĘ\n\nŠ»ĆŠČíň░▒Ŕ»Ő Ôćĺ Markdown Ŕ«░ňŻĽ´╝łšŚçšŐÂŃÇüšöĘŔŹ»ŃÇüňî╗ňś▒ŃÇüŠúÇŠčąš╗ôŠ×ť´╝ë\nIssues  Ôćĺ ňżůňĄŹŠčąÚí╣ŃÇüŠůóŠÇžšŚůš«íšÉćń╗╗ňŐíŃÇüšöĘŔŹ»ŠĆÉÚćĺ\nWiki    Ôćĺ ň«ÂŠŚĆšŚůňĆ▓ŃÇüŔŹ»šëęŔ┐çŠĽĆňłŚŔíĘŃÇüňŞŞšöĘňî╗ÚÖó/ňî╗šöč\nOrg     Ôćĺ ň«Âň║şš╗äš╗ç´╝îň«Âň║şŠłÉňĹśń║ĺšŤŞňů│Š│ĘŔÇüń║║ňüąň║Ě\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ňüąň║ĚŔÂőňŐ┐ňŤżŔíĘ´╝łŔíÇňÄőŃÇüŔíÇš│ľŃÇüńŻôÚçŹÚĽ┐ŠťčňĆśňîľ´╝ë\n  - ň░▒Ŕ»ŐňëŹŔç¬ňŐĘšöčŠłÉšŚůňÄćŠĹśŔŽü´╝łńżŤňî╗šöčň┐źÚÇčń║ćŔžú´╝ë\n  - šöĘŔŹ»šŤŞń║ĺńŻťšöĘŠúÇŠčą\n  - šŚçšŐÂňĆśňîľň╝éňŞŞŠĆÉÚćĺ\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëňúüň×ĺ´╝Ü** ňî╗šľŚŠĽ░ŠŹ«ÚÜÉšžüŠĽĆŠäčň║ŽŠ×üÚźś´╝îŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓Šś»ňö»ńŞÇňĆ»ŔóźšöĘŠłĚń┐íń╗╗šÜäŠľ╣ŠíłŃÇéšÄ░Šťëňüąň║Ě App ňůĘÚâĘŠś»ń║Ĺšź»´╝îšöĘŠłĚń┐íń╗╗ň║ŽńŻÄŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 7. ŠŐĽŔÁäń║ĄŠśôŠŚąŔ«░\n\n```\nŠ»ĆšČöń║ĄŠśô Ôćĺ š╗ôŠ×äňîľ Markdown´╝łňůąňť║ÚÇ╗ŔżĹŃÇüń╗ôńŻŹŃÇüŠşóŠŹčńŻŹŃÇüňç║ňť║ňĄŹšŤś´╝ë\nIssues  Ôćĺ ňżůšáöšęÂšÜäŠáçšÜäŃÇüň«ĆŔžéÚúÄÚÖęń║őń╗ÂŔ┐ŻŔŞ¬\nWiki    Ôćĺ ŠŐĽŔÁäŠíćŠ×ÂŃÇüŔíîńŞÜšáöšęÂŃÇüń╝░ňÇ╝Šľ╣Š│ĽŔ«║\nActions Ôćĺ Šîüń╗ôňł░šŤ«Šáçń╗ĚŠá╝Ŕç¬ňŐĘŠĆÉÚćĺ´╝łš╗ôňÉłŔíîŠâů API´╝ë\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ňć│šşľŠĘíň╝ĆňłćŠ×É´╝ł\"ńŻášÜäń║ĆŠŹčňŹĽ 80% ňĆĹšöčňťĘŠâůš╗¬ňîľňŐáń╗ôňÉÄ\"´╝ë\n  - Šâůš╗¬ňüĆňĚ«Ŕ»ćňłź´╝łFOMO Ŕ┐ŻÚźśŃÇüŠüÉŠůîňë▓Ŕéëšë╣ňżüŔ»ćňłź´╝ë\n  - š╗ęŠĽłňŻĺňŤá´╝łŔÂůÚóŁŠöÂšŤŐŠŁąŔç¬ňô¬š▒╗ń║ĄŠśô´╝č´╝ë\n  - šşľšĽąńŞÇŔç┤ŠÇžŠúÇŠčą´╝łň«×ÚÖůŠôŹńŻťŠś»ňÉŽšČŽňÉłŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜäŠíćŠ×Â´╝č´╝ë\n```\n\n**šź×ń║ëšę║šÖŻ´╝Ü** ń║ĄŠśôŠŚąŔ«░ňĚąňůĚňçáń╣ÄŠś»šę║šÖŻňŞéňť║´╝îšÄ░ŠťëšÜäÚâŻňżłš«ÇÚÖőŃÇéňüÜŠŐĽŔÁäšÜäń║║Š×üň║ŽÚťÇŔŽüňĄŹšŤśňĚąňůĚ´╝îńŻćŠ▓íŠťëń║║Ŕ«ĄšťčňüÜŃÇé\n\n---\n\n### 8. ŠĽÖŔé▓ / Ŕ»żšĘőš«íšÉć\n\n```\nŔ»żšĘőŠŁÉŠľÖ  Ôćĺ Markdown Šľçń╗Â´╝îŔÇüňŞłšëłŠťČŠÄžňłÂš╗┤ŠŐĄ\nńŻťńŞÜŠĆÉń║Ą  Ôćĺ ňşŽšöč Fork ń╗ôň║ô + ŠĆÉń║Ą PR´╝łňĄęšäÂšÜäńŻťńŞÜŠĆÉń║Ąš│╗š╗č´╝ë\nIssues   Ôćĺ ňşŽšöčŠĆÉÚŚ«ŃÇüšĆşš║žňůČňĹŐŃÇüšşöšľĹ\nWiki     Ôćĺ Ŕ»żšĘőňĄžš║▓ŃÇüňĆéŔÇâŔÁäŠľÖŃÇüŔ»äňłćŠáçňçć\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ńŻťńŞÜŔç¬ňŐĘňłŁŔ»ä´╝łń╗úšáüÚóśŔç¬ňŐĘŠÁőŔ»Ľ´╝îŠľçšźáÚóśŔ»äňłćňĆéŔÇâ´╝ë\n  - ńŞ¬ŠÇžňîľňşŽń╣áŔĚ»ňżäŠÄĘŔŹÉ\n  - ňşŽšöčŔľäň╝▒šé╣Ŕ»ćňłź´╝ł\"Ŕ┐ÖÚüôÚóś 70% šÜäňşŽšöčňüÜÚöÖń║ć\"´╝ë\n  - Ŕ»żšĘőŠŁÉŠľÖŠŤ┤Šľ░ň╗║Ŕ««\n```\n\n---\n\n### 9. Šľ░ÚŚ╗ / ňćůň«╣š╝ľŔżĹ CMS\n\n```\nŠ»Ćš»çŠľçšźá  Ôćĺ Markdown + PR š╝ľŔżĹň«íšĘ┐ŠÁü´╝łŔ«░ŔÇůňćÖ Ôćĺ š╝ľŔżĹ Review Ôćĺ ńŞ╗š╝ľ Merge´╝ë\nIssues   Ôćĺ ÚÇëÚóśň║ôŃÇüÚççŔ«┐ń╗╗ňŐíňłćÚůŹŃÇüń║őň«×ŠáŞŠčąňżůňŐ×\nWiki     Ôćĺ ŠŐąÚüôÚúÄŠá╝ŠîçňŹŚŃÇüÚççŔ«┐ŔÁäŠ║Éň║ôŃÇüšŽüšöĘŔ»ŹŔíĘ\nActions  Ôćĺ PR Merge ňÉÄŔç¬ňŐĘňĆĹňŞâňł░šŻĹšźÖ\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - ŠáçÚóś A/B ŠÁőŔ»Ľň╗║Ŕ««\n  - ń║őň«×ŠÇžÚÖłŔ┐░ŠáçŔ«░´╝łÚťÇŔŽüŠáŞŠčąšÜäňĆąňşÉÚźśń║«´╝ë\n  - SEO ňů│Úö«Ŕ»Źň╗║Ŕ««\n  - ňĄÜŔ»şŔĘÇŔç¬ňŐĘš┐╗Ŕ»Ĺ´╝łňłŁšĘ┐´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n### 10. HR / OKR š«íšÉć\n\n```\nŠ»Ćňşúň║Ž OKR Ôćĺ Markdown Šľçń╗Â´╝îšëłŠťČňĆ»Ŕ┐ŻŠ║»´╝îňÄćňĆ▓ňĆ»ňŤ×Úíż\nPR         Ôćĺ š╗ęŠĽłŔ»äń╝░´╝ÜňĹśňĚąŔç¬Ŕ»ä + ńŞŐš║ž Review´╝îÚÇÉŠŁíŔ»äŔ«║\nIssues     Ôćĺ ŠőŤŔüśÚťÇŠ▒éŃÇüňč╣Ŕ«şÚí╣šŤ«ŃÇüŠö┐šşľňĆśŠŤ┤\nWiki       Ôćĺ ňůČňĆŞŠö┐šşľŃÇüňĹśňĚąŠëőňćîŃÇüŔľ¬ÚůČš╗ôŠ×ä\n\nAI ňó×ňÇ╝´╝Ü\n  - OKR Ŕ┤ĘÚçĆŔ»äňłć´╝łŠś»ňÉŽňĆ»ÚçĆňîľŃÇüŠś»ňÉŽŠťëŠîĹŠłśŠÇž´╝ë\n  - Ŕç¬ňŐĘšöčŠłÉš╗ęŠĽłŔ»äń╝░ňłŁšĘ┐´╝łňč║ń║Ä Issues ň«îŠłÉŠâůňćÁ´╝ë\n  - ŠőŤŔüś JD Šĺ░ňćÖŔżůňŐę\n  - šŽ╗ŔüîÚúÄÚÖęÚóäŔşŽ´╝łňč║ń║Äš╗ęŠĽłŔÂőňŐ┐´╝ë\n```\n\n---\n\n## Tier 3 ÔÇö ÚĽ┐ŠťčŠľ╣ňÉĹ\n\n| Niche | ŠáŞň┐âŠśáň░ä | AI ňó×ňÇ╝šé╣ |\n|-------|---------|---------|\n| ÚúčŔ░▒ / ňÄĘŠł┐š«íšÉć | ÚúčŔ░▒ Markdown + Ŕ┤şšëęŠŞůňŹĽ Issues | Šá╣ŠŹ«ňć░š«▒ÚúčŠŁÉŠÄĘŔŹÉÚúčŔ░▒´╝îŔÉąňů╗ňłćŠ×É |\n| ŠŚůŔíîŔžäňłĺ | ŔíîšĘő Markdown + ń╗╗ňŐí Issues | ŔíîšĘőń╝śňîľŃÇüňŻôňť░ÚÜÉŔŚĆŠÄĘŔŹÉ |\n| ňćťňť║ / ňćťńŞÜŔ«░ňŻĽ | šö░ňť░ŠĽ░ŠŹ« Markdown + ńŻťńŞÜ Issues | ňĄęŠ░öÚóäŠÁő + šŚůŔÖźň«│Ŕ»ćňłź + ń║žÚçĆňłćŠ×É |\n| ŠŞŞŠłĆŔ«żŔ«íŠľçŠíú | GDD Markdown + ňŐčŔâŻ Issues | ŠŞŞŠłĆň╣│ŔííŠÇžň╗║Ŕ««ŃÇüńŞľšĽîŔžéńŞÇŔç┤ŠÇž |\n| Šĺşň«ó / ŔžćÚóĹŔäÜŠťČ | ŔäÜŠťČ Markdown + PR ň«íšĘ┐ | AI ŠÂŽŔë▓ŃÇüŠŚÂÚĽ┐ń╝░š«ŚŃÇüňşŚň╣ĽšöčŠłÉ |\n| ňęÜšĄ╝ / Š┤╗ňŐĘšşľňłĺ | Š┤╗ňŐĘŠľ╣Šíł Markdown + ńżŤň║öňĽć Issues | ŠŚÂÚŚ┤š║┐ń╝śňîľŃÇüÚóäš«ŚŠÄžňłÂ |\n\n---\n\n## ń║žňôüščęÚśÁŠÇ╗Ŕžł\n\n```\n                        ńŞ¬ń║║šöĘŠłĚ          ňŤóÚśč / Šť║Š×ä\n                  ÔöîÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöČÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÉ\n  ÚÜÉšžüŠĽĆŠäčň║ŽÚźś    Ôöé ńŞ¬ń║║ CRM     Ôöé Š│ĽňżőŠľçń╣Žš«íšÉć            Ôöé\n  ´╝łŔç¬ÚâĘšŻ▓ń╝śňŐ┐´╝ë  Ôöé ňî╗šľŚňüąň║ĚŔ«░ňŻĽ Ôöé ňî╗šľŚŠť║Š×äŔ«░ňŻĽš│╗š╗č        Ôöé\n                  Ôöé ŠŐĽŔÁäń║ĄŠśôŠŚąŔ«░ Ôöé HR / š╗ęŠĽłš«íšÉć           Ôöé\n                  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔö╝ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöĄ\n  ňŹĆńŻťŠÁüÚťÇŠ▒éň╝║    Ôöé ňłŤŠäĆňćÖńŻť     Ôöé ňşŽŠť»šáöšęÂ / Ŕ«║Šľçš«íšÉć     Ôöé\n  ´╝łPR ŠťÇňĄžňîľ´╝ë   Ôöé ńŞ¬ń║║ŠŚąŔ«░     Ôöé Šľ░ÚŚ╗š╝ľŔżĹ CMS            Ôöé\n                  Ôöé              Ôöé Ŕ»żšĘő / ŠĽÖŔé▓š«íšÉć         Ôöé\n                  ÔöťÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔö╝ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöĄ\n  ň«Âň║şňť║ŠÖ»        Ôöé ň«Âň║şŔ┤óňŐíŔ«░Ŕ┤Ž Ôöé ň«Âň║şňî╗šľŚŔ«░ňŻĽ            Ôöé\n  ´╝łOrg Internal´╝ëÔöé ÚúčŔ░▒š«íšÉć     Ôöé ňşÉňą│ŠĽÖŔé▓ŠíúŠíł            Ôöé\n                  ÔööÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔö┤ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöś\n```\n\n---\n\n## ŠëžŔíîšşľšĽą\n\n**š╗čńŞÇň║Ľň║ž´╝îň┐źÚÇčňĄŹňłÂ´╝Ü**\n\nŠëÇŠťëń║žňôüňů▒ń║ź´╝Ü\n- Gitea ň«×ńżő´╝łŠłľšöĘŠłĚŔç¬ňĚ▒šÜä GitHub´╝ë\n- OpenMnemo šÜäň┐âŔĚ│ + ňÉîŠşąňč║šíÇŔ«żŠľŻ\n- š╗čńŞÇšÜä AI š┐╗Ŕ»Ĺň▒é´╝łŔç¬šäÂŔ»şŔĘÇ Ôćĺ Gitea API´╝ë\n- š╗čńŞÇšÜäŠŐąňĹŐ / ňĆ»Ŕžćňîľň╝ĽŠôÄ\n\n**ňĚ«ň╝éňĆ¬ňťĘ´╝Ü**\n- ÚóćňččńŞôň▒×šÜä Markdown ŠĘíŠŁ┐´╝łňÉłňÉîŠĘíŠŁ┐ŃÇüšŚůňÄćŠĘíŠŁ┐ŃÇüOKR ŠĘíŠŁ┐´╝ë\n-
